authors_text: Yulun Tian,Jonathan P. How
title: Spectral Sparsification for Communication-Efficient Collaborative Rotation and Translation Estimation
title_zh: 用于高效通信的协作旋转和平移估计的谱稀疏化
comment: Revised extended technical report (37 pages, 15 figures, 6 tables)
comments: Revised extended technical report (37 pages, 15 figures, 6 tables)
abstract: We propose fast and communication-efficient optimization algorithms for multi-robot rotation averaging and translation estimation problems that arise from collaborative simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), structure-from-motion (SfM), and camera network localization applications. Our methods are based on theoretical relations between the Hessians of the underlying Riemannian optimization problems and the Laplacians of suitably weighted graphs. We leverage these results to design a collaborative solver in which robots coordinate with a central server to perform approximate second-order optimization, by solving a Laplacian system at each iteration. Crucially, our algorithms permit robots to employ spectral sparsification to sparsify intermediate dense matrices before communication, and hence provide a mechanism to trade off accuracy with communication efficiency with provable guarantees. We perform rigorous theoretical analysis of our methods and prove that they enjoy (local) linear rate of convergence. Furthermore, we show that our methods can be combined with graduated non-convexity to achieve outlier-robust estimation. Extensive experiments on real-world SLAM and SfM scenarios demonstrate the superior convergence rate and communication efficiency of our methods.
summary: We propose fast and communication-efficient optimization algorithms for multi-robot rotation averaging and translation estimation problems that arise from collaborative simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM), structure-from-motion (SfM), and camera network localization applications. Our methods are based on theoretical relations between the Hessians of the underlying Riemannian optimization problems and the Laplacians of suitably weighted graphs. We leverage these results to design a collaborative solver in which robots coordinate with a central server to perform approximate second-order optimization, by solving a Laplacian system at each iteration. Crucially, our algorithms permit robots to employ spectral sparsification to sparsify intermediate dense matrices before communication, and hence provide a mechanism to trade off accuracy with communication efficiency with provable guarantees. We perform rigorous theoretical analysis of our methods and prove that they enjoy (local) linear rate of convergence. Furthermore, we show that our methods can be combined with graduated non-convexity to achieve outlier-robust estimation. Extensive experiments on real-world SLAM and SfM scenarios demonstrate the superior convergence rate and communication efficiency of our methods.
abstract_zh: 我们针对协作同步定位和建图（SLAM）、运动结构（SfM）和相机网络定位应用程序产生的多机器人旋转平均和平移估计问题提出快速且通信高效的优化算法。我们的方法基于底层黎曼优化问题的 Hessian 矩阵和适当加权图的 Laplacian 矩阵之间的理论关系。我们利用这些结果来设计一个协作求解器，其中机器人与中央服务器协调，通过在每次迭代时求解拉普拉斯系统来执行近似二阶优化。至关重要的是，我们的算法允许机器人在通信之前采用光谱稀疏化来稀疏化中间密集矩阵，从而提供一种在准确性和通信效率之间进行权衡的机制，并提供可证明的保证。我们对我们的方法进行严格的理论分析，并证明它们具有（局部）线性收敛率。此外，我们表明我们的方法可以与分级非凸相结合以实现异常值鲁棒估计。对现实世界 SLAM 和 SfM 场景的大量实验证明了我们的方法具有卓越的收敛速度和通信效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速且通信高效的多机器人协作旋转和翻译估计优化算法，用于解决协同SLAM、SfM和相机网络定位中的问题。
AI.motivation: 多机器人协作场景中，传统方法因频繁通信和密集矩阵传输导致高通信开销，需在保证精度的前提下提升通信效率。
AI.method: 基于Riemannian优化问题的Hessian与图Laplacian的理论关系，设计协作求解器，通过谱稀疏化技术压缩中间矩阵，并结合Laplacian系统求解实现近似二阶优化。
AI.result: 理论证明算法具有局部线性收敛率，结合渐进非凸性可提升抗异常值能力，实验显示在真实SLAM/SfM场景中收敛速度和通信效率优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过谱稀疏化有效平衡通信效率与精度，理论分析与实验验证了其在多机器人协作定位中的优越性。

authors_text: Chenxi Liu,Zhaoqi Leng,Pei Sun,Shuyang Cheng,Charles R. Qi,Yin Zhou,Mingxing Tan,Dragomir Anguelov
title: LidarNAS: Unifying and Searching Neural Architectures for 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: LidarNAS：统一和搜索 3D 点云的神经架构
abstract: Developing neural models that accurately understand objects in 3D point clouds is essential for the success of robotics and autonomous driving. However, arguably due to the higher-dimensional nature of the data (as compared to images), existing neural architectures exhibit a large variety in their designs, including but not limited to the views considered, the format of the neural features, and the neural operations used. Lack of a unified framework and interpretation makes it hard to put these designs in perspective, as well as systematically explore new ones. In this paper, we begin by proposing a unified framework of such, with the key idea being factorizing the neural networks into a series of view transforms and neural layers. We demonstrate that this modular framework can reproduce a variety of existing works while allowing a fair comparison of backbone designs. Then, we show how this framework can easily materialize into a concrete neural architecture search (NAS) space, allowing a principled NAS-for-3D exploration. In performing evolutionary NAS on the 3D object detection task on the Waymo Open Dataset, not only do we outperform the state-of-the-art models, but also report the interesting finding that NAS tends to discover the same macro-level architecture concept for both the vehicle and pedestrian classes.
summary: Developing neural models that accurately understand objects in 3D point clouds is essential for the success of robotics and autonomous driving. However, arguably due to the higher-dimensional nature of the data (as compared to images), existing neural architectures exhibit a large variety in their designs, including but not limited to the views considered, the format of the neural features, and the neural operations used. Lack of a unified framework and interpretation makes it hard to put these designs in perspective, as well as systematically explore new ones. In this paper, we begin by proposing a unified framework of such, with the key idea being factorizing the neural networks into a series of view transforms and neural layers. We demonstrate that this modular framework can reproduce a variety of existing works while allowing a fair comparison of backbone designs. Then, we show how this framework can easily materialize into a concrete neural architecture search (NAS) space, allowing a principled NAS-for-3D exploration. In performing evolutionary NAS on the 3D object detection task on the Waymo Open Dataset, not only do we outperform the state-of-the-art models, but also report the interesting finding that NAS tends to discover the same macro-level architecture concept for both the vehicle and pedestrian classes.
abstract_zh: 开发能够准确理解 3D 点云中的对象的神经模型对于机器人和自动驾驶的成功至关重要。然而，可以说由于数据的高维性质（与图像相比），现有的神经架构在设计上表现出很大的多样性，包括但不限于考虑的视图、神经特征的格式和使用的神经操作。缺乏统一的框架和解释使得很难正确看待这些设计，也很难系统地探索新的设计。在本文中，我们首先提出一个统一的框架，其关键思想是将神经网络分解为一系列视图变换和神经层。我们证明，这种模块化框架可以重现各种现有作品，同时允许对主干设计进行公平比较。然后，我们展示该框架如何轻松实现具体的神经架构搜索 (NAS) 空间，从而实现有原则的 NAS-for-3D 探索。在 Waymo 开放数据集上执行 3D 物体检测任务的进化 NAS 时，我们不仅超越了最先进的模型，而且还报告了一个有趣的发现，即 NAS 倾向于为车辆和行人类别发现相同的宏观架构概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LidarNAS方法，通过统一框架和神经架构搜索技术，优化3D点云的神经网络设计。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云神经网络设计多样且缺乏统一框架，导致难以系统比较和探索新架构。
AI.method: 提出模块化框架将网络分解为视图转换与神经层，构建NAS搜索空间并进行进化搜索。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上超越现有模型，并发现NAS在车辆和行人检测中生成相似宏观架构。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有效支持3D点云架构探索，NAS能发现跨类别通用设计模式，推动自动驾驶发展。

authors_text: Michael H. Lim,Tyler J. Becker,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Claire J. Tomlin,Zachary N. Sunberg
title: Optimality Guarantees for Particle Belief Approximation of POMDPs
title_zh: POMDP 粒子置信近似的最优性保证
abstract: Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) provide a flexible representation for real-world decision and control problems. However, POMDPs are notoriously difficult to solve, especially when the state and observation spaces are continuous or hybrid, which is often the case for physical systems. While recent online sampling-based POMDP algorithms that plan with observation likelihood weighting have shown practical effectiveness, a general theory characterizing the approximation error of the particle filtering techniques that these algorithms use has not previously been proposed. Our main contribution is bounding the error between any POMDP and its corresponding finite sample particle belief MDP (PB-MDP) approximation. This fundamental bridge between PB-MDPs and POMDPs allows us to adapt any sampling-based MDP algorithm to a POMDP by solving the corresponding particle belief MDP, thereby extending the convergence guarantees of the MDP algorithm to the POMDP. Practically, this is implemented by using the particle filter belief transition model as the generative model for the MDP solver. While this requires access to the observation density model from the POMDP, it only increases the transition sampling complexity of the MDP solver by a factor of $\mathcal{O}(C)$, where $C$ is the number of particles. Thus, when combined with sparse sampling MDP algorithms, this approach can yield algorithms for POMDPs that have no direct theoretical dependence on the size of the state and observation spaces. In addition to our theoretical contribution, we perform five numerical experiments on benchmark POMDPs to demonstrate that a simple MDP algorithm adapted using PB-MDP approximation, Sparse-PFT, achieves performance competitive with other leading continuous observation POMDP solvers.

However, POMDPs are notoriously difficult to solve, especially when the state and observation spaces are continuous or hybrid, which is often the case for physical systems. This fundamental bridge between PB-MDPs and POMDPs allows us to adapt any sampling-based MDP algorithm to a POMDP by solving the corresponding particle belief MDP, thereby extending the convergence guarantees of the MDP algorithm to the POMDP. Practically, this is implemented by using the particle filter belief transition model as the generative model for the MDP solver. While this requires access to the observation density model from the POMDP, it only increases the transition sampling complexity of the MDP solver by a factor of $\mathcal{O}(C)$, where $C$ is the number of particles. Thus, when combined with sparse sampling MDP algorithms, this approach can yield algorithms for POMDPs that have no direct theoretical dependence on the size of the state and observation spaces. In addition to our theoretical contribution, we perform five numerical experiments on benchmark POMDPs to demonstrate that a simple MDP algorithm adapted using PB-MDP approximation, Sparse-PFT, achieves performance competitive with other leading continuous observation POMDP solvers.
abstract_zh: 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 为现实世界的决策和控制问题提供了灵活的表示。然而，POMDP 是出了名的难以解决，特别是当状态和观察空间是连续或混合的时，这通常是物理系统的情况。虽然最近使用观测似然加权进行规划的基于在线采样的 POMDP 算法已显示出实际有效性，但之前尚未提出表征这些算法使用的粒子滤波技术的近似误差的一般理论。我们的主要贡献是限制任何 POMDP 与其相应的有限样本粒子置信 MDP (PB-MDP) 近似之间的误差。 PB-MDP 和 POMDP 之间的这一基本桥梁使我们能够通过求解相应的粒子置信 MDP 来将任何基于采样的 MDP 算法应用于 POMDP，从而将 MDP 算法的收敛保证扩展到 POMDP。实际上，这是通过使用粒子滤波器置信转换模型作为 MDP 求解器的生成模型来实现的。虽然这需要从 POMDP 访问观测密度模型，但它只会将 MDP 求解器的过渡采样复杂度增加 $\mathcal{O}(C)$ 倍，其中 $C$ 是粒子数。因此，当与稀疏采样 MDP 算法相结合时，该方法可以产生对状态和观察空间的大小没有直接理论上依赖的 POMDP 算法。除了我们的理论贡献之外，我们还对基准 POMDP 进行了五次数值实验，以证明使用 PB-MDP 近似（Sparse-PFT）的简单 MDP 算法可实现与其他领先的连续观察 POMDP 求解器相媲美的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的粒子信念近似方法的最优性保证，提出了粒子信念马尔可夫决策过程（PB-MDP）的误差界，并将其应用于POMDP求解。
AI.motivation: POMDP在连续或混合状态空间中难以求解，现有基于采样的在线算法缺乏对粒子滤波技术近似误差的理论分析，限制了其收敛性保证。
AI.method: 通过建立POMDP与有限样本PB-MDP近似之间的误差界，将任意采样型MDP算法扩展至POMDP，利用粒子滤波信念转移模型作为MDP求解器的生成模型。
AI.result: 理论推导了误差上界，并通过五个基准POMDP实验验证，基于PB-MDP的稀疏采样算法Sparse-PFT性能与领先求解器相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为POMDP求解提供了理论保证，通过PB-MDP桥接了MDP与POMDP，且计算复杂度仅增加与粒子数线性相关的因子，适用于高维连续空间问题。

search_text: Optimality Guarantees for Particle Belief Approximation of POMDPs POMDP 粒子置信近似的最优性保证 Partially observable Markov decision processes (POMDPs) provide a flexible representation for real-world decision and control problems. However, POMDPs are notoriously difficult to solve, especially when the state and observation spaces are continuous or hybrid, which is often the case for physical systems. While recent online sampling-based POMDP algorithms that plan with observation likelihood weighting have shown practical effectiveness, a general theory characterizing the approximation error of the particle filtering techniques that these algorithms use has not previously been proposed. Our main contribution is bounding the error between any POMDP and its corresponding finite sample particle belief MDP (PB-MDP) approximation. This fundamental bridge between PB-MDPs and POMDPs allows us to adapt any sampling-based MDP algorithm to a POMDP by solving the corresponding particle belief MDP, thereby extending the convergence guarantees of the MDP algorithm to the POMDP. Practically, this is implemented by using the particle filter belief transition model as the generative model for the MDP solver. While this requires access to the observation density model from the POMDP, it only increases the transition sampling complexity of the MDP solver by a factor of $\mathcal{O}(C)$, where $C$ is the number of particles. Thus, when combined with sparse sampling MDP algorithms, this approach can yield algorithms for POMDPs that have no direct theoretical dependence on the size of the state and observation spaces. In addition to our theoretical contribution, we perform five numerical experiments on benchmark POMDPs to demonstrate that a simple MDP algorithm adapted using PB-MDP approximation, Sparse-PFT, achieves performance competitive with other leading continuous observation POMDP solvers. 部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 为现实世界的决策和控制问题提供了灵活的表示。然而，POMDP 是出了名的难以解决，特别是当状态和观察空间是连续或混合的时，这通常是物理系统的情况。虽然最近使用观测似然加权进行规划的基于在线采样的 POMDP 算法已显示出实际有效性，但之前尚未提出表征这些算法使用的粒子滤波技术的近似误差的一般理论。我们的主要贡献是限制任何 POMDP 与其相应的有限样本粒子置信 MDP (PB-MDP) 近似之间的误差。 PB-MDP 和 POMDP 之间的这一基本桥梁使我们能够通过求解相应的粒子置信 MDP 来将任何基于采样的 MDP 算法应用于 POMDP，从而将 MDP 算法的收敛保证扩展到 POMDP。实际上，这是通过使用粒子滤波器置信转换模型作为 MDP 求解器的生成模型来实现的。虽然这需要从 POMDP 访问观测密度模型，但它只会将 MDP 求解器的过渡采样复杂度增加 $\mathcal{O}(C)$ 倍，其中 $C$ 是粒子数。因此，当与稀疏采样 MDP 算法相结合时，该方法可以产生对状态和观察空间的大小没有直接理论上依赖的 POMDP 算法。除了我们的理论贡献之外，我们还对基准 POMDP 进行了五次数值实验，以证明使用 PB-MDP 近似（Sparse-PFT）的简单 MDP 算法可实现与其他领先的连续观察 POMDP 求解器相媲美的性能。 本文研究了部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的粒子信念近似方法的最优性保证，提出了粒子信念马尔可夫决策过程（PB-MDP）的误差界，并将其应用于POMDP求解。 Michael H. Lim,Tyler J. Becker,Mykel J. Kochenderfer,Claire J. Tomlin,Zachary N. Sunberg cs.AI,cs.RO,eess.SY,stat.ML

authors_text: Kimiya Saadat,Richard Zhao
title: Exploring Adaptive MCTS with TD Learning in miniXCOM
title_zh: 在 miniXCOM 中使用 TD 学习探索自适应 MCTS
comment: ef:Proceedings of the Ninth AIIDE Workshop on Experimental Artificial Intelligence in Game (EXAG 2022)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the Ninth AIIDE Workshop on Experimental Artificial Intelligence in Game (EXAG 2022)
abstract: In recent years, Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) has achieved widespread adoption within the game community. Its use in conjunction with deep reinforcement learning has produced success stories in many applications. While these approaches have been implemented in various games, from simple board games to more complicated video games such as StarCraft, the use of deep neural networks requires a substantial training period. In this work, we explore on-line adaptivity in MCTS without requiring pre-training. We present MCTS-TD, an adaptive MCTS algorithm improved with temporal difference learning. We demonstrate our new approach on the game miniXCOM, a simplified version of XCOM, a popular commercial franchise consisting of several turn-based tactical games, and show how adaptivity in MCTS-TD allows for improved performances against opponents.
summary: In recent years, Monte Carlo tree search (MCTS) has achieved widespread adoption within the game community. Its use in conjunction with deep reinforcement learning has produced success stories in many applications. While these approaches have been implemented in various games, from simple board games to more complicated video games such as StarCraft, the use of deep neural networks requires a substantial training period. In this work, we explore on-line adaptivity in MCTS without requiring pre-training. We present MCTS-TD, an adaptive MCTS algorithm improved with temporal difference learning. We demonstrate our new approach on the game miniXCOM, a simplified version of XCOM, a popular commercial franchise consisting of several turn-based tactical games, and show how adaptivity in MCTS-TD allows for improved performances against opponents.
abstract_zh: 近年来，蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）在游戏社区中得到了广泛采用。其与深度强化学习的结合使用已经在许多应用中产生了成功的案例。虽然这些方法已在各种游戏中实现，从简单的棋盘游戏到星际争霸等更复杂的视频游戏，但深度神经网络的使用需要大量的训练时间。在这项工作中，我们探索 MCTS 中的在线自适应性，无需进行预训练。我们提出了 MCTS-TD，这是一种通过时间差异学习改进的自适应 MCTS 算法。我们在游戏 miniXCOM 上展示了我们的新方法，miniXCOM 是 XCOM 的简化版本，是一款流行的商业特许经营游戏，由多个回合制战术游戏组成，并展示了 MCTS-TD 中的自适应性如何提高对抗对手的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需预训练的自适应MCTS算法MCTS-TD，并在简化版XCOM游戏miniXCOM中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习与MCTS结合需依赖耗时的预训练，而本文旨在探索无需预训练的在线自适应方法以提升MCTS性能。
AI.method: 通过将时间差分学习（TD Learning）融入MCTS，设计自适应算法MCTS-TD，实现游戏中的动态策略调整。
AI.result: 在miniXCOM游戏中，MCTS-TD展现出优于对手的性能，验证了自适应机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MCTS-TD算法证明了无需预训练的自适应MCTS在战术游戏中的可行性，为相关领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Matin Macktoobian,Denis Gillet,Jean-Paul Kneib
title: Supervisory Coordination of Robotic Fiber Positioners in Multi-Object Spectrographs
title_zh: 多目标光谱仪中机器人光纤定位器的监督协调
comment: ef:15th IFAC Symposium on Large Scale Complex Systems (LSS 2019)
comments: ef:15th IFAC Symposium on Large Scale Complex Systems (LSS 2019)
abstract: In this paper, we solve the complete coordination problem of robotic fiber positioners using supervisory control theory. In particular, we model positioners and their behavioral specifications as discrete-event systems by the discretization of their motion spaces. We synthesize a coordination supervisor associated with a specific set of positioners. In particular, the coordination supervisor includes the solutions to the complete coordination problem of its corresponding positioners. Then, we use the backtracking forcibility technique of supervisory control theory to present an algorithm based on a completeness condition to solve the coordination problem similar to a reconfiguration problem. We illustrate the functionality of our method using an example.
summary: In this paper, we solve the complete coordination problem of robotic fiber positioners using supervisory control theory. In particular, we model positioners and their behavioral specifications as discrete-event systems by the discretization of their motion spaces. We synthesize a coordination supervisor associated with a specific set of positioners. In particular, the coordination supervisor includes the solutions to the complete coordination problem of its corresponding positioners. Then, we use the backtracking forcibility technique of supervisory control theory to present an algorithm based on a completeness condition to solve the coordination problem similar to a reconfiguration problem. We illustrate the functionality of our method using an example.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们利用监督控制理论解决了机器人光纤定位器的完整协调问题。特别是，我们通过运动空间的离散化将定位器及其行为规范建模为离散事件系统。我们综合了一个与一组特定定位器相关的协调监督器。特别地，协调管理器包括其相应定位器的完整协调问题的解决方案。然后，我们利用监督控制理论的回溯强制技术提出了一种基于完备性条件的算法来解决类似于重构问题的协调问题。我们用一个例子来说明我们方法的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文利用监督控制理论解决多目标光谱仪中机器人光纤定位器的协调问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效协调多机器人定位器的复杂运动，导致冲突和效率低下，需系统化解决方案。
AI.method: 通过离散化运动空间将定位器建模为离散事件系统，合成协调监督器并应用回溯强制技术设计算法。
AI.result: 提出的方法成功解决了定位器协调问题，并通过示例验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多目标光谱仪中的机器人定位器协调提供了理论支持和实用工具。

method: 通过离散化运动空间将定位器建模为离散事件系统，合成协调监督器并应用回溯强制技术设计算法。
result: 提出的方法成功解决了定位器协调问题，并通过示例验证了其有效性。
conclusion: 该方法为多目标光谱仪中的机器人定位器协调提供了理论支持和实用工具。
search_text: Supervisory Coordination of Robotic Fiber Positioners in Multi-Object Spectrographs 多目标光谱仪中机器人光纤定位器的监督协调 In this paper, we solve the complete coordination problem of robotic fiber positioners using supervisory control theory. In particular, we model positioners and their behavioral specifications as discrete-event systems by the discretization of their motion spaces. We synthesize a coordination supervisor associated with a specific set of positioners. In particular, the coordination supervisor includes the solutions to the complete coordination problem of its corresponding positioners. Then, we use the backtracking forcibility technique of supervisory control theory to present an algorithm based on a completeness condition to solve the coordination problem similar to a reconfiguration problem. We illustrate the functionality of our method using an example. 在本文中，我们利用监督控制理论解决了机器人光纤定位器的完整协调问题。特别是，我们通过运动空间的离散化将定位器及其行为规范建模为离散事件系统。我们综合了一个与一组特定定位器相关的协调监督器。特别地，协调管理器包括其相应定位器的完整协调问题的解决方案。然后，我们利用监督控制理论的回溯强制技术提出了一种基于完备性条件的算法来解决类似于重构问题的协调问题。我们用一个例子来说明我们方法的功能。 本文利用监督控制理论解决多目标光谱仪中机器人光纤定位器的协调问题。 Matin Macktoobian,Denis Gillet,Jean-Paul Kneib astro-ph.IM,cs.RO

authors_text: Yihang She,Goutam Bhat,Martin Danelljan,Fisher Yu
title: Fast Hierarchical Learning for Few-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: 用于少样本目标检测的快速分层学习
abstract: Transfer learning based approaches have recently achieved promising results on the few-shot detection task. These approaches however suffer from ``catastrophic forgetting'' issue due to finetuning of base detector, leading to sub-optimal performance on the base classes. Furthermore, the slow convergence rate of stochastic gradient descent (SGD) results in high latency and consequently restricts real-time applications. We tackle the aforementioned issues in this work. We pose few-shot detection as a hierarchical learning problem, where the novel classes are treated as the child classes of existing base classes and the background class. The detection heads for the novel classes are then trained using a specialized optimization strategy, leading to significantly lower training times compared to SGD. Our approach obtains competitive novel class performance on few-shot MS-COCO benchmark, while completely retaining the performance of the initial model on the base classes. We further demonstrate the application of our approach to a new class-refined few-shot detection task.
summary: Transfer learning based approaches have recently achieved promising results on the few-shot detection task. These approaches however suffer from ``catastrophic forgetting'' issue due to finetuning of base detector, leading to sub-optimal performance on the base classes. Furthermore, the slow convergence rate of stochastic gradient descent (SGD) results in high latency and consequently restricts real-time applications. We tackle the aforementioned issues in this work. We pose few-shot detection as a hierarchical learning problem, where the novel classes are treated as the child classes of existing base classes and the background class. The detection heads for the novel classes are then trained using a specialized optimization strategy, leading to significantly lower training times compared to SGD. Our approach obtains competitive novel class performance on few-shot MS-COCO benchmark, while completely retaining the performance of the initial model on the base classes. We further demonstrate the application of our approach to a new class-refined few-shot detection task.
abstract_zh: 基于迁移学习的方法最近在小样本检测任务上取得了有希望的结果。然而，由于基检测器的微调，这些方法遭受“灾难性遗忘”问题，导致基类的性能不佳。此外，随机梯度下降（SGD）的收敛速度慢，导致高延迟，从而限制了实时应用。我们在这项工作中解决了上述问题。我们将小样本检测作为一个分层学习问题，其中新类被视为现有基类和背景类的子类。然后使用专门的优化策略来训练新类别的检测头，与 SGD 相比，训练时间显着缩短。我们的方法在少样本 MS-COCO 基准上获得了有竞争力的新颖类性能，同时完全保留了基类上初始模型的性能。我们进一步展示了我们的方法在新的类别细化的少样本检测任务中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种快速分层学习方法，解决少样本目标检测中的灾难性遗忘和训练效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习方法在微调时易导致基础类别性能下降（灾难性遗忘），且SGD收敛速度慢影响实时应用。
AI.method: 将少样本检测建模为分层学习问题，将新类别作为基础类别和背景类的子类，采用专用优化策略训练检测头。
AI.result: 在few-shot MS-COCO基准测试中保持基础类别性能的同时，新类别检测效果竞争力强，并拓展至新类别精炼任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分层结构和优化策略有效缓解灾难性遗忘，显著提升训练效率，为少样本检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Peyton Chandarana,Mohammadreza Mohammadi,James Seekings,Ramtin Zand
title: Energy-Efficient Deployment of Machine Learning Workloads on Neuromorphic Hardware
title_zh: 在神经形态硬件上高效节能地部署机器学习工作负载
abstract: As the technology industry is moving towards implementing tasks such as natural language processing, path planning, image classification, and more on smaller edge computing devices, the demand for more efficient implementations of algorithms and hardware accelerators has become a significant area of research. In recent years, several edge deep learning hardware accelerators have been released that specifically focus on reducing the power and area consumed by deep neural networks (DNNs). On the other hand, spiking neural networks (SNNs) which operate on discrete time-series data, have been shown to achieve substantial power reductions over even the aforementioned edge DNN accelerators when deployed on specialized neuromorphic event-based/asynchronous hardware. While neuromorphic hardware has demonstrated great potential for accelerating deep learning tasks at the edge, the current space of algorithms and hardware is limited and still in rather early development. Thus, many hybrid approaches have been proposed which aim to convert pre-trained DNNs into SNNs. In this work, we provide a general guide to converting pre-trained DNNs into SNNs while also presenting techniques to improve the deployment of converted SNNs on neuromorphic hardware with respect to latency, power, and energy. Our experimental results show that when compared against the Intel Neural Compute Stick 2, Intel's neuromorphic processor, Loihi, consumes up to 27x less power and 5x less energy in the tested image classification tasks by using our SNN improvement techniques.
summary: As the technology industry is moving towards implementing tasks such as natural language processing, path planning, image classification, and more on smaller edge computing devices, the demand for more efficient implementations of algorithms and hardware accelerators has become a significant area of research. In recent years, several edge deep learning hardware accelerators have been released that specifically focus on reducing the power and area consumed by deep neural networks (DNNs). On the other hand, spiking neural networks (SNNs) which operate on discrete time-series data, have been shown to achieve substantial power reductions over even the aforementioned edge DNN accelerators when deployed on specialized neuromorphic event-based/asynchronous hardware. While neuromorphic hardware has demonstrated great potential for accelerating deep learning tasks at the edge, the current space of algorithms and hardware is limited and still in rather early development. Thus, many hybrid approaches have been proposed which aim to convert pre-trained DNNs into SNNs. In this work, we provide a general guide to converting pre-trained DNNs into SNNs while also presenting techniques to improve the deployment of converted SNNs on neuromorphic hardware with respect to latency, power, and energy. Our experimental results show that when compared against the Intel Neural Compute Stick 2, Intel's neuromorphic processor, Loihi, consumes up to 27x less power and 5x less energy in the tested image classification tasks by using our SNN improvement techniques.
abstract_zh: 随着技术行业正朝着在更小的边缘计算设备上实现自然语言处理、路径规划、图像分类等任务的方向发展，对更高效地实现算法和硬件加速器的需求已成为一个重要的研究领域。近年来，已经发布了多种边缘深度学习硬件加速器，专门致力于降低深度神经网络 (DNN) 消耗的功耗和面积。另一方面，事实证明，当部署在专门的基于神经形态事件/异步硬件上时，对离散时间序列数据进行操作的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 甚至比上述边缘 DNN 加速器也能实现大幅功耗降低。虽然神经形态硬件已展现出加速边缘深度学习任务的巨大潜力，但当前的算法和硬件空间有限，且仍处于相当早期的开发阶段。因此，人们提出了许多混合方法，旨在将预训练的 DNN 转换为 SNN。在这项工作中，我们提供了将预训练的 DNN 转换为 SNN 的一般指南，同时还介绍了在延迟、功率和能量方面改进转换后的 SNN 在神经形态硬件上的部署的技术。我们的实验结果表明，与英特尔神经计算棒 2 相比，通过使用我们的 SNN 改进技术，英特尔神经拟态处理器 Loihi 在测试图像分类任务中的功耗降低了 27 倍，能源消耗降低了 5 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将预训练深度神经网络（DNN）转换为脉冲神经网络（SNN）的通用方法，并介绍了提高SNN在神经形态硬件上部署效率的技术。
AI.motivation: 随着边缘计算设备对自然语言处理、路径规划和图像分类等任务的需求增加，需要更高效的算法和硬件加速器。尽管现有的边缘DNN加速器已有所改进，但基于神经形态硬件的SNN在能耗上更具优势，但相关算法和硬件仍处于早期发展阶段。
AI.method: 本文提供了一种将预训练DNN转换为SNN的通用指南，并提出了改进SNN在神经形态硬件上部署的方法，以降低延迟、功耗和能耗。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，与英特尔的神经计算棒2相比，使用本文提出的SNN优化技术，在图像分类任务中，英特尔的神经形态处理器Loihi的功耗降低了27倍，能耗降低了5倍。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了SNN在神经形态硬件上的潜力，并提供了有效的转换和优化方法，有助于推动SNN在边缘计算中的应用。

Thus, many hybrid approaches have been proposed which aim to convert pre-trained DNNs into SNNs. In this work, we provide a general guide to converting pre-trained DNNs into SNNs while also presenting techniques to improve the deployment of converted SNNs on neuromorphic hardware with respect to latency, power, and energy. Our experimental results show that when compared against the Intel Neural Compute Stick 2, Intel's neuromorphic processor, Loihi, consumes up to 27x less power and 5x less energy in the tested image classification tasks by using our SNN improvement techniques. 随着技术行业正朝着在更小的边缘计算设备上实现自然语言处理、路径规划、图像分类等任务的方向发展，对更高效地实现算法和硬件加速器的需求已成为一个重要的研究领域。近年来，已经发布了多种边缘深度学习硬件加速器，专门致力于降低深度神经网络 (DNN) 消耗的功耗和面积。另一方面，事实证明，当部署在专门的基于神经形态事件/异步硬件上时，对离散时间序列数据进行操作的尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 甚至比上述边缘 DNN 加速器也能实现大幅功耗降低。虽然神经形态硬件已展现出加速边缘深度学习任务的巨大潜力，但当前的算法和硬件空间有限，且仍处于相当早期的开发阶段。因此，人们提出了许多混合方法，旨在将预训练的 DNN 转换为 SNN。在这项工作中，我们提供了将预训练的 DNN 转换为 SNN 的一般指南，同时还介绍了在延迟、功率和能量方面改进转换后的 SNN 在神经形态硬件上的部署的技术。我们的实验结果表明，与英特尔神经计算棒 2 相比，通过使用我们的 SNN 改进技术，英特尔神经拟态处理器 Loihi 在测试图像分类任务中的功耗降低了 27 倍，能源消耗降低了 5 倍。 本文提出了一种将预训练深度神经网络（DNN）转换为脉冲神经网络（SNN）的通用方法，并介绍了提高SNN在神经形态硬件上部署效率的技术。 Peyton Chandarana,Mohammadreza Mohammadi,James Seekings,Ramtin Zand cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.ET,cs.NE

authors_text: Pavithiran G,Sharan Padmanabhan,Ashwin Kumar BR,Vetriselvi A
title: Social Media Personal Event Notifier Using NLP and Machine Learning
title_zh: 使用 NLP 和机器学习的社交媒体个人事件通知程序
abstract: Social media apps have become very promising and omnipresent in daily life. Most social media apps are used to deliver vital information to those nearby and far away. As our lives become more hectic, many of us strive to limit our usage of social media apps because they are too addictive, and the majority of us have gotten preoccupied with our daily lives. Because of this, we frequently overlook crucial information, such as invitations to weddings, interviews, birthday parties, etc., or find ourselves unable to attend the event. In most cases, this happens because users are more likely to discover the invitation or information only before the event, giving them little time to prepare. To solve this issue, in this study, we created a system that will collect social media chat and filter it using Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods like Tokenization, Stop Words Removal, Lemmatization, Segmentation, and Named Entity Recognition (NER). Also, Machine Learning Algorithms such as K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) Algorithm are implemented to prioritize the received invitation and to sort the level of priority. Finally, a customized notification will be delivered to the users where they acknowledge the upcoming event. So, the chances of missing the event are less or can be planned.
summary: Social media apps have become very promising and omnipresent in daily life. Most social media apps are used to deliver vital information to those nearby and far away. As our lives become more hectic, many of us strive to limit our usage of social media apps because they are too addictive, and the majority of us have gotten preoccupied with our daily lives. Because of this, we frequently overlook crucial information, such as invitations to weddings, interviews, birthday parties, etc., or find ourselves unable to attend the event. In most cases, this happens because users are more likely to discover the invitation or information only before the event, giving them little time to prepare. To solve this issue, in this study, we created a system that will collect social media chat and filter it using Natural Language Processing (NLP) methods like Tokenization, Stop Words Removal, Lemmatization, Segmentation, and Named Entity Recognition (NER). Also, Machine Learning Algorithms such as K-Nearest Neighbor (KNN) Algorithm are implemented to prioritize the received invitation and to sort the level of priority. Finally, a customized notification will be delivered to the users where they acknowledge the upcoming event. So, the chances of missing the event are less or can be planned.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体应用程序已经变得非常有前途并且在日常生活中无处不在。大多数社交媒体应用程序用于向附近和远处的人传递重要信息。随着我们的生活变得更加忙碌，我们中的许多人都努力限制社交媒体应用程序的使用，因为它们太容易上瘾，而且我们大多数人都专注于我们的日常生活。因此，我们经常忽略重要信息，例如婚礼邀请函、采访、生日聚会等，或者发现自己无法参加活动。在大多数情况下，发生这种情况是因为用户更有可能在活动之前才发现邀请或信息，从而几乎没有时间进行准备。为了解决这个问题，在本研究中，我们创建了一个系统，该系统将收集社交媒体聊天并使用自然语言处理 (NLP) 方法（如标记化、停用词删除、词形还原、分割和命名实体识别 (NER)）对其进行过滤。此外，还实施了 K 最近邻 (KNN) 算法等机器学习算法来对收到的邀请进行优先级排序并对优先级进行排序。最后，将向用户发送定制通知，让他们确认即将发生的事件。因此，错过该活动的可能性较小或可以计划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然语言处理和机器学习的社交媒体个人事件提醒系统，旨在帮助用户及时获取重要活动通知。
AI.motivation: 由于社交媒体信息过载和用户注意力分散，人们常因未能及时发现婚礼邀请、面试通知等关键信息而错过重要事件。
AI.method: 采用分词、停用词去除、词形还原、命名实体识别等NLP技术处理聊天数据，结合K近邻算法对事件优先级进行分类排序，并推送定制化提醒。
AI.result: 系统能有效过滤社交媒体信息，按优先级排序并提前通知用户即将发生的事件，降低错过事件的概率。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过智能信息筛选和优先级排序机制，为用户提供及时的事件提醒服务，有助于提升生活规划效率。

authors_text: Kelin Luo,Alexandre M. Florio,Syamantak Das,Xiangyu Guo
title: A Hierarchical Grouping Algorithm for the Multi-Vehicle Dial-a-Ride Problem
title_zh: 多车叫车问题的分层分组算法
abstract: Ride-sharing is an essential aspect of modern urban mobility. In this paper, we consider a classical problem in ride-sharing - the Multi-Vehicle Dial-a-Ride Problem (Multi-Vehicle DaRP). Given a fleet of vehicles with a fixed capacity stationed at various locations and a set of ride requests specified by origins and destinations, the goal is to serve all requests such that no vehicle is assigned more passengers than its capacity at any point along its trip. We propose an algorithm HRA, which is the first non-trivial approximation algorithm for the Multi-Vehicle DaRP. The main technical contribution is to reduce the Multi-Vehicle DaRP to a certain capacitated partitioning problem, which we solve using a novel hierarchical grouping algorithm. Experimental results show that the vehicle routes produced by our algorithm not only exhibit less total travel distance compared to state-of-the-art baselines, but also enjoy a small in-transit latency, which crucially relates to riders' traveling times. This suggests that HRA enhances rider experience while being energy-efficient.
summary: Ride-sharing is an essential aspect of modern urban mobility. In this paper, we consider a classical problem in ride-sharing - the Multi-Vehicle Dial-a-Ride Problem (Multi-Vehicle DaRP). Given a fleet of vehicles with a fixed capacity stationed at various locations and a set of ride requests specified by origins and destinations, the goal is to serve all requests such that no vehicle is assigned more passengers than its capacity at any point along its trip. We propose an algorithm HRA, which is the first non-trivial approximation algorithm for the Multi-Vehicle DaRP. The main technical contribution is to reduce the Multi-Vehicle DaRP to a certain capacitated partitioning problem, which we solve using a novel hierarchical grouping algorithm. Experimental results show that the vehicle routes produced by our algorithm not only exhibit less total travel distance compared to state-of-the-art baselines, but also enjoy a small in-transit latency, which crucially relates to riders' traveling times. This suggests that HRA enhances rider experience while being energy-efficient.
abstract_zh: 乘车共享是现代城市交通的一个重要方面。在本文中，我们考虑乘车共享中的一个经典问题 - 多车辆拨号问题（多车辆 DaRP）。给定驻扎在不同地点的具有固定容量的车队以及由出发地和目的地指定的一组乘车请求，目标是满足所有请求，使得没有车辆在其行程中的任何点分配的乘客数量超过其容量。我们提出了一种算法 HRA，这是第一个针对多车辆 DaRP 的非平凡近似算法。主要技术贡献是将多车辆 DaRP 简化为某个有能力的分区问题，我们使用一种新颖的分层分组算法来解决该问题。实验结果表明，与最先进的基线相比，我们的算法生成的车辆路线不仅表现出更短的总行驶距离，而且还具有较小的运输延迟，这与乘客的行驶时间密切相关。这表明 HRA 在提高能源效率的同时增强了骑手体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层分组算法HRA，用于解决多车辆拨号接送问题（Multi-Vehicle DaRP），以优化共享出行路线。
AI.motivation: 共享出行是现代城市交通的重要组成部分，但现有方法难以在满足车辆容量约束的同时兼顾行驶距离和乘客等待时间，亟需更高效的算法。
AI.method: 将多车辆拨号接送问题转化为容量划分问题，设计分层分组算法HRA，通过分层聚类策略分配乘客请求并生成车辆路径。
AI.result: 实验表明，HRA生成的路线总行驶距离短于现有方法，且乘客在途等待时间更短，提升了出行体验并降低能耗。
AI.conclusion: HRA通过分层分组策略有效解决了多车辆容量约束下的路径规划问题，在效率与用户体验间取得平衡。

authors_text: Nikita Dvornik,Isma Hadji,Hai Pham,Dhaivat Bhatt,Brais Martinez,Afsaneh Fazly,Allan D. Jepson
title: Graph2Vid: Flow graph to Video Grounding for Weakly-supervised Multi-Step Localization
title_zh: Graph2Vid：用于弱监督多步骤定位的视频接地流程图
abstract: In this work, we consider the problem of weakly-supervised multi-step localization in instructional videos. An established approach to this problem is to rely on a given list of steps. However, in reality, there is often more than one way to execute a procedure successfully, by following the set of steps in slightly varying orders. Thus, for successful localization in a given video, recent works require the actual order of procedure steps in the video, to be provided by human annotators at both training and test times. Instead, here, we only rely on generic procedural text that is not tied to a specific video. We represent the various ways to complete the procedure by transforming the list of instructions into a procedure flow graph which captures the partial order of steps. Using the flow graphs reduces both training and test time annotation requirements. To this end, we introduce the new problem of flow graph to video grounding. In this setup, we seek the optimal step ordering consistent with the procedure flow graph and a given video. To solve this problem, we propose a new algorithm - Graph2Vid - that infers the actual ordering of steps in the video and simultaneously localizes them. To show the advantage of our proposed formulation, we extend the CrossTask dataset with procedure flow graph information. Our experiments show that Graph2Vid is both more efficient than the baselines and yields strong step localization results, without the need for step order annotation.
summary: In this work, we consider the problem of weakly-supervised multi-step localization in instructional videos. An established approach to this problem is to rely on a given list of steps. However, in reality, there is often more than one way to execute a procedure successfully, by following the set of steps in slightly varying orders. Thus, for successful localization in a given video, recent works require the actual order of procedure steps in the video, to be provided by human annotators at both training and test times. Instead, here, we only rely on generic procedural text that is not tied to a specific video. We represent the various ways to complete the procedure by transforming the list of instructions into a procedure flow graph which captures the partial order of steps. Using the flow graphs reduces both training and test time annotation requirements. To this end, we introduce the new problem of flow graph to video grounding. In this setup, we seek the optimal step ordering consistent with the procedure flow graph and a given video. To solve this problem, we propose a new algorithm - Graph2Vid - that infers the actual ordering of steps in the video and simultaneously localizes them. To show the advantage of our proposed formulation, we extend the CrossTask dataset with procedure flow graph information. Our experiments show that Graph2Vid is both more efficient than the baselines and yields strong step localization results, without the need for step order annotation.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑教学视频中弱监督多步骤定位的问题。解决此问题的既定方法是依赖给定的步骤列表。然而，实际上，通常有不止一种方法可以成功执行过程，只需按照稍微不同的顺序执行一组步骤即可。因此，为了在给定视频中成功定位，最近的工作需要视频中程序步骤的实际顺序，由人类注释者在训练和测试时提供。相反，在这里，我们仅依赖于与特定视频无关的通用程序文本。我们通过将指令列表转换为捕获步骤的部分顺序的过程流程图来表示完成该过程的各种方法。使用流程图可以减少训练和测试时间注释的要求。为此，我们将流程图引入视频接地的新问题。在此设置中，我们寻求与程序流程图和给定视频一致的最佳步骤顺序。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新算法 - Graph2Vid - 它可以推断视频中步骤的实际顺序并同时定位它们。为了展示我们提出的公式的优点，我们使用过程流程图信息扩展了 CrossTask 数据集。我们的实验表明，Graph2Vid 比基线更有效，并且可以产生强大的步骤定位结果，而无需步骤顺序注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Graph2Vid方法，通过将通用步骤文本转化为流程图，在弱监督条件下实现教学视频中多步骤的定位，无需人工标注具体步骤顺序。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖人工标注的固定步骤顺序，但实际操作中步骤执行顺序可能存在变化，导致标注成本高且灵活性差。
AI.method: 构建步骤流程图表示部分顺序关系，设计Graph2Vid算法同时推断视频中步骤的最优顺序并完成定位，扩展CrossTask数据集加入流程图信息。
AI.result: 实验表明Graph2Vid在无需步骤顺序标注的情况下，相比基线方法更高效且定位效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过流程图建模有效降低标注需求，在弱监督场景下实现了准确的多步骤视频定位。

authors_text: Shubham Sharma,Jette Henderson,Joydeep Ghosh
title: FEAMOE: Fair, Explainable and Adaptive Mixture of Experts
title_zh: FEAMOE：公平、可解释且适应性强的专家组合
abstract: Three key properties that are desired of trustworthy machine learning models deployed in high-stakes environments are fairness, explainability, and an ability to account for various kinds of "drift". While drifts in model accuracy, for example due to covariate shift, have been widely investigated, drifts in fairness metrics over time remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose FEAMOE, a novel "mixture-of-experts" inspired framework aimed at learning fairer, more explainable/interpretable models that can also rapidly adjust to drifts in both the accuracy and the fairness of a classifier. We illustrate our framework for three popular fairness measures and demonstrate how drift can be handled with respect to these fairness constraints. Experiments on multiple datasets show that our framework as applied to a mixture of linear experts is able to perform comparably to neural networks in terms of accuracy while producing fairer models. We then use the large-scale HMDA dataset and show that while various models trained on HMDA demonstrate drift with respect to both accuracy and fairness, FEAMOE can ably handle these drifts with respect to all the considered fairness measures and maintain model accuracy as well. We also prove that the proposed framework allows for producing fast Shapley value explanations, which makes computationally efficient feature attribution based explanations of model decisions readily available via FEAMOE.
summary: Three key properties that are desired of trustworthy machine learning models deployed in high-stakes environments are fairness, explainability, and an ability to account for various kinds of "drift". While drifts in model accuracy, for example due to covariate shift, have been widely investigated, drifts in fairness metrics over time remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we propose FEAMOE, a novel "mixture-of-experts" inspired framework aimed at learning fairer, more explainable/interpretable models that can also rapidly adjust to drifts in both the accuracy and the fairness of a classifier. We illustrate our framework for three popular fairness measures and demonstrate how drift can be handled with respect to these fairness constraints. Experiments on multiple datasets show that our framework as applied to a mixture of linear experts is able to perform comparably to neural networks in terms of accuracy while producing fairer models. We then use the large-scale HMDA dataset and show that while various models trained on HMDA demonstrate drift with respect to both accuracy and fairness, FEAMOE can ably handle these drifts with respect to all the considered fairness measures and maintain model accuracy as well. We also prove that the proposed framework allows for producing fast Shapley value explanations, which makes computationally efficient feature attribution based explanations of model decisions readily available via FEAMOE.
abstract_zh: 在高风险环境中部署的值得信赖的机器学习模型所需的三个关键属性是公平性、可解释性以及解释各种“漂移”的能力。虽然模型准确性的漂移（例如由于协变量偏移而导致的漂移）已被广泛研究，但公平性指标随时间的漂移在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在本文中，我们提出了 FEAMOE，这是一种新颖的“专家混合”框架，旨在学习更公平、更可解释/可解释的模型，该模型还可以快速调整以适应分类器准确性和公平性的偏差。我们说明了三种流行的公平性衡量标准的框架，并演示了如何处理这些公平性约束的偏差。对多个数据集的实验表明，我们的框架应用于线性专家的混合，能够在准确度方面与神经网络相媲美，同时生成更公平的模型。然后，我们使用大规模 HMDA 数据集并表明，虽然在 HMDA 上训练的各种模型在准确性和公平性方面都表现出漂移，但 FEAMOE 可以巧妙地处理所有考虑的公平性度量方面的这些漂移并保持模型准确性。我们还证明，所提出的框架允许生成快速的 Shapley 值解释，这使得可以通过 FEAMOE 轻松获得基于计算高效的特征归因的模型决策解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FEAMOE框架，旨在构建公平、可解释且能适应数据漂移的机器学习模型。
AI.motivation: 高风险场景下的机器学习模型需兼顾公平性、可解释性及对准确性和公平性漂移的适应能力，但现有研究对公平性漂移关注不足。
AI.method: 基于混合专家架构设计FEAMOE，结合公平性约束与动态调整机制，并利用Shapley值实现高效解释。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，FEAMOE在保持神经网络级准确性的同时生成更公平的模型，且有效应对HMDA数据集中的漂移问题。
AI.conclusion: FEAMOE成功融合公平性、可解释性与适应性，为高风险场景提供了可靠的机器学习解决方案。

authors_text: Javier Antorán,Shreyas Padhy,Riccardo Barbano,Eric Nalisnick,David Janz,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato
title: Sampling-based inference for large linear models, with application to linearised Laplace
title_zh: 针对大型线性模型的基于采样的推理，并应用于线性化拉普拉斯
comment: Published at ICLR 2023. This latest Arxiv version is extended with a demonstration of the proposed methods on the Imagenet dataset
comments: Published at ICLR 2023. This latest Arxiv version is extended with a demonstration of the proposed methods on the Imagenet dataset
abstract: Large-scale linear models are ubiquitous throughout machine learning, with contemporary application as surrogate models for neural network uncertainty quantification; that is, the linearised Laplace method. Alas, the computational cost associated with Bayesian linear models constrains this method's application to small networks, small output spaces and small datasets. We address this limitation by introducing a scalable sample-based Bayesian inference method for conjugate Gaussian multi-output linear models, together with a matching method for hyperparameter (regularisation) selection. Furthermore, we use a classic feature normalisation method (the g-prior) to resolve a previously highlighted pathology of the linearised Laplace method. Together, these contributions allow us to perform linearised neural network inference with ResNet-18 on CIFAR100 (11M parameters, 100 outputs x 50k datapoints), with ResNet-50 on Imagenet (50M parameters, 1000 outputs x 1.2M datapoints) and with a U-Net on a high-resolution tomographic reconstruction task (2M parameters, 251k output~dimensions).
summary: Large-scale linear models are ubiquitous throughout machine learning, with contemporary application as surrogate models for neural network uncertainty quantification; that is, the linearised Laplace method. Alas, the computational cost associated with Bayesian linear models constrains this method's application to small networks, small output spaces and small datasets. We address this limitation by introducing a scalable sample-based Bayesian inference method for conjugate Gaussian multi-output linear models, together with a matching method for hyperparameter (regularisation) selection. Furthermore, we use a classic feature normalisation method (the g-prior) to resolve a previously highlighted pathology of the linearised Laplace method. Together, these contributions allow us to perform linearised neural network inference with ResNet-18 on CIFAR100 (11M parameters, 100 outputs x 50k datapoints), with ResNet-50 on Imagenet (50M parameters, 1000 outputs x 1.2M datapoints) and with a U-Net on a high-resolution tomographic reconstruction task (2M parameters, 251k output~dimensions).
abstract_zh: 大规模线性模型在整个机器学习中无处不在，当代应用作为神经网络不确定性量化的替代模型；即线性拉普拉斯方法。遗憾的是，与贝叶斯线性模型相关的计算成本限制了该方法在小型网络、小型输出空间和小型数据集上的应用。我们通过引入用于共轭高斯多输出线性模型的可扩展的基于样本的贝叶斯推理方法以及用于超参数（正则化）选择的匹配方法来解决这一限制。此外，我们使用经典的特征归一化方法（g-prior）来解决先前强调的线性拉普拉斯方法的病理学问题。总之，这些贡献使我们能够在 CIFAR100（11M 参数、100 个输出 x 50k 数据点）上使用 ResNet-18、在 Imagenet 上使用 ResNet-50（50M 参数、1000 个输出 x 120 万个数据点）以及在高分辨率断层扫描重建任务（2M 参数、251k 输出维）上使用 U-Net 执行线性化神经网络推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于采样的可扩展贝叶斯推断方法，用于大规模线性模型，特别是线性化拉普拉斯方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的贝叶斯线性模型计算成本高，限制了其在大规模网络、大规模输出空间和大规模数据集上的应用。
AI.method: 引入了一种基于采样的贝叶斯推断方法，用于共轭高斯多输出线性模型，并结合了经典的特征归一化方法(g-prior)以解决线性化拉普拉斯方法的病理问题。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于ResNet-18在CIFAR100、ResNet-50在ImageNet以及U-Net在高分辨率断层扫描重建任务上的线性化神经网络推断。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了大规模线性模型的计算瓶颈，使得线性化拉普拉斯方法适用于更广泛的场景。

search_text: Sampling-based inference for large linear models, with application to linearised Laplace 针对大型线性模型的基于采样的推理，并应用于线性化拉普拉斯 Large-scale linear models are ubiquitous throughout machine learning, with contemporary application as surrogate models for neural network uncertainty quantification; that is, the linearised Laplace method. Alas, the computational cost associated with Bayesian linear models constrains this method's application to small networks, small output spaces and small datasets. We address this limitation by introducing a scalable sample-based Bayesian inference method for conjugate Gaussian multi-output linear models, together with a matching method for hyperparameter (regularisation) selection. Furthermore, we use a classic feature normalisation method (the g-prior) to resolve a previously highlighted pathology of the linearised Laplace method. Together, these contributions allow us to perform linearised neural network inference with ResNet-18 on CIFAR100 (11M parameters, 100 outputs x 50k datapoints), with ResNet-50 on Imagenet (50M parameters, 1000 outputs x 1.2M datapoints) and with a U-Net on a high-resolution tomographic reconstruction task (2M parameters, 251k output~dimensions). 大规模线性模型在整个机器学习中无处不在，当代应用作为神经网络不确定性量化的替代模型；即线性拉普拉斯方法。遗憾的是，与贝叶斯线性模型相关的计算成本限制了该方法在小型网络、小型输出空间和小型数据集上的应用。我们通过引入用于共轭高斯多输出线性模型的可扩展的基于样本的贝叶斯推理方法以及用于超参数（正则化）选择的匹配方法来解决这一限制。此外，我们使用经典的特征归一化方法（g-prior）来解决先前强调的线性拉普拉斯方法的病理学问题。总之，这些贡献使我们能够在 CIFAR100（11M 参数、100 个输出 x 50k 数据点）上使用 ResNet-18、在 Imagenet 上使用 ResNet-50（50M 参数、1000 个输出 x 120 万个数据点）以及在高分辨率断层扫描重建任务（2M 参数、251k 输出维）上使用 U-Net 执行线性化神经网络推理。 本文提出了一种基于采样的可扩展贝叶斯推断方法，用于大规模线性模型，特别是线性化拉普拉斯方法。 Javier Antorán,Shreyas Padhy,Riccardo Barbano,Eric Nalisnick,David Janz,José Miguel Hernández-Lobato stat.ML,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhiqiu Lin,Deepak Pathak,Yu-Xiong Wang,Deva Ramanan,Shu Kong
title: Continual Learning with Evolving Class Ontologies
title_zh: 通过不断发展的类本体进行持续学习
abstract: Lifelong learners must recognize concept vocabularies that evolve over time. A common yet underexplored scenario is learning with class labels that continually refine/expand old classes. For example, humans learn to recognize ${\tt dog}$ before dog breeds. In practical settings, dataset $\textit{versioning}$ often introduces refinement to ontologies, such as autonomous vehicle benchmarks that refine a previous ${\tt vehicle}$ class into ${\tt school-bus}$ as autonomous operations expand to new cities. This paper formalizes a protocol for studying the problem of $\textit{Learning with Evolving Class Ontology}$ (LECO). LECO requires learning classifiers in distinct time periods (TPs); each TP introduces a new ontology of "fine" labels that refines old ontologies of "coarse" labels (e.g., dog breeds that refine the previous ${\tt dog}$). LECO explores such questions as whether to annotate new data or relabel the old, how to leverage coarse labels, and whether to finetune the previous TP's model or train from scratch. To answer these questions, we leverage insights from related problems such as class-incremental learning. We validate them under the LECO protocol through the lens of image classification (CIFAR and iNaturalist) and semantic segmentation (Mapillary). Our experiments lead to surprising conclusions; while the current status quo is to relabel existing datasets with new ontologies (such as COCO-to-LVIS or Mapillary1.2-to-2.0), LECO demonstrates that a far better strategy is to annotate $\textit{new}$ data with the new ontology. However, this produces an aggregate dataset with inconsistent old-vs-new labels, complicating learning. To address this challenge, we adopt methods from semi-supervised and partial-label learning. Such strategies can surprisingly be made near-optimal, approaching an "oracle" that learns on the aggregate dataset exhaustively labeled with the newest ontology.

LECO explores such questions as whether to annotate new data or relabel the old, how to leverage coarse labels, and whether to finetune the previous TP's model or train from scratch. To answer these questions, we leverage insights from related problems such as class-incremental learning. We validate them under the LECO protocol through the lens of image classification (CIFAR and iNaturalist) and semantic segmentation (Mapillary). Our experiments lead to surprising conclusions; while the current status quo is to relabel existing datasets with new ontologies (such as COCO-to-LVIS or Mapillary1.2-to-2.0), LECO demonstrates that a far better strategy is to annotate $\textit{new}$ data with the new ontology. However, this produces an aggregate dataset with inconsistent old-vs-new labels, complicating learning. To address this challenge, we adopt methods from semi-supervised and partial-label learning. Such strategies can surprisingly be made near-optimal, approaching an "oracle" that learns on the aggregate dataset exhaustively labeled with the newest ontology.
abstract_zh: 终身学习者必须认识随着时间的推移而演变的概念词汇。一个常见但尚未充分探索的场景是使用不断完善/扩展旧类的类标签进行学习。例如，人类在狗繁殖之前就学会了识别${\tt狗}$。在实际设置中，数据集 $\textit{versioning}$ 通常会引入对本体的细化，例如随着自动驾驶业务扩展到新城市，自动驾驶汽车基准将之前的 ${\tt 汽车}$ 类细化为 ${\tt school-bus}$ 。本文形式化了一个用于研究 $\textit{Learning with Evolving Class Ontology}$ (LECO) 问题的协议。 LECO需要在不同的时间段（TP）学习分类器；每个 TP 引入了一个新的“精细”标签本体，该本体改进了“粗略”标签的旧本体（例如，改进了之前的 ${\tt 狗}$ 的狗品种）。 LECO 探索了诸如是否注释新数据或重新标记旧数据、如何利用粗标签以及是否微调之前的 TP 模型或从头开始训练等问题。为了回答这些问题，我们利用了相关问题（例如班级增量学习）的见解。我们通过图像分类（CIFAR 和 iNaturalist）和语义分割（Mapillary）的镜头在 LECO 协议下验证它们。我们的实验得出了令人惊讶的结论；虽然目前的现状是用新的本体（例如 COCO-to-LVIS 或 Mapillary1.2-to-2.0）重新标记现有数据集，但 LECO 证明更好的策略是用新的本体注释 $\textit{new}$ 数据。然而，这会产生一个新旧标签不一致的聚合数据集，使学习变得复杂。为了应对这一挑战，我们采用半监督和部分标签学习的方法。令人惊讶的是，此类策略可以接近最优，接近“预言机”，该“预言机”在用最新本体进行详尽标记的聚合数据集上进行学习。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在类标签持续细化/扩展的场景下的持续学习问题，提出了学习演化类本体（LECO）的协议，探讨如何有效处理新旧标签不一致的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现实中的数据集版本更新常引入类标签的细化（如将'车辆'细化为'校车'），但现有方法多依赖重新标注旧数据，导致标签不一致且效果有限，需探索更优策略。
AI.method: 通过形式化LECO协议，结合半监督学习和部分标签学习方法，验证在图像分类（CIFAR、iNaturalist）和语义分割（Mapillary）任务中，标注新数据而非重新标注旧数据的策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，标注新数据并采用半监督策略可接近理想标注效果，显著优于传统重新标注方法，即使新旧标签不一致也能实现近似最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 演化类本体学习应优先标注新数据并结合半监督方法，而非单纯依赖旧数据重标注，这为持续学习场景下的动态标签管理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haoyu Wang,Hongming Zhang,Yuqian Deng,Jacob R. Gardner,Dan Roth,Muhao Chen
title: Extracting or Guessing? Improving Faithfulness of Event Temporal Relation Extraction
title_zh: 提取还是猜测？提高事件时间关系提取的可信度
abstract: In this paper, we seek to improve the faithfulness of TempRel extraction models from two perspectives. The first perspective is to extract genuinely based on contextual description. To achieve this, we propose to conduct counterfactual analysis to attenuate the effects of two significant types of training biases: the event trigger bias and the frequent label bias. We also add tense information into event representations to explicitly place an emphasis on the contextual description. The second perspective is to provide proper uncertainty estimation and abstain from extraction when no relation is described in the text. By parameterization of Dirichlet Prior over the model-predicted categorical distribution, we improve the model estimates of the correctness likelihood and make TempRel predictions more selective. We also employ temperature scaling to recalibrate the model confidence measure after bias mitigation. Through experimental analysis on MATRES, MATRES-DS, and TDDiscourse, we demonstrate that our model extracts TempRel and timelines more faithfully compared to SOTA methods, especially under distribution shifts.
summary: In this paper, we seek to improve the faithfulness of TempRel extraction models from two perspectives. The first perspective is to extract genuinely based on contextual description. To achieve this, we propose to conduct counterfactual analysis to attenuate the effects of two significant types of training biases: the event trigger bias and the frequent label bias. We also add tense information into event representations to explicitly place an emphasis on the contextual description. The second perspective is to provide proper uncertainty estimation and abstain from extraction when no relation is described in the text. By parameterization of Dirichlet Prior over the model-predicted categorical distribution, we improve the model estimates of the correctness likelihood and make TempRel predictions more selective. We also employ temperature scaling to recalibrate the model confidence measure after bias mitigation. Through experimental analysis on MATRES, MATRES-DS, and TDDiscourse, we demonstrate that our model extracts TempRel and timelines more faithfully compared to SOTA methods, especially under distribution shifts.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们寻求从两个角度提高 TempRel 提取模型的可信度。第一个视角是根据上下文描述进行真实提取。为了实现这一目标，我们建议进行反事实分析，以减弱两种重要类型的训练偏差的影响：事件触发偏差和频繁标签偏差。我们还将时态信息添加到事件表示中，以明确强调上下文描述。第二个角度是提供适当的不确定性估计，并在文本中没有描述关系时放弃提取。通过对模型预测的分类分布进行 Dirichlet Prior 参数化，我们改进了正确性可能性的模型估计，并使 TempRel 预测更具选择性。我们还采用温度缩放来在偏差缓解后重新校准模型置信度测量。通过对 MATRES、MATRES-DS 和 TDDiscourse 的实验分析，我们证明我们的模型比 SOTA 方法更忠实地提取 TempRel 和时间线，特别是在分布变化的情况下。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从两个角度提升事件时间关系抽取模型的忠实度：基于上下文描述的真实抽取及不确定性估计下的选择性抽取。
AI.motivation: 现有模型存在训练偏差（如事件触发词偏差和高频标签偏差）及缺乏不确定性估计，导致在分布变化下抽取结果不忠实。
AI.method: 通过反事实分析削弱训练偏差并引入时态信息强化上下文描述；利用狄利克雷先验参数化和温度缩放优化不确定性估计与置信度校准。
AI.result: 在MATRES、MATRES-DS和TDDiscourse数据集上验证，模型在分布偏移场景下比SOTA方法更忠实抽取时间关系及时间线。

search_text: Extracting or Guessing? Improving Faithfulness of Event Temporal Relation Extraction 提取还是猜测？提高事件时间关系提取的可信度 In this paper, we seek to improve the faithfulness of TempRel extraction models from two perspectives. The first perspective is to extract genuinely based on contextual description. To achieve this, we propose to conduct counterfactual analysis to attenuate the effects of two significant types of training biases: the event trigger bias and the frequent label bias. We also add tense information into event representations to explicitly place an emphasis on the contextual description. The second perspective is to provide proper uncertainty estimation and abstain from extraction when no relation is described in the text. By parameterization of Dirichlet Prior over the model-predicted categorical distribution, we improve the model estimates of the correctness likelihood and make TempRel predictions more selective. We also employ temperature scaling to recalibrate the model confidence measure after bias mitigation. Through experimental analysis on MATRES, MATRES-DS, and TDDiscourse, we demonstrate that our model extracts TempRel and timelines more faithfully compared to SOTA methods, especially under distribution shifts. 在本文中，我们寻求从两个角度提高 TempRel 提取模型的可信度。第一个视角是根据上下文描述进行真实提取。为了实现这一目标，我们建议进行反事实分析，以减弱两种重要类型的训练偏差的影响：事件触发偏差和频繁标签偏差。我们还将时态信息添加到事件表示中，以明确强调上下文描述。第二个角度是提供适当的不确定性估计，并在文本中没有描述关系时放弃提取。通过对模型预测的分类分布进行 Dirichlet Prior 参数化，我们改进了正确性可能性的模型估计，并使 TempRel 预测更具选择性。我们还采用温度缩放来在偏差缓解后重新校准模型置信度测量。通过对 MATRES、MATRES-DS 和 TDDiscourse 的实验分析，我们证明我们的模型比 SOTA 方法更忠实地提取 TempRel 和时间线，特别是在分布变化的情况下。 本文旨在从两个角度提升事件时间关系抽取模型的忠实度：基于上下文描述的真实抽取及不确定性估计下的选择性抽取。 Haoyu Wang,Hongming Zhang,Yuqian Deng,Jacob R. Gardner,Dan Roth,Muhao Chen cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Robert Chuchro
title: Simulating Coverage Path Planning with Roomba
title_zh: 使用 Roomba 模拟覆盖路径规划
abstract: Coverage Path Planning involves visiting every unoccupied state in an environment with obstacles. In this paper, we explore this problem in environments which are initially unknown to the agent, for purposes of simulating the task of a vacuum cleaning robot. A survey of prior work reveals sparse effort in applying learning to solve this problem. In this paper, we explore modeling a Cover Path Planning problem using Deep Reinforcement Learning, and compare it with the performance of the built-in algorithm of the Roomba, a popular vacuum cleaning robot.
summary: Coverage Path Planning involves visiting every unoccupied state in an environment with obstacles. In this paper, we explore this problem in environments which are initially unknown to the agent, for purposes of simulating the task of a vacuum cleaning robot. A survey of prior work reveals sparse effort in applying learning to solve this problem. In this paper, we explore modeling a Cover Path Planning problem using Deep Reinforcement Learning, and compare it with the performance of the built-in algorithm of the Roomba, a popular vacuum cleaning robot.
abstract_zh: 覆盖路径规划涉及访问有障碍物的环境中的每个未被占用的状态。在本文中，我们在代理最初未知的环境中探索这个问题，以模拟真空清洁机器人的任务。对先前工作的调查表明，应用学习来解决这个问题的努力很少。在本文中，我们探索使用深度强化学习对覆盖路径规划问题进行建模，并将其与流行的真空清洁机器人 Roomba 的内置算法的性能进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过深度强化学习模拟覆盖路径规划，并与Roomba内置算法进行性能比较。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在应用学习方法解决覆盖路径规划问题上较为匮乏，且需验证深度强化学习在模拟吸尘机器人路径规划中的有效性。
AI.method: 采用深度强化学习方法建模覆盖路径规划问题，并通过仿真环境对比实验验证其与Roomba内置算法的性能差异。
AI.result: 实验结果表明深度强化学习方法在未知环境中实现更高效的路径规划，但具体性能需进一步验证。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习在覆盖路径规划中展现出潜力，但需更多研究以优化其实际应用效果。

authors_text: Peimeng Guan,Jihui Jin,Justin Romberg,Mark A. Davenport
title: Loop Unrolled Shallow Equilibrium Regularizer (LUSER) -- A Memory-Efficient Inverse Problem Solver
title_zh: 循环展开浅均衡正则化器 (LUSER)——一种内存高效的逆问题求解器
abstract: In inverse problems we aim to reconstruct some underlying signal of interest from potentially corrupted and often ill-posed measurements. Classical optimization-based techniques proceed by optimizing a data consistency metric together with a regularizer. Current state-of-the-art machine learning approaches draw inspiration from such techniques by unrolling the iterative updates for an optimization-based solver and then learning a regularizer from data. This loop unrolling (LU) method has shown tremendous success, but often requires a deep model for the best performance leading to high memory costs during training. Thus, to address the balance between computation cost and network expressiveness, we propose an LU algorithm with shallow equilibrium regularizers (LUSER). These implicit models are as expressive as deeper convolutional networks, but far more memory efficient during training. The proposed method is evaluated on image deblurring, computed tomography (CT), as well as single-coil Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) tasks and shows similar, or even better, performance while requiring up to 8 times less computational resources during training when compared against a more typical LU architecture with feedforward convolutional regularizers.
summary: In inverse problems we aim to reconstruct some underlying signal of interest from potentially corrupted and often ill-posed measurements. Classical optimization-based techniques proceed by optimizing a data consistency metric together with a regularizer. Current state-of-the-art machine learning approaches draw inspiration from such techniques by unrolling the iterative updates for an optimization-based solver and then learning a regularizer from data. This loop unrolling (LU) method has shown tremendous success, but often requires a deep model for the best performance leading to high memory costs during training. Thus, to address the balance between computation cost and network expressiveness, we propose an LU algorithm with shallow equilibrium regularizers (LUSER). These implicit models are as expressive as deeper convolutional networks, but far more memory efficient during training. The proposed method is evaluated on image deblurring, computed tomography (CT), as well as single-coil Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) tasks and shows similar, or even better, performance while requiring up to 8 times less computational resources during training when compared against a more typical LU architecture with feedforward convolutional regularizers.
abstract_zh: 在反问题中，我们的目标是从可能损坏且经常不适定的测量中重建一些潜在的感兴趣信号。基于经典优化的技术通过与正则化器一起优化数据一致性度量来进行。当前最先进的机器学习方法通​​过展开基于优化的求解器的迭代更新，然后从数据中学习正则化器，从此类技术中汲取灵感。这种循环展开（LU）方法已经取得了巨大的成功，但通常需要深度模型才能获得最佳性能，从而导致训练期间的内存成本很高。因此，为了解决计算成本和网络表达能力之间的平衡，我们提出了一种具有浅层平衡正则化器的 LU 算法（LUSER）。这些隐式模型的表现力与更深的卷积网络一样，但在训练过程中内存效率更高。该方法在图像去模糊、计算机断层扫描 (CT) 以及单线圈磁共振成像 (MRI) 任务上进行了评估，与具有前馈卷积正则器的更典型的 LU 架构相比，显示出相似甚至更好的性能，同时在训练期间所需的计算资源减少了 8 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LUSER的内存高效逆问题求解方法，通过浅层均衡正则化器平衡计算成本与网络表达能力。
AI.motivation: 传统循环展开（LU）方法依赖深度模型导致高内存消耗，需在计算成本与网络表达能力间寻求更优平衡。
AI.method: 设计浅层均衡正则化器（LUSER），利用隐式模型在保持深层网络表达能力的同时显著降低训练内存需求。
AI.result: 在图像去模糊、CT和MRI任务中，LUSER表现优于或接近传统LU架构，训练时计算资源消耗减少达8倍。
AI.conclusion: LUSER通过浅层均衡正则化有效解决了逆问题的内存瓶颈，为高效求解提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LUSER的内存高效逆问题求解方法，通过浅层均衡正则化器平衡计算成本与网络表达能力。

authors_text: Danielle L. Ferreira,Connor Lau,Zaynaf Salaymang,Rima Arnaout
title: Label-free segmentation from cardiac ultrasound using self-supervised learning
title_zh: 使用自我监督学习对心脏超声进行无标记分割
abstract: Segmentation and measurement of cardiac chambers is critical in cardiac ultrasound but is laborious and poorly reproducible. Neural networks can assist, but supervised approaches require the same laborious manual annotations. We built a pipeline for self-supervised (no manual labels) segmentation combining computer vision, clinical domain knowledge, and deep learning. We trained on 450 echocardiograms (93,000 images) and tested on 8,393 echocardiograms (4,476,266 images; mean 61 years, 51% female), using the resulting segmentations to calculate biometrics. We also tested against external images from an additional 10,030 patients with available manual tracings of the left ventricle. r2 between clinically measured and pipeline-predicted measurements were similar to reported inter-clinician variation and comparable to supervised learning across several different measurements (r2 0.56-0.84). Average accuracy for detecting abnormal chamber size and function was 0.85 (range 0.71-0.97) compared to clinical measurements. A subset of test echocardiograms (n=553) had corresponding cardiac MRIs, where MRI is the gold standard. Correlation between pipeline and MRI measurements was similar to that between clinical echocardiogram and MRI. Finally, the pipeline accurately segments the left ventricle with an average Dice score of 0.89 (95% CI [0.89]) in the external, manually labeled dataset. Our results demonstrate a manual-label free, clinically valid, and highly scalable method for segmentation from ultrasound, a noisy but globally important imaging modality.
summary: Segmentation and measurement of cardiac chambers is critical in cardiac ultrasound but is laborious and poorly reproducible. Neural networks can assist, but supervised approaches require the same laborious manual annotations. We built a pipeline for self-supervised (no manual labels) segmentation combining computer vision, clinical domain knowledge, and deep learning. We trained on 450 echocardiograms (93,000 images) and tested on 8,393 echocardiograms (4,476,266 images; mean 61 years, 51% female), using the resulting segmentations to calculate biometrics. We also tested against external images from an additional 10,030 patients with available manual tracings of the left ventricle. r2 between clinically measured and pipeline-predicted measurements were similar to reported inter-clinician variation and comparable to supervised learning across several different measurements (r2 0.56-0.84). Average accuracy for detecting abnormal chamber size and function was 0.85 (range 0.71-0.97) compared to clinical measurements. A subset of test echocardiograms (n=553) had corresponding cardiac MRIs, where MRI is the gold standard. Correlation between pipeline and MRI measurements was similar to that between clinical echocardiogram and MRI. Finally, the pipeline accurately segments the left ventricle with an average Dice score of 0.89 (95% CI [0.89]) in the external, manually labeled dataset. Our results demonstrate a manual-label free, clinically valid, and highly scalable method for segmentation from ultrasound, a noisy but globally important imaging modality.
abstract_zh: 心腔的分割和测量在心脏超声中至关重要，但费力且重复性差。神经网络可以提供帮助，但监督方法需要同样费力的手动注释。我们建立了一个结合计算机视觉、临床领域知识和深度学习的自监督（无手动标签）分割管道。我们对 450 张超声心动图（93,000 张图像）进行了训练，并对 8,393 张超声心动图（4,476,266 张图像；平均 61 岁，51% 女性）进行了测试，使用生成的分割来计算生物特征。我们还对另外 10,030 名患者的外部图像进行了测试，并提供了左心室的手动描记。临床测量和管道预测测量之间的 r2 与报告的临床医生间差异相似，并且与几种不同测量的监督学习相当（r2 0.56-0.84）。与临床测量相比，检测异常腔室大小和功能的平均准确度为 0.85（范围 0.71-0.97）。测试超声心动图的一个子集 (n=553) 有相应的心脏 MRI，其中 MRI 是金标准。管道和 MRI 测量之间的相关性类似于临床超声心动图和 MRI 之间的相关性。最后，该管道在外部手动标记的数据集中准确地分割了左心室，平均 Dice 得分为 0.89 (95% CI [0.89])。我们的结果证明了一种无需手动标记、临床有效且高度可扩展的超声分割方法，超声是一种嘈杂但全球重要的成像方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的自监督学习方法，用于心脏超声图像的分割。
AI.motivation: 心脏超声图像分割依赖人工标注，耗时且可重复性差，而监督学习方法需要大量标注数据。本文旨在开发一种无需人工标签的高效分割方法。
AI.method: 结合计算机视觉、临床领域知识和深度学习，构建自监督分割流水线，利用450例超声心动图（93,000张图像）训练，并在8,393例测试数据及外部10,030例手动标注数据中验证。
AI.result: 分割结果与临床测量的r²值达0.56-0.84，异常心室大小和功能检测准确率为0.85，Dice分数达0.89；与MRI金标准的相关性与临床超声-MRI结果相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需人工标注，临床有效且高度可扩展，为全球广泛应用的超声影像提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Chinmayee Athalye,Rima Arnaout
title: Domain-guided data augmentation for deep learning on medical imaging
title_zh: 用于医学成像深度学习的领域引导数据增强
abstract: While domain-specific data augmentation can be useful in training neural networks for medical imaging tasks, such techniques have not been widely used to date. Here, we test whether domain-specific data augmentation is useful for medical imaging using a well-benchmarked task: view classification on fetal ultrasound FETAL-125 and OB-125 datasets. We found that using a context-preserving cut-paste strategy, we could create valid training data as measured by performance of the resulting trained model on the benchmark test dataset. When used in an online fashion, models trained on this data performed similarly to those trained using traditional data augmentation (FETAL-125 F-score 85.33+/-0.24 vs 86.89+/-0.60, p-value 0.0139; OB-125 F-score 74.60+/-0.11 vs 72.43+/-0.62, p-value 0.0039). Furthermore, the ability to perform augmentations during training time, as well as the ability to apply chosen augmentations equally across data classes, are important considerations in designing a bespoke data augmentation. Finally, we provide open-source code to facilitate running bespoke data augmentations in an online fashion. Taken together, this work expands the ability to design and apply domain-guided data augmentations for medical imaging tasks.
summary: While domain-specific data augmentation can be useful in training neural networks for medical imaging tasks, such techniques have not been widely used to date. Here, we test whether domain-specific data augmentation is useful for medical imaging using a well-benchmarked task: view classification on fetal ultrasound FETAL-125 and OB-125 datasets. We found that using a context-preserving cut-paste strategy, we could create valid training data as measured by performance of the resulting trained model on the benchmark test dataset. When used in an online fashion, models trained on this data performed similarly to those trained using traditional data augmentation (FETAL-125 F-score 85.33+/-0.24 vs 86.89+/-0.60, p-value 0.0139; OB-125 F-score 74.60+/-0.11 vs 72.43+/-0.62, p-value 0.0039). Furthermore, the ability to perform augmentations during training time, as well as the ability to apply chosen augmentations equally across data classes, are important considerations in designing a bespoke data augmentation. Finally, we provide open-source code to facilitate running bespoke data augmentations in an online fashion. Taken together, this work expands the ability to design and apply domain-guided data augmentations for medical imaging tasks.
abstract_zh: 虽然特定领域的数据增强可用于训练医学成像任务的神经网络，但迄今为止此类技术尚未得到广泛使用。在这里，我们使用一项经过良好基准测试的任务来测试特定领域的数据增强是否对医学成像有用：查看胎儿超声 FETAL-125 和 OB-125 数据集的分类。我们发现，使用保留上下文的剪切粘贴策略，我们可以创建有效的训练数据，并通过基准测试数据集上生成的训练模型的性能来衡量。当以在线方式使用时，基于此数据训练的模型的表现与使用传统数据增强训练的模型类似（FETAL-125 F-score 85.33+/-0.24 vs 86.89+/-0.60，p 值 0.0139；OB-125 F-score 74.60+/-0.11 vs 72.43+/-0.62，p 值 0.0039）。此外，在训练期间执行增强的能力，以及跨数据类平等应用所选增强的能力，是设计定制数据增强时的重要考虑因素。最后，我们提供开源代码，以便于以在线方式运行定制数据增强。总而言之，这项工作扩展了为医学成像任务设计和应用领域引导数据增强的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了领域引导的数据增强在胎儿超声医学图像分类任务中的有效性，通过对比传统数据增强方法验证其性能。
AI.motivation: 医学影像数据通常有限且标注成本高，传统数据增强方法可能无法充分捕捉领域特定特征，需探索更有效的数据增强策略。
AI.method: 采用上下文保持的剪贴策略生成领域相关训练数据，在FETAL-125和OB-125数据集上进行在线数据增强，并与传统方法对比实验。
AI.result: 领域引导增强方法在FETAL-125数据集上F-score为85.33（传统方法86.89，p=0.0139），OB-125数据集上为74.60（传统方法72.43，p=0.0039），性能接近且具统计学意义。
AI.conclusion: 领域引导的数据增强可有效提升医学影像模型性能，需关注训练时增强策略的实时性与类别平衡性，并提供开源工具支持该方法应用。

authors_text: Vijja Wichitwechkarn,Charles Fox
title: MACARONS: A Modular and Open-Sourced Automation System for Vertical Farming
title_zh: MACARONS：用于垂直农业的模块化开源自动化系统
abstract: The Modular Automated Crop Array Online System (MACARONS) is an extensible, scalable, open hardware system for plant transport in automated horticulture systems such as vertical farms. It is specified to move trays of plants up to 1060mm x 630mm and 12.5kg at a rate of 100mm/s along the guide rails and 41.7mm/s up the lifts, such as between stations for monitoring and actuating plants. The cost for the construction of one grow unit of MACARONS is 144.96USD which equates to 128.85USD/m2 of grow area. The designs are released and meets the requirements of CERN-OSH-W, which includes step-by-step graphical build instructions and can be built by a typical technical person in one day at a cost of 1535.50USD. Integrated tests are included in the build instructions are used to validate against the specifications, and we report on a successful build. Through a simple analysis, we demonstrate that MACARONS can operate at a rate sufficient to automate tray loading/unloading, to reduce labour costs in a vertical farm.
summary: The Modular Automated Crop Array Online System (MACARONS) is an extensible, scalable, open hardware system for plant transport in automated horticulture systems such as vertical farms. It is specified to move trays of plants up to 1060mm x 630mm and 12.5kg at a rate of 100mm/s along the guide rails and 41.7mm/s up the lifts, such as between stations for monitoring and actuating plants. The cost for the construction of one grow unit of MACARONS is 144.96USD which equates to 128.85USD/m2 of grow area. The designs are released and meets the requirements of CERN-OSH-W, which includes step-by-step graphical build instructions and can be built by a typical technical person in one day at a cost of 1535.50USD. Integrated tests are included in the build instructions are used to validate against the specifications, and we report on a successful build. Through a simple analysis, we demonstrate that MACARONS can operate at a rate sufficient to automate tray loading/unloading, to reduce labour costs in a vertical farm.
abstract_zh: 模块化自动化作物阵列在线系统（MACARONS）是一个可扩展、可扩展的开放硬件系统，用于垂直农场等自动化园艺系统中的植物运输。它被指定以 100mm/s 的速度沿导轨移动最大 1060mm x 630mm 和 12.5kg 的植物托盘，并以 41.7mm/s 的速度沿电梯移动，例如在用于监视和驱动植物的站之间。建设一种植单位的 MACARONS 成本为 144.96 美元，相当于每平方米种植面积 128.85 美元。设计已发布并满足 CERN-OSH-W 的要求，其中包括分步图形构建说明，可由典型技术人员在一天内构建，成本为 1535.50 美元。构建说明中包含集成测试，用于根据规范进行验证，并且我们会报告成功的构建。通过简单的分析，我们证明了 MACARONS 的运行速度足以实现托盘装载/卸载的自动化，从而降低垂直农场的劳动力成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化、开源的自动化系统MACARONS，用于垂直农场中的植物运输，旨在降低人工成本并提高效率。
AI.motivation: 垂直农场需要高效、低成本的自动化系统来减少人工操作，而现有方案可能存在成本高或扩展性差的问题。
AI.method: 设计可扩展的硬件系统，规定托盘移动参数（速度、尺寸），采用CERN-OSH-W开源标准，提供图形化组装指南，并通过集成测试验证性能。
AI.result: 成功构建MACARONS系统，单个种植单元成本144.96美元，验证其可满足自动化托盘装卸需求，有效降低劳动力成本。
AI.conclusion: MACARONS系统满足垂直农场自动化需求，具有成本效益和模块化优势，为开源农业自动化提供了可行方案。

search_text: MACARONS: A Modular and Open-Sourced Automation System for Vertical Farming MACARONS：用于垂直农业的模块化开源自动化系统 The Modular Automated Crop Array Online System (MACARONS) is an extensible, scalable, open hardware system for plant transport in automated horticulture systems such as vertical farms. It is specified to move trays of plants up to 1060mm x 630mm and 12.5kg at a rate of 100mm/s along the guide rails and 41.7mm/s up the lifts, such as between stations for monitoring and actuating plants. The cost for the construction of one grow unit of MACARONS is 144.96USD which equates to 128.85USD/m2 of grow area. The designs are released and meets the requirements of CERN-OSH-W, which includes step-by-step graphical build instructions and can be built by a typical technical person in one day at a cost of 1535.50USD. Integrated tests are included in the build instructions are used to validate against the specifications, and we report on a successful build. Through a simple analysis, we demonstrate that MACARONS can operate at a rate sufficient to automate tray loading/unloading, to reduce labour costs in a vertical farm. 模块化自动化作物阵列在线系统（MACARONS）是一个可扩展、可扩展的开放硬件系统，用于垂直农场等自动化园艺系统中的植物运输。它被指定以 100mm/s 的速度沿导轨移动最大 1060mm x 630mm 和 12.5kg 的植物托盘，并以 41.7mm/s 的速度沿电梯移动，例如在用于监视和驱动植物的站之间。建设一种植单位的 MACARONS 成本为 144.96 美元，相当于每平方米种植面积 128.85 美元。设计已发布并满足 CERN-OSH-W 的要求，其中包括分步图形构建说明，可由典型技术人员在一天内构建，成本为 1535.50 美元。构建说明中包含集成测试，用于根据规范进行验证，并且我们会报告成功的构建。通过简单的分析，我们证明了 MACARONS 的运行速度足以实现托盘装载/卸载的自动化，从而降低垂直农场的劳动力成本。 本文提出了一种模块化、开源的自动化系统MACARONS，用于垂直农场中的植物运输，旨在降低人工成本并提高效率。 Vijja Wichitwechkarn,Charles Fox cs.RO

authors_text: Lucio M. Dery,Abram L. Friesen,Nando De Freitas,Marc'Aurelio Ranzato,Yutian Chen
title: Multi-step Planning for Automated Hyperparameter Optimization with OptFormer
title_zh: 使用 OptFormer 进行自动超参数优化的多步骤规划
abstract: As machine learning permeates more industries and models become more expensive and time consuming to train, the need for efficient automated hyperparameter optimization (HPO) has never been more pressing. Multi-step planning based approaches to hyperparameter optimization promise improved efficiency over myopic alternatives by more effectively balancing out exploration and exploitation. However, the potential of these approaches has not been fully realized due to their technical complexity and computational intensity. In this work, we leverage recent advances in Transformer-based, natural-language-interfaced hyperparameter optimization to circumvent these barriers. We build on top of the recently proposed OptFormer which casts both hyperparameter suggestion and target function approximation as autoregressive generation thus making planning via rollouts simple and efficient. We conduct extensive exploration of different strategies for performing multi-step planning on top of the OptFormer model to highlight its potential for use in constructing non-myopic HPO strategies.
summary: As machine learning permeates more industries and models become more expensive and time consuming to train, the need for efficient automated hyperparameter optimization (HPO) has never been more pressing. Multi-step planning based approaches to hyperparameter optimization promise improved efficiency over myopic alternatives by more effectively balancing out exploration and exploitation. However, the potential of these approaches has not been fully realized due to their technical complexity and computational intensity. In this work, we leverage recent advances in Transformer-based, natural-language-interfaced hyperparameter optimization to circumvent these barriers. We build on top of the recently proposed OptFormer which casts both hyperparameter suggestion and target function approximation as autoregressive generation thus making planning via rollouts simple and efficient. We conduct extensive exploration of different strategies for performing multi-step planning on top of the OptFormer model to highlight its potential for use in constructing non-myopic HPO strategies.
abstract_zh: 随着机器学习渗透到更多行业，训练模型变得更加昂贵和耗时，对高效自动化超参数优化 (HPO) 的需求从未如此迫切。基于多步规划的超参数优化方法有望通过更有效地平衡探索和利用来提高效率。然而，由于技术复杂性和计算强度，这些方法的潜力尚未得到充分发挥。在这项工作中，我们利用基于 Transformer 的自然语言接口超参数优化的最新进展来规避这些障碍。我们建立在最近提出的 OptFormer 之上，它将超参数建议和目标函数近似作为自回归生成，从而使通过推出进行规划变得简单而高效。我们对在 OptFormer 模型之上执行多步骤规划的不同策略进行了广泛的探索，以突出其在构建非近视 HPO 策略中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于OptFormer的多步规划方法，以提升自动化超参数优化的效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习模型训练成本增加，传统单步优化方法效率不足，需探索更高效的多步规划策略。
AI.method: 利用Transformer架构的OptFormer模型，将超参数推荐与目标函数逼近转化为自回归生成过程，简化多步规划计算。
AI.result: 通过多种策略实验验证，OptFormer在非单步HPO中展现出显著效率提升。
AI.conclusion: OptFormer为实现高效多步超参数优化提供了可行方案，未来可进一步优化其规划策略。
