authors_text: Maitrey Gramopadhye,Daniel Szafir
title: Generating Executable Action Plans with Environmentally-Aware Language Models
title_zh: 使用环境感知语言模型生成可执行的行动计划
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained using massive text datasets have recently shown promise in generating action plans for robotic agents from high level text queries. However, these models typically do not consider the robot's environment, resulting in generated plans that may not actually be executable, due to ambiguities in the planned actions or environmental constraints. In this paper, we propose an approach to generate environmentally-aware action plans that agents are better able to execute. Our approach involves integrating environmental objects and object relations as additional inputs into LLM action plan generation to provide the system with an awareness of its surroundings, resulting in plans where each generated action is mapped to objects present in the scene. We also design a novel scoring function that, along with generating the action steps and associating them with objects, helps the system disambiguate among object instances and take into account their states. We evaluated our approach using the VirtualHome simulator and the ActivityPrograms knowledge base and found that action plans generated from our system had a 310% improvement in executability and a 147% improvement in correctness over prior work. The complete code and a demo of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/hri-ironlab/scene_aware_language_planner.
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) trained using massive text datasets have recently shown promise in generating action plans for robotic agents from high level text queries. However, these models typically do not consider the robot's environment, resulting in generated plans that may not actually be executable, due to ambiguities in the planned actions or environmental constraints. In this paper, we propose an approach to generate environmentally-aware action plans that agents are better able to execute. Our approach involves integrating environmental objects and object relations as additional inputs into LLM action plan generation to provide the system with an awareness of its surroundings, resulting in plans where each generated action is mapped to objects present in the scene. We also design a novel scoring function that, along with generating the action steps and associating them with objects, helps the system disambiguate among object instances and take into account their states. We evaluated our approach using the VirtualHome simulator and the ActivityPrograms knowledge base and found that action plans generated from our system had a 310% improvement in executability and a 147% improvement in correctness over prior work. The complete code and a demo of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/hri-ironlab/scene_aware_language_planner.
abstract_zh: 使用大量文本数据集训练的大型语言模型（LLM）最近在根据高级文本查询为机器人代理生成行动计划方面表现出了希望。然而，这些模型通常不考虑机器人的环境，导致生成的计划由于计划的动作或环境限制的模糊性而实际上可能无法执行。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法来生成具有环境意识的行动计划，使代理人能够更好地执行。我们的方法涉及将环境对象和对象关系作为附加输入集成到 LLM 行动计划生成中，以使系统了解其周围环境，从而生成将每个生成的操作映射到场景中存在的对象的计划。我们还设计了一种新颖的评分函数，除了生成动作步骤并将其与对象关联之外，还可以帮助系统消除对象实例之间的歧义并考虑它们的状态。我们使用 VirtualHome 模拟器和 ActivityPrograms 知识库评估了我们的方法，发现与之前的工作相比，我们的系统生成的行动计划的可执行性提高了 310%，正确性提高了 147%。我们的方法的完整代码和演示可在 https://github.com/hri-ironlab/scene_aware_language_planner 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成环境感知动作计划的方法，通过整合环境对象和关系信息提升机器人执行计划的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型生成的动作计划未考虑环境约束，导致计划可能无法实际执行，需增强模型对场景的感知能力以提高可执行性。
AI.method: 将环境对象及关系作为额外输入整合到语言模型中，并设计新型评分函数以关联动作与对象实例及其状态，实现环境感知的动作规划。
AI.result: 在VirtualHome模拟器和ActivityPrograms知识库测试中，动作计划的可执行性提升310%，正确性提升147%。
AI.conclusion: 环境感知的语言模型能显著提升动作计划的可行性与正确性，为机器人任务规划提供有效解决方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 环境感知的语言模型能显著提升动作计划的可行性与正确性，为机器人任务规划提供有效解决方案。

However, these models typically do not consider the robot's environment, resulting in generated plans that may not actually be executable, due to ambiguities in the planned actions or environmental constraints. In this paper, we propose an approach to generate environmentally-aware action plans that agents are better able to execute. Our approach involves integrating environmental objects and object relations as additional inputs into LLM action plan generation to provide the system with an awareness of its surroundings, resulting in plans where each generated action is mapped to objects present in the scene. We also design a novel scoring function that, along with generating the action steps and associating them with objects, helps the system disambiguate among object instances and take into account their states. We evaluated our approach using the VirtualHome simulator and the ActivityPrograms knowledge base and found that action plans generated from our system had a 310% improvement in executability and a 147% improvement in correctness over prior work. The complete code and a demo of our method is publicly available at https://github.com/hri-ironlab/scene_aware_language_planner. 使用大量文本数据集训练的大型语言模型（LLM）最近在根据高级文本查询为机器人代理生成行动计划方面表现出了希望。然而，这些模型通常不考虑机器人的环境，导致生成的计划由于计划的动作或环境限制的模糊性而实际上可能无法执行。在本文中，我们提出了一种方法来生成具有环境意识的行动计划，使代理人能够更好地执行。我们的方法涉及将环境对象和对象关系作为附加输入集成到 LLM 行动计划生成中，以使系统了解其周围环境，从而生成将每个生成的操作映射到场景中存在的对象的计划。我们还设计了一种新颖的评分函数，除了生成动作步骤并将其与对象关联之外，还可以帮助系统消除对象实例之间的歧义并考虑它们的状态。我们使用 VirtualHome 模拟器和 ActivityPrograms 知识库评估了我们的方法，发现与之前的工作相比，我们的系统生成的行动计划的可执行性提高了 310%，正确性提高了 147%。我们的方法的完整代码和演示可在 https://github.com/hri-ironlab/scene_aware_language_planner 上公开获取。 本文提出一种生成环境感知动作计划的方法，通过整合环境对象和关系信息提升机器人执行计划的可行性。 Maitrey Gramopadhye,Daniel Szafir cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Jiatao Gu,Shuangfei Zhai,Yizhe Zhang,Miguel Angel Bautista,Josh Susskind
title: f-DM: A Multi-stage Diffusion Model via Progressive Signal Transformation
title_zh: f-DM：通过渐进信号变换的多级扩散模型
abstract: Diffusion models (DMs) have recently emerged as SoTA tools for generative modeling in various domains. Standard DMs can be viewed as an instantiation of hierarchical variational autoencoders (VAEs) where the latent variables are inferred from input-centered Gaussian distributions with fixed scales and variances. Unlike VAEs, this formulation limits DMs from changing the latent spaces and learning abstract representations. In this work, we propose f-DM, a generalized family of DMs which allows progressive signal transformation. More precisely, we extend DMs to incorporate a set of (hand-designed or learned) transformations, where the transformed input is the mean of each diffusion step. We propose a generalized formulation and derive the corresponding de-noising objective with a modified sampling algorithm. As a demonstration, we apply f-DM in image generation tasks with a range of functions, including down-sampling, blurring, and learned transformations based on the encoder of pretrained VAEs. In addition, we identify the importance of adjusting the noise levels whenever the signal is sub-sampled and propose a simple rescaling recipe. f-DM can produce high-quality samples on standard image generation benchmarks like FFHQ, AFHQ, LSUN, and ImageNet with better efficiency and semantic interpretation.
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) have recently emerged as SoTA tools for generative modeling in various domains. Standard DMs can be viewed as an instantiation of hierarchical variational autoencoders (VAEs) where the latent variables are inferred from input-centered Gaussian distributions with fixed scales and variances. Unlike VAEs, this formulation limits DMs from changing the latent spaces and learning abstract representations. In this work, we propose f-DM, a generalized family of DMs which allows progressive signal transformation. More precisely, we extend DMs to incorporate a set of (hand-designed or learned) transformations, where the transformed input is the mean of each diffusion step. We propose a generalized formulation and derive the corresponding de-noising objective with a modified sampling algorithm. As a demonstration, we apply f-DM in image generation tasks with a range of functions, including down-sampling, blurring, and learned transformations based on the encoder of pretrained VAEs. In addition, we identify the importance of adjusting the noise levels whenever the signal is sub-sampled and propose a simple rescaling recipe. f-DM can produce high-quality samples on standard image generation benchmarks like FFHQ, AFHQ, LSUN, and ImageNet with better efficiency and semantic interpretation.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型 (DM) 最近已成为各个领域生成建模的 SoTA 工具。标准 DM 可以被视为分层变分自动编码器 (VAE) 的实例，其中潜在变量是从具有固定尺度和方差的以输入为中心的高斯分布推断出来的。与 VAE 不同，这种表述限制了 DM 改变潜在空间和学习抽象表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了 f-DM，这是一个通用的 DM 系列，它允许渐进式信号转换。更准确地说，我们扩展 DM 以合并一组（手工设计或学习的）转换，其中转换后的输入是每个扩散步骤的平均值。我们提出了一个通用的公式，并使用改进的采样算法推导出相应的去噪目标。作为演示，我们将 f-DM 应用于具有一系列功能的图像生成任务，包括下采样、模糊和基于预训练 VAE 编码器的学习变换。此外，我们还确定了每当对信号进行二次采样时调整噪声水平的重要性，并提出了一个简单的重新缩放方法。 f-DM 可以在 FFHQ、AFHQ、LSUN 和 ImageNet 等标准图像生成基准上生成高质量样本，并具有更好的效率和语义解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出f-DM，一种通过渐进信号变换的多阶段扩散模型，以提升生成质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 标准扩散模型（DMs）因固定潜空间尺度而难以学习抽象表示，限制了其灵活性与生成能力。
AI.method: 通过引入渐进信号变换（如降采样、模糊或预训练VAE编码器学习的变换），扩展DM框架并修改去噪目标与采样算法，同时提出噪声水平自适应调整策略。
AI.result: 在FFHQ、AFHQ、LSUN和ImageNet等基准测试中生成高质量样本，效率与语义解释性优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: f-DM通过渐进信号变换机制有效提升了扩散模型的生成效率与语义可控性，为多阶段生成任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Saleh Kalantari,Tong Bill Xu,Armin Mostafavi,Andrew Dilanchian,Benjamin Kim,Walter Boot,Sara Czaja
title: Using Immersive Virtual Reality to Enhance Social Interaction among Older Adults: A Multi-site Study
title_zh: 使用沉浸式虚拟现实增强老年人之间的社交互动：一项多站点研究
abstract: Research examining older adults interactions with Virtual Reality (VR) and the impact of social VR experiences on outcomes such as social engagement has been limited, especially among older adults. This multi-site pilot study evaluated the feasibility and acceptability of a novel social virtual reality (VR) program that paired older adults from different geographic locations (New York City, Tallahassee, and Ithaca, N.Y) who engaged in virtual travel and productive engagement activities together. The sample included 36 individuals aged 60 and older, 25 percent of whom had cognitive impairment (CI). Older adults with and without CI reported high levels of engagement in the VR environment and perceived the social VR program to be enjoyable and usable. Perceived Spatial Presence was a central driver of the positive outcomes. Most also indicated a willingness to reconnect with their VR partner in the future. The data also identified important areas for improvement in the program, such as the use of more realistic and responsive avatars, controllers with larger controls, and more time for training. Overall, these findings suggest that VR social applications may foster social engagement among older adults.
summary: Research examining older adults interactions with Virtual Reality (VR) and the impact of social VR experiences on outcomes such as social engagement has been limited, especially among older adults. This multi-site pilot study evaluated the feasibility and acceptability of a novel social virtual reality (VR) program that paired older adults from different geographic locations (New York City, Tallahassee, and Ithaca, N.Y) who engaged in virtual travel and productive engagement activities together. The sample included 36 individuals aged 60 and older, 25 percent of whom had cognitive impairment (CI). Older adults with and without CI reported high levels of engagement in the VR environment and perceived the social VR program to be enjoyable and usable. Perceived Spatial Presence was a central driver of the positive outcomes. Most also indicated a willingness to reconnect with their VR partner in the future. The data also identified important areas for improvement in the program, such as the use of more realistic and responsive avatars, controllers with larger controls, and more time for training. Overall, these findings suggest that VR social applications may foster social engagement among older adults.
abstract_zh: 研究老年人与虚拟现实 (VR) 的互动以及社交 VR 体验对社交参与等结果的影响的研究非常有限，尤其是在老年人中。这项多地点试点研究评估了一种新颖的社交虚拟现实 (VR) 计划的可行性和可接受性，该计划将来自不同地理位置（纽约市、塔拉哈西和纽约州伊萨卡）的老年人配对，一起参与虚拟旅行和富有成效的参与活动。样本包括 36 名 60 岁及以上的人，其中 25% 患有认知障碍 (CI)。有或没有 CI 的老年人都报告了 VR 环境的高参与度，并认为社交 VR 程序令人愉快且有用。感知空间存在是积极成果的核心驱动力。大多数人还表示愿意在未来与他们的 VR 合作伙伴重新建立联系。数据还确定了程序中需要改进的重要领域，例如使用更真实、响应更灵敏的化身、具有更大控件的控制器以及更多的培训时间。总体而言，这些发现表明 VR 社交应用可能会促进老年人的社交参与。

AI.tldr: 评估社交虚拟现实（VR）项目在老年人中的可行性与可接受性，以促进其社交互动。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对老年人使用VR及其对社交参与影响的系统性探讨，需探索VR在提升该群体社交活动中的潜力。
AI.method: 多站点试点研究，将纽约、塔拉哈西和伊萨卡的36名60岁以上老年人（25%有认知障碍）配对，通过虚拟旅行与生产性活动进行社交VR体验。
AI.result: 参与者报告高参与度与满意度，感知空间存在是核心积极因素，多数愿未来继续使用，但需改进化身真实度、控制器设计及培训时长。
AI.conclusion: VR社交应用可有效促进老年人社交参与，但需优化技术细节以提升体验。

authors_text: Liyu Chen,Andrea Tirinzoni,Matteo Pirotta,Alessandro Lazaric
title: Reaching Goals is Hard: Settling the Sample Complexity of the Stochastic Shortest Path
title_zh: 实现目标很难：解决随机最短路径的样本复杂性
abstract: We study the sample complexity of learning an $ε$-optimal policy in the Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem. We first derive sample complexity bounds when the learner has access to a generative model. We show that there exists a worst-case SSP instance with $S$ states, $A$ actions, minimum cost $c_{\min}$, and maximum expected cost of the optimal policy over all states $B_{\star}$, where any algorithm requires at least $Ω(SAB_{\star}^3/(c_{\min}ε^2))$ samples to return an $ε$-optimal policy with high probability. Surprisingly, this implies that whenever $c_{\min}=0$ an SSP problem may not be learnable, thus revealing that learning in SSPs is strictly harder than in the finite-horizon and discounted settings. We complement this result with lower bounds when prior knowledge of the hitting time of the optimal policy is available and when we restrict optimality by competing against policies with bounded hitting time. Finally, we design an algorithm with matching upper bounds in these cases. This settles the sample complexity of learning $ε$-optimal polices in SSP with generative models. We also initiate the study of learning $ε$-optimal policies without access to a generative model (i.e., the so-called best-policy identification problem), and show that sample-efficient learning is impossible in general. On the other hand, efficient learning can be made possible if we assume the agent can directly reach the goal state from any state by paying a fixed cost. We then establish the first upper and lower bounds under this assumption. Finally, using similar analytic tools, we prove that horizon-free regret is impossible in SSPs under general costs, resolving an open problem in (Tarbouriech et al., 2021c).
summary: We study the sample complexity of learning an $ε$-optimal policy in the Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem. We first derive sample complexity bounds when the learner has access to a generative model. We show that there exists a worst-case SSP instance with $S$ states, $A$ actions, minimum cost $c_{\min}$, and maximum expected cost of the optimal policy over all states $B_{\star}$, where any algorithm requires at least $Ω(SAB_{\star}^3/(c_{\min}ε^2))$ samples to return an $ε$-optimal policy with high probability. Surprisingly, this implies that whenever $c_{\min}=0$ an SSP problem may not be learnable, thus revealing that learning in SSPs is strictly harder than in the finite-horizon and discounted settings. We complement this result with lower bounds when prior knowledge of the hitting time of the optimal policy is available and when we restrict optimality by competing against policies with bounded hitting time. Finally, we design an algorithm with matching upper bounds in these cases. This settles the sample complexity of learning $ε$-optimal polices in SSP with generative models. We also initiate the study of learning $ε$-optimal policies without access to a generative model (i.e., the so-called best-policy identification problem), and show that sample-efficient learning is impossible in general. On the other hand, efficient learning can be made possible if we assume the agent can directly reach the goal state from any state by paying a fixed cost. We then establish the first upper and lower bounds under this assumption. Finally, using similar analytic tools, we prove that horizon-free regret is impossible in SSPs under general costs, resolving an open problem in (Tarbouriech et al., 2021c).
abstract_zh: 我们研究了随机最短路径 (SSP) 问题中学习 $ε$ 最优策略的样本复杂性。当学习者可以访问生成模型时，我们首先得出样本复杂性界限。我们证明，存在一个最坏情况的 SSP 实例，其中包含 $S$ 状态、$A$ 操作、最小成本 $c_{\min}$ 以及所有状态 $B_{\star}$ 上最优策略的最大预期成本，其中任何算法至少需要 $Ω(SAB_{\star}^3/(c_{\min}ε^2))$ 样本才能以高概率返回 $ε$ 最优策略。令人惊讶的是，这意味着每当 $c_{\min}=0$ 时，SSP 问题可能无法学习，从而表明 SSP 中的学习比有限范围和折扣设置中的学习要严格得多。当最优策略的命中时间的先验知识可用时，并且当我们通过与具有有限命中时间的策略竞争来限制最优性时，我们用下界补充这个结果。最后，我们设计了一种在这些情况下具有匹配上限的算法。这解决了使用生成模型在 SSP 中学习 $ε$ 最优策略的样本复杂性。我们还发起了在不使用生成模型的情况下学习 $ε$ 最优策略的研究（即所谓的最佳策略识别问题），并表明样本有效学习通常是不可能的。另一方面，如果我们假设智能体可以通过支付固定成本从任何状态直接到达目标状态，则可以实现高效学习。然后，我们在此假设下建立第一个上限和下限。最后，使用类似的分析工具，我们证明在一般成本下，SSP 中的无视野后悔是不可能的，解决了（Tarbouriech 等人，2021c）中的一个开放问题。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了在随机最短路径（SSP）问题中学习ε-最优策略的样本复杂度，分析了生成模型下的样本复杂度界限，并探讨了无生成模型情况下的学习可能性。
AI.motivation: SSP问题在强化学习中具有重要地位，但其样本复杂度的理论界限尚未明确。论文旨在填补这一空白，揭示SSP与有限时间步和折扣设置相比的学习难度差异。
AI.method: 通过推导生成模型下的样本复杂度上界和下界，设计匹配上界的算法，并分析无生成模型场景下的学习可行性，结合数学证明和算法设计。
AI.result: 证明了当最小成本c_min=0时SSP可能不可学习，提出Ω(SAB_⋆³/(c_min ε²))的样本复杂度下界，并设计了匹配的算法；同时证明了无生成模型下一般情况下无法高效学习，但在特定假设下可建立新的界。
AI.conclusion: SSP的学习难度高于有限时间步和折扣设置，样本复杂度理论得以完善，并解决了关于无界时间后悔的开放问题。

search_text: Reaching Goals is Hard: Settling the Sample Complexity of the Stochastic Shortest Path 实现目标很难：解决随机最短路径的样本复杂性 We study the sample complexity of learning an $ε$-optimal policy in the Stochastic Shortest Path (SSP) problem. We first derive sample complexity bounds when the learner has access to a generative model. We show that there exists a worst-case SSP instance with $S$ states, $A$ actions, minimum cost $c_{\min}$, and maximum expected cost of the optimal policy over all states $B_{\star}$, where any algorithm requires at least $Ω(SAB_{\star}^3/(c_{\min}ε^2))$ samples to return an $ε$-optimal policy with high probability. Surprisingly, this implies that whenever $c_{\min}=0$ an SSP problem may not be learnable, thus revealing that learning in SSPs is strictly harder than in the finite-horizon and discounted settings. We complement this result with lower bounds when prior knowledge of the hitting time of the optimal policy is available and when we restrict optimality by competing against policies with bounded hitting time. Finally, we design an algorithm with matching upper bounds in these cases. This settles the sample complexity of learning $ε$-optimal polices in SSP with generative models. We also initiate the study of learning $ε$-optimal policies without access to a generative model (i.e., the so-called best-policy identification problem), and show that sample-efficient learning is impossible in general. On the other hand, efficient learning can be made possible if we assume the agent can directly reach the goal state from any state by paying a fixed cost. We then establish the first upper and lower bounds under this assumption. Finally, using similar analytic tools, we prove that horizon-free regret is impossible in SSPs under general costs, resolving an open problem in (Tarbouriech et al., 2021c). 我们研究了随机最短路径 (SSP) 问题中学习 $ε$ 最优策略的样本复杂性。当学习者可以访问生成模型时，我们首先得出样本复杂性界限。我们证明，存在一个最坏情况的 SSP 实例，其中包含 $S$ 状态、$A$ 操作、最小成本 $c_{\min}$ 以及所有状态 $B_{\star}$ 上最优策略的最大预期成本，其中任何算法至少需要 $Ω(SAB_{\star}^3/(c_{\min}ε^2))$ 样本才能以高概率返回 $ε$ 最优策略。令人惊讶的是，这意味着每当 $c_{\min}=0$ 时，SSP 问题可能无法学习，从而表明 SSP 中的学习比有限范围和折扣设置中的学习要严格得多。当最优策略的命中时间的先验知识可用时，并且当我们通过与具有有限命中时间的策略竞争来限制最优性时，我们用下界补充这个结果。最后，我们设计了一种在这些情况下具有匹配上限的算法。这解决了使用生成模型在 SSP 中学习 $ε$ 最优策略的样本复杂性。我们还发起了在不使用生成模型的情况下学习 $ε$ 最优策略的研究（即所谓的最佳策略识别问题），并表明样本有效学习通常是不可能的。另一方面，如果我们假设智能体可以通过支付固定成本从任何状态直接到达目标状态，则可以实现高效学习。然后，我们在此假设下建立第一个上限和下限。最后，使用类似的分析工具，我们证明在一般成本下，SSP 中的无视野后悔是不可能的，解决了（Tarbouriech 等人，2021c）中的一个开放问题。 该论文研究了在随机最短路径（SSP）问题中学习ε-最优策略的样本复杂度，分析了生成模型下的样本复杂度界限，并探讨了无生成模型情况下的学习可能性。 Liyu Chen,Andrea Tirinzoni,Matteo Pirotta,Alessandro Lazaric cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Dayang Wang,Yongshun Xu,Shuo Han,Hengyong Yu
title: Masked Autoencoders for Low dose CT denoising
title_zh: 用于低剂量 CT 降噪的屏蔽自动编码器
abstract: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) reduces the X-ray radiation but compromises image quality with more noises and artifacts. A plethora of transformer models have been developed recently to improve LDCT image quality. However, the success of a transformer model relies on a large amount of paired noisy and clean data, which is often unavailable in clinical applications. In computer vision and natural language processing fields, masked autoencoders (MAE) have been proposed as an effective label-free self-pretraining method for transformers, due to its excellent feature representation ability. Here, we redesign the classical encoder-decoder learning model to match the denoising task and apply it to LDCT denoising problem. The MAE can leverage the unlabeled data and facilitate structural preservation for the LDCT denoising model when ground truth data are missing. Experiments on the Mayo dataset validate that the MAE can boost the transformer's denoising performance and relieve the dependence on the ground truth data.
summary: Low-dose computed tomography (LDCT) reduces the X-ray radiation but compromises image quality with more noises and artifacts. A plethora of transformer models have been developed recently to improve LDCT image quality. However, the success of a transformer model relies on a large amount of paired noisy and clean data, which is often unavailable in clinical applications. In computer vision and natural language processing fields, masked autoencoders (MAE) have been proposed as an effective label-free self-pretraining method for transformers, due to its excellent feature representation ability. Here, we redesign the classical encoder-decoder learning model to match the denoising task and apply it to LDCT denoising problem. The MAE can leverage the unlabeled data and facilitate structural preservation for the LDCT denoising model when ground truth data are missing. Experiments on the Mayo dataset validate that the MAE can boost the transformer's denoising performance and relieve the dependence on the ground truth data.
abstract_zh: 低剂量计算机断层扫描 (LDCT) 减少了 X 射线辐射，但会产生更多噪声和伪影，从而影响图像质量。最近开发了大量的变压器模型来提高 LDCT 图像质量。然而，变压器模型的成功依赖于大量配对的噪声和干净数据，而这在临床应用中通常是不可用的。在计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域，掩码自动编码器（MAE）因其出色的特征表示能力而被提出作为一种有效的无标签自预训练方法。在这里，我们重新设计了经典的编码器-解码器学习模型以匹配去噪任务，并将其应用于LDCT去噪问题。 MAE 可以利用未标记的数据，并在地面实况数据丢失时促进 LDCT 去噪模型的结构保留。在 Mayo 数据集上的实验验证了 MAE 可以提高 Transformer 的去噪性能并减轻对地面真实数据的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用掩码自编码器（MAE）解决低剂量CT（LDCT）图像去噪问题，无需依赖大量配对的噪声和干净图像数据。
AI.motivation: 低剂量CT成像因辐射减少而引入更多噪声和伪影，但临床中缺乏配对的噪声-干净图像数据，传统Transformer模型依赖此类数据，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 重新设计经典编码器-解码器模型以适配去噪任务，利用MAE的无标签自预训练能力，通过掩码机制学习LDCT图像的结构特征。
AI.result: 在Mayo数据集上的实验表明，MAE显著提升了Transformer的去噪性能，并减少了对地面真实数据的依赖。
AI.conclusion: MAE为LDCT去噪提供了无需配对数据的解决方案，有效缓解了临床数据不足的问题，具有实际应用价值。

However, the success of a transformer model relies on a large amount of paired noisy and clean data, which is often unavailable in clinical applications. authors_text: Nathaniel Hanson,Wesley Lewis,Kavya Puthuveetil,Donelle Furline,Akhil Padmanabha,Taşkın Padır,Zackory Erickson
title: SLURP! Spectroscopy of Liquids Using Robot Pre-Touch Sensing
title_zh: 咕噜咕噜！使用机器人预触摸传感进行液体光谱分析
abstract: Liquids and granular media are pervasive throughout human environments. Their free-flowing nature causes people to constrain them into containers. We do so with thousands of different types of containers made out of different materials with varying sizes, shapes, and colors. In this work, we present a state-of-the-art sensing technique for robots to perceive what liquid is inside of an unknown container. We do so by integrating Visible to Near Infrared (VNIR) reflectance spectroscopy into a robot's end effector. We introduce a hierarchical model for inferring the material classes of both containers and internal contents given spectral measurements from two integrated spectrometers. To train these inference models, we capture and open source a dataset of spectral measurements from over 180 different combinations of containers and liquids. Our technique demonstrates over 85% accuracy in identifying 13 different liquids and granular media contained within 13 different containers. The sensitivity of our spectral readings allow our model to also identify the material composition of the containers themselves with 96% accuracy. Overall, VNIR spectroscopy presents a promising method to give household robots a general-purpose ability to infer the liquids inside of containers, without needing to open or manipulate the containers.
summary: Liquids and granular media are pervasive throughout human environments. Their free-flowing nature causes people to constrain them into containers. We do so with thousands of different types of containers made out of different materials with varying sizes, shapes, and colors. In this work, we present a state-of-the-art sensing technique for robots to perceive what liquid is inside of an unknown container. We do so by integrating Visible to Near Infrared (VNIR) reflectance spectroscopy into a robot's end effector. We introduce a hierarchical model for inferring the material classes of both containers and internal contents given spectral measurements from two integrated spectrometers. To train these inference models, we capture and open source a dataset of spectral measurements from over 180 different combinations of containers and liquids. Our technique demonstrates over 85% accuracy in identifying 13 different liquids and granular media contained within 13 different containers. The sensitivity of our spectral readings allow our model to also identify the material composition of the containers themselves with 96% accuracy. Overall, VNIR spectroscopy presents a promising method to give household robots a general-purpose ability to infer the liquids inside of containers, without needing to open or manipulate the containers.
abstract_zh: 液体和颗粒介质在人类环境中普遍存在。它们自由流动的性质导致人们将它们限制在容器中。为此，我们使用了数千种不同类型的容器，这些容器由不同材料制成，具有不同的尺寸、形状和颜色。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种最先进的传感技术，让机器人能够感知未知容器内的液体。我们通过将可见光到近红外 (VNIR) 反射光谱集成到机器人的末端执行器中来实现这一目标。我们引入了一个分层模型，用于根据两个集成光谱仪的光谱测量来推断容器和内部内容物的材料类别。为了训练这些推理模型，我们捕获并开源了 180 多种不同容器和液体组合的光谱测量数据集。我们的技术在识别 13 个不同容器中包含的 13 种不同液体和颗粒介质方面显示出超过 85% 的准确度。我们的光谱读数的灵敏度使我们的模型能够以 96% 的准确度识别容器本身的材料成分。总体而言，VNIR 光谱法提供了一种很有前途的方法，使家用机器人具有推断容器内部液体的通用能力，而无需打开或操作容器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于可见光至近红外光谱技术的机器人感知方法，用于识别未知容器内的液体和颗粒物质。
AI.motivation: 液体和颗粒物质广泛存在于人类环境中，但其流动性导致需依赖容器存储。传统方法需物理打开容器才能识别内容物，存在局限性。
AI.method: 在机器人末端执行器集成可见光至近红外反射光谱仪，构建分层模型分析容器材质与内容物的光谱数据，并开放180种容器-液体组合的光谱数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 系统对13种液体和容器的识别准确率分别达85%和96%，无需接触即可通过光谱特征判断物质成分。
AI.conclusion: VNIR光谱技术为家庭机器人提供了无需物理交互即可识别容器内容物的通用解决方案，具有重要应用前景。

search_text: SLURP! Spectroscopy of Liquids Using Robot Pre-Touch Sensing 咕噜咕噜！使用机器人预触摸传感进行液体光谱分析 Liquids and granular media are pervasive throughout human environments. Their free-flowing nature causes people to constrain them into containers. We do so with thousands of different types of containers made out of different materials with varying sizes, shapes, and colors. In this work, we present a state-of-the-art sensing technique for robots to perceive what liquid is inside of an unknown container. We do so by integrating Visible to Near Infrared (VNIR) reflectance spectroscopy into a robot's end effector. We introduce a hierarchical model for inferring the material classes of both containers and internal contents given spectral measurements from two integrated spectrometers. To train these inference models, we capture and open source a dataset of spectral measurements from over 180 different combinations of containers and liquids. Our technique demonstrates over 85% accuracy in identifying 13 different liquids and granular media contained within 13 different containers. The sensitivity of our spectral readings allow our model to also identify the material composition of the containers themselves with 96% accuracy. Overall, VNIR spectroscopy presents a promising method to give household robots a general-purpose ability to infer the liquids inside of containers, without needing to open or manipulate the containers. 液体和颗粒介质在人类环境中普遍存在。它们自由流动的性质导致人们将它们限制在容器中。为此，我们使用了数千种不同类型的容器，这些容器由不同材料制成，具有不同的尺寸、形状和颜色。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种最先进的传感技术，让机器人能够感知未知容器内的液体。我们通过将可见光到近红外 (VNIR) 反射光谱集成到机器人的末端执行器中来实现这一目标。我们引入了一个分层模型，用于根据两个集成光谱仪的光谱测量来推断容器和内部内容物的材料类别。为了训练这些推理模型，我们捕获并开源了 180 多种不同容器和液体组合的光谱测量数据集。我们的技术在识别 13 个不同容器中包含的 13 种不同液体和颗粒介质方面显示出超过 85% 的准确度。我们的光谱读数的灵敏度使我们的模型能够以 96% 的准确度识别容器本身的材料成分。总体而言，VNIR 光谱法提供了一种很有前途的方法，使家用机器人具有推断容器内部液体的通用能力，而无需打开或操作容器。 本文提出一种基于可见光至近红外光谱技术的机器人感知方法，用于识别未知容器内的液体和颗粒物质。 Nathaniel Hanson,Wesley Lewis,Kavya Puthuveetil,Donelle Furline,Akhil Padmanabha,Taşkın Padır,Zackory Erickson cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Zhitong Xiong,Fahong Zhang,Yi Wang,Yilei Shi,Xiao Xiang Zhu
title: EarthNets: Empowering AI in Earth Observation
title_zh: EarthNets：增强人工智能在地球观测中的应用
abstract: Earth observation (EO), aiming at monitoring the state of planet Earth using remote sensing data, is critical for improving our daily lives and living environment. With a growing number of satellites in orbit, an increasing number of datasets with diverse sensors and research domains are being published to facilitate the research of the remote sensing community. This paper presents a comprehensive review of more than 500 publicly published datasets, including research domains like agriculture, land use and land cover, disaster monitoring, scene understanding, vision-language models, foundation models, climate change, and weather forecasting. We systematically analyze these EO datasets from four aspects: volume, resolution distributions, research domains, and the correlation between datasets. Based on the dataset attributes, we propose to measure, rank, and select datasets to build a new benchmark for model evaluation. Furthermore, a new platform for EO, termed EarthNets, is released to achieve a fair and consistent evaluation of deep learning methods on remote sensing data. EarthNets supports standard dataset libraries and cutting-edge deep learning models to bridge the gap between the remote sensing and machine learning communities. Based on this platform, extensive deep-learning methods are evaluated on the new benchmark. The insightful results are beneficial to future research. The platform and dataset collections are publicly available at https://earthnets.github.io.
summary: Earth observation (EO), aiming at monitoring the state of planet Earth using remote sensing data, is critical for improving our daily lives and living environment. With a growing number of satellites in orbit, an increasing number of datasets with diverse sensors and research domains are being published to facilitate the research of the remote sensing community. This paper presents a comprehensive review of more than 500 publicly published datasets, including research domains like agriculture, land use and land cover, disaster monitoring, scene understanding, vision-language models, foundation models, climate change, and weather forecasting. We systematically analyze these EO datasets from four aspects: volume, resolution distributions, research domains, and the correlation between datasets. Based on the dataset attributes, we propose to measure, rank, and select datasets to build a new benchmark for model evaluation. Furthermore, a new platform for EO, termed EarthNets, is released to achieve a fair and consistent evaluation of deep learning methods on remote sensing data. EarthNets supports standard dataset libraries and cutting-edge deep learning models to bridge the gap between the remote sensing and machine learning communities. Based on this platform, extensive deep-learning methods are evaluated on the new benchmark. The insightful results are beneficial to future research. The platform and dataset collections are publicly available at https://earthnets.github.io.
abstract_zh: 地球观测（EO）旨在利用遥感数据监测地球的状况，对于改善我们的日常生活和居住环境至关重要。随着在轨卫星数量的不断增加，越来越多的具有不同传感器和研究领域的数据集正在发布，以促进遥感界的研究。本文对 500 多个公开发布的数据集进行了全面综述，包括农业、土地利用和土地覆盖、灾害监测、场景理解、视觉语言模型、基础模型、气候变化和天气预报等研究领域。我们从数据量、分辨率分布、研究领域和数据集之间的相关性四个方面系统地分析了这些 EO 数据集。基于数据集的属性，我们建议对数据集进行测量、排序和选择，以建立模型评估的新基准。此外，还发布了一个名为 EarthNets 的新 EO 平台，以实现对遥感数据深度学习方法的公平和一致的评估。 EarthNets 支持标准数据集库和尖端深度学习模型，以弥合遥感和机器学习社区之间的差距。基于这个平台，广泛的深度学习方法在新的基准上进行了评估。富有洞察力的结果对未来的研究有益。该平台和数据集集合可在 https://earthnets.github.io 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EarthNets平台，通过系统分析500多个地球观测数据集，建立统一基准以评估深度学习模型在遥感领域的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着卫星数量增加和数据集多样化，缺乏统一基准导致遥感与机器学习社区难以公平评估模型性能，亟需标准化工具促进研究进展。
AI.method: 从数据集的规模、分辨率、研究领域及关联性四个维度进行系统分析，提出数据集评估指标并构建EarthNets平台，集成标准数据集与前沿模型。
AI.result: 在EarthNets平台上评估多种深度学习方法，获得有助于未来研究的洞察，平台及数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: EarthNets通过统一基准和开源平台，推动地球观测领域人工智能技术的标准化评估与跨学科协作。

search_text: EarthNets: Empowering AI in Earth Observation EarthNets：增强人工智能在地球观测中的应用 Earth observation (EO), aiming at monitoring the state of planet Earth using remote sensing data, is critical for improving our daily lives and living environment. With a growing number of satellites in orbit, an increasing number of datasets with diverse sensors and research domains are being published to facilitate the research of the remote sensing community. This paper presents a comprehensive review of more than 500 publicly published datasets, including research domains like agriculture, land use and land cover, disaster monitoring, scene understanding, vision-language models, foundation models, climate change, and weather forecasting. We systematically analyze these EO datasets from four aspects: volume, resolution distributions, research domains, and the correlation between datasets. Based on the dataset attributes, we propose to measure, rank, and select datasets to build a new benchmark for model evaluation. Furthermore, a new platform for EO, termed EarthNets, is released to achieve a fair and consistent evaluation of deep learning methods on remote sensing data. EarthNets supports standard dataset libraries and cutting-edge deep learning models to bridge the gap between the remote sensing and machine learning communities. Based on this platform, extensive deep-learning methods are evaluated on the new benchmark. The insightful results are beneficial to future research. authors_text: Monu Verma,Santosh Kumar Vipparthi,Girdhari Singh
title: Deep Insights of Learning based Micro Expression Recognition: A Perspective on Promises, Challenges and Research Needs
title_zh: 基于微表情识别的学习的深刻见解：前景、挑战和研究需求的视角
abstract: Micro expression recognition (MER) is a very challenging area of research due to its intrinsic nature and fine-grained changes. In the literature, the problem of MER has been solved through handcrafted/descriptor-based techniques. However, in recent times, deep learning (DL) based techniques have been adopted to gain higher performance for MER. Also, rich survey articles on MER are available by summarizing the datasets, experimental settings, conventional and deep learning methods. In contrast, these studies lack the ability to convey the impact of network design paradigms and experimental setting strategies for DL-based MER. Therefore, this paper aims to provide a deep insight into the DL-based MER frameworks with a perspective on promises in network model designing, experimental strategies, challenges, and research needs. Also, the detailed categorization of available MER frameworks is presented in various aspects of model design and technical characteristics. Moreover, an empirical analysis of the experimental and validation protocols adopted by MER methods is presented. The challenges mentioned earlier and network design strategies may assist the affective computing research community in forging ahead in MER research. Finally, we point out the future directions, research needs, and draw our conclusions.
summary: Micro expression recognition (MER) is a very challenging area of research due to its intrinsic nature and fine-grained changes. In the literature, the problem of MER has been solved through handcrafted/descriptor-based techniques. However, in recent times, deep learning (DL) based techniques have been adopted to gain higher performance for MER. Also, rich survey articles on MER are available by summarizing the datasets, experimental settings, conventional and deep learning methods. In contrast, these studies lack the ability to convey the impact of network design paradigms and experimental setting strategies for DL-based MER. Therefore, this paper aims to provide a deep insight into the DL-based MER frameworks with a perspective on promises in network model designing, experimental strategies, challenges, and research needs. Also, the detailed categorization of available MER frameworks is presented in various aspects of model design and technical characteristics. Moreover, an empirical analysis of the experimental and validation protocols adopted by MER methods is presented. The challenges mentioned earlier and network design strategies may assist the affective computing research community in forging ahead in MER research. Finally, we point out the future directions, research needs, and draw our conclusions.
abstract_zh: 微表情识别（MER）由于其固有的性质和细粒度的变化，是一个非常具有挑战性的研究领域。在文献中，MER 的问题已通过手工/基于描述符的技术得到解决。然而，近年来，基于深度学习 (DL) 的技术已被采用来获得更高的 MER 性能。此外，还提供了丰富的 MER 调查文章，总结了数据集、实验设置、传统和深度学习方法。相比之下，这些研究缺乏传达网络设计范式和实验设置策略对基于深度学习的 MER 的影响的能力。因此，本文旨在从网络模型设计、实验策略、挑战和研究需求的前景出发，深入了解基于深度学习的 MER 框架。此外，模型设计和技术特征的各个方面还对可用 MER 框架进行了详细分类。此外，还对 MER 方法采用的实验和验证方案进行了实证分析。前面提到的挑战和网络设计策略可能有助于情感计算研究界在 MER 研究中取得进展。最后，我们指出了未来的方向、研究需求，并得出了我们的结论。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在深入探讨基于深度学习的微表情识别（MER）框架，分析其网络设计范式、实验策略、挑战及研究需求。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对深度学习方法中网络设计范式和实验策略影响的系统分析，阻碍了MER领域的发展。
AI.method: 通过分类总结现有MER框架的模型设计和技术特征，并对实验与验证协议进行实证分析。
AI.result: 详细分类了MER框架的设计维度，揭示了实验策略与网络设计对性能的影响，并指出现有挑战。
AI.conclusion: 该分析为情感计算领域提供了研究方向，明确了未来需解决的关键问题与技术改进需求。

search_text: Deep Insights of Learning based Micro Expression Recognition: A Perspective on Promises, Challenges and Research Needs 基于微表情识别的学习的深刻见解：前景、挑战和研究需求的视角 Micro expression recognition (MER) is a very challenging area of research due to its intrinsic nature and fine-grained changes. In the literature, the problem of MER has been solved through handcrafted/descriptor-based techniques. However, in recent times, deep learning (DL) based techniques have been adopted to gain higher performance for MER. Also, rich survey articles on MER are available by summarizing the datasets, experimental settings, conventional and deep learning methods. In contrast, these studies lack the ability to convey the impact of network design paradigms and experimental setting strategies for DL-based MER. Therefore, this paper aims to provide a deep insight into the DL-based MER frameworks with a perspective on promises in network model designing, experimental strategies, challenges, and research needs. Also, the detailed categorization of available MER frameworks is presented in various aspects of model design and technical characteristics. Moreover, an empirical analysis of the experimental and validation protocols adopted by MER methods is presented. The challenges mentioned earlier and network design strategies may assist the affective computing research community in forging ahead in MER research. Finally, we point out the future directions, research needs, and draw our conclusions. 微表情识别（MER）由于其固有的性质和细粒度的变化，是一个非常具有挑战性的研究领域。在文献中，MER 的问题已通过手工/基于描述符的技术得到解决。然而，近年来，基于深度学习 (DL) 的技术已被采用来获得更高的 MER 性能。此外，还提供了丰富的 MER 调查文章，总结了数据集、实验设置、传统和深度学习方法。相比之下，这些研究缺乏传达网络设计范式和实验设置策略对基于深度学习的 MER 的影响的能力。因此，本文旨在从网络模型设计、实验策略、挑战和研究需求的前景出发，深入了解基于深度学习的 MER 框架。此外，模型设计和技术特征的各个方面还对可用 MER 框架进行了详细分类。此外，还对 MER 方法采用的实验和验证方案进行了实证分析。前面提到的挑战和网络设计策略可能有助于情感计算研究界在 MER 研究中取得进展。最后，我们指出了未来的方向、研究需求，并得出了我们的结论。 本文旨在深入探讨基于深度学习的微表情识别（MER）框架，分析其网络设计范式、实验策略、挑战及研究需求。 Monu Verma,Santosh Kumar Vipparthi,Girdhari Singh cs.CV

authors_text: Kiyoon Kim,Davide Moltisanti,Oisin Mac Aodha,Laura Sevilla-Lara
title: An Action Is Worth Multiple Words: Handling Ambiguity in Action Recognition
title_zh: 一个动作值得多个词：处理动作识别中的歧义
abstract: Precisely naming the action depicted in a video can be a challenging and oftentimes ambiguous task. In contrast to object instances represented as nouns (e.g. dog, cat, chair, etc.), in the case of actions, human annotators typically lack a consensus as to what constitutes a specific action (e.g. jogging versus running). In practice, a given video can contain multiple valid positive annotations for the same action. As a result, video datasets often contain significant levels of label noise and overlap between the atomic action classes. In this work, we address the challenge of training multi-label action recognition models from only single positive training labels. We propose two approaches that are based on generating pseudo training examples sampled from similar instances within the train set. Unlike other approaches that use model-derived pseudo-labels, our pseudo-labels come from human annotations and are selected based on feature similarity. To validate our approaches, we create a new evaluation benchmark by manually annotating a subset of EPIC-Kitchens-100's validation set with multiple verb labels. We present results on this new test set along with additional results on a new version of HMDB-51, called Confusing-HMDB-102, where we outperform existing methods in both cases. Data and code are available at https://github.com/kiyoon/verb_ambiguity
summary: Precisely naming the action depicted in a video can be a challenging and oftentimes ambiguous task. In contrast to object instances represented as nouns (e.g. dog, cat, chair, etc.), in the case of actions, human annotators typically lack a consensus as to what constitutes a specific action (e.g. jogging versus running). In practice, a given video can contain multiple valid positive annotations for the same action. As a result, video datasets often contain significant levels of label noise and overlap between the atomic action classes. In this work, we address the challenge of training multi-label action recognition models from only single positive training labels. We propose two approaches that are based on generating pseudo training examples sampled from similar instances within the train set. Unlike other approaches that use model-derived pseudo-labels, our pseudo-labels come from human annotations and are selected based on feature similarity. To validate our approaches, we create a new evaluation benchmark by manually annotating a subset of EPIC-Kitchens-100's validation set with multiple verb labels. We present results on this new test set along with additional results on a new version of HMDB-51, called Confusing-HMDB-102, where we outperform existing methods in both cases. Data and code are available at https://github.com/kiyoon/verb_ambiguity
abstract_zh: 准确命名视频中描述的动作可能是一项具有挑战性且常常含糊不清的任务。与以名词表示的对象实例（例如狗、猫、椅子等）相比，在动作的情况下，人类注释者通常对具体动作的构成缺乏共识（例如慢跑与跑步）。实际上，给定视频可以包含针对同一动作的多个有效的肯定注释。因此，视频数据集通常包含显着水平的标签噪声以及原子动作类之间的重叠。在这项工作中，我们解决了仅从单个正训练标签训练多标签动作识别模型的挑战。我们提出了两种基于生成从训练集中的相似实例采样的伪训练示例的方法。与使用模型派生伪标签的其他方法不同，我们的伪标签来自人类注释，并根据特征相似性进行选择。为了验证我们的方法，我们通过使用多个动词标签手动注释 EPIC-Kitchens-100 验证集的子集来创建新的评估基准。我们展示了这个新测试集的结果以及新版本 HMDB-51（称为 Confusing-HMDB-102）的其他结果，我们在这两种情况下都优于现有方法。数据和代码可在 https://github.com/kiyoon/verb_ambiguity 获取

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决动作识别中的歧义问题，通过生成伪训练样本提升多标签动作识别模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 动作标签存在人类标注不一致导致的噪声和重叠，传统方法依赖模型生成伪标签难以有效处理此类歧义。
AI.method: 提出两种基于相似实例生成伪样本的方法，利用人类标注的特征相似性选择伪标签，而非依赖模型预测。
AI.result: 在自建的EPIC-Kitchens-100子集和改进版HMDB-51数据集上均优于现有方法，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合人类标注与特征相似性分析，有效缓解了动作标签歧义问题，为多标签动作识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Arunkumar Byravan,Jan Humplik,Leonard Hasenclever,Arthur Brussee,Francesco Nori,Tuomas Haarnoja,Ben Moran,Steven Bohez,Fereshteh Sadeghi,Bojan Vujatovic,Nicolas Heess
title: NeRF2Real: Sim2real Transfer of Vision-guided Bipedal Motion Skills using Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: NeRF2Real：使用神经辐射场进行视觉引导双足运动技能的 Sim2real 迁移
abstract: We present a system for applying sim2real approaches to "in the wild" scenes with realistic visuals, and to policies which rely on active perception using RGB cameras. Given a short video of a static scene collected using a generic phone, we learn the scene's contact geometry and a function for novel view synthesis using a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF). We augment the NeRF rendering of the static scene by overlaying the rendering of other dynamic objects (e.g. the robot's own body, a ball). A simulation is then created using the rendering engine in a physics simulator which computes contact dynamics from the static scene geometry (estimated from the NeRF volume density) and the dynamic objects' geometry and physical properties (assumed known). We demonstrate that we can use this simulation to learn vision-based whole body navigation and ball pushing policies for a 20 degrees of freedom humanoid robot with an actuated head-mounted RGB camera, and we successfully transfer these policies to a real robot. Project video is available at https://sites.google.com/view/nerf2real/home
summary: We present a system for applying sim2real approaches to "in the wild" scenes with realistic visuals, and to policies which rely on active perception using RGB cameras. Given a short video of a static scene collected using a generic phone, we learn the scene's contact geometry and a function for novel view synthesis using a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF). We augment the NeRF rendering of the static scene by overlaying the rendering of other dynamic objects (e.g. the robot's own body, a ball). A simulation is then created using the rendering engine in a physics simulator which computes contact dynamics from the static scene geometry (estimated from the NeRF volume density) and the dynamic objects' geometry and physical properties (assumed known). We demonstrate that we can use this simulation to learn vision-based whole body navigation and ball pushing policies for a 20 degrees of freedom humanoid robot with an actuated head-mounted RGB camera, and we successfully transfer these policies to a real robot. Project video is available at https://sites.google.com/view/nerf2real/home
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个系统，用于将 sim2real 方法应用于具有逼真视觉效果的“野外”场景，以及依赖于使用 RGB 相机的主动感知的策略。给定使用通用手机收集的静态场景的短视频，我们学习场景的接触几何形状以及使用神经辐射场（NeRF）进行新颖视图合成的函数。我们通过叠加其他动态对象（例如机器人自己的身体、球）的渲染来增强静态场景的 NeRF 渲染。然后使用物理模拟器中的渲染引擎创建模拟，该模拟根据静态场景几何形状（根据 NeRF 体积密度估计）和动态对象的几何形状和物理属性（假设已知）计算接触动力学。我们证明，我们可以使用此模拟来学习具有驱动头戴式 RGB 摄像头的 20 自由度人形机器人的基于视觉的全身导航和推球策略，并且我们成功地将这些策略转移到真实的机器人上。项目视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/nerf2real/home 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经辐射场（NeRF）的Sim2Real迁移方法，用于视觉引导的双足机器人运动技能学习，通过静态场景重建与动态物体渲染实现真实环境中的策略迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统Sim2Real方法在复杂真实场景中难以有效建模视觉感知与物理交互，尤其针对依赖RGB相机的主动感知策略存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 利用手机拍摄的静态场景视频，通过NeRF学习场景几何与新视角合成；叠加动态物体（如机器人本体）渲染后，在物理模拟器中构建包含接触动力学的仿真环境，训练并迁移视觉导航与推球策略。
AI.result: 成功将20自由度人形机器人在仿真环境中训练的视觉导航与推球策略迁移至真实机器人，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: NeRF2Real方法通过高保真场景重建与物理模拟，为视觉引导的机器人运动技能Sim2Real迁移提供了可行解决方案。

method: 利用手机拍摄的静态场景视频，通过NeRF学习场景几何与新视角合成；叠加动态物体（如机器人本体）渲染后，在物理模拟器中构建包含接触动力学的仿真环境，训练并迁移视觉导航与推球策略。
result: 成功将20自由度人形机器人在仿真环境中训练的视觉导航与推球策略迁移至真实机器人，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: NeRF2Real方法通过高保真场景重建与物理模拟，为视觉引导的机器人运动技能Sim2Real迁移提供了可行解决方案。
search_text: NeRF2Real: Sim2real Transfer of Vision-guided Bipedal Motion Skills using Neural Radiance Fields NeRF2Real：使用神经辐射场进行视觉引导双足运动技能的 Sim2real 迁移 We present a system for applying sim2real approaches to "in the wild" scenes with realistic visuals, and to policies which rely on active perception using RGB cameras. Given a short video of a static scene collected using a generic phone, we learn the scene's contact geometry and a function for novel view synthesis using a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF). We augment the NeRF rendering of the static scene by overlaying the rendering of other dynamic objects (e.g. the robot's own body, a ball). A simulation is then created using the rendering engine in a physics simulator which computes contact dynamics from the static scene geometry (estimated from the NeRF volume density) and the dynamic objects' geometry and physical properties (assumed known). We demonstrate that we can use this simulation to learn vision-based whole body navigation and ball pushing policies for a 20 degrees of freedom humanoid robot with an actuated head-mounted RGB camera, and we successfully transfer these policies to a real robot. Project video is available at https://sites.google.com/view/nerf2real/home 我们提出了一个系统，用于将 sim2real 方法应用于具有逼真视觉效果的“野外”场景，以及依赖于使用 RGB 相机的主动感知的策略。给定使用通用手机收集的静态场景的短视频，我们学习场景的接触几何形状以及使用神经辐射场（NeRF）进行新颖视图合成的函数。我们通过叠加其他动态对象（例如机器人自己的身体、球）的渲染来增强静态场景的 NeRF 渲染。然后使用物理模拟器中的渲染引擎创建模拟，该模拟根据静态场景几何形状（根据 NeRF 体积密度估计）和动态对象的几何形状和物理属性（假设已知）计算接触动力学。我们证明，我们可以使用此模拟来学习具有驱动头戴式 RGB 摄像头的 20 自由度人形机器人的基于视觉的全身导航和推球策略，并且我们成功地将这些策略转移到真实的机器人上。项目视频可在 https://sites.google.com/view/nerf2real/home 获取 本文提出一种基于神经辐射场（NeRF）的Sim2Real迁移方法，用于视觉引导的双足机器人运动技能学习，通过静态场景重建与动态物体渲染实现真实环境中的策略迁移。 Arunkumar Byravan,Jan Humplik,Leonard Hasenclever,Arthur Brussee,Francesco Nori,Tuomas Haarnoja,Ben Moran,Steven Bohez,Fereshteh Sadeghi,Bojan Vujatovic,Nicolas Heess cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Oussama Jourairi,Muhammet Balcilar,Anne Lambert,François Schnitzler
title: Improving The Reconstruction Quality by Overfitted Decoder Bias in Neural Image Compression
title_zh: 通过神经图像压缩中过度拟合的解码器偏差提高重建质量
abstract: End-to-end trainable models have reached the performance of traditional handcrafted compression techniques on videos and images. Since the parameters of these models are learned over large training sets, they are not optimal for any given image to be compressed. In this paper, we propose an instance-based fine-tuning of a subset of decoder's bias to improve the reconstruction quality in exchange for extra encoding time and minor additional signaling cost. The proposed method is applicable to any end-to-end compression methods, improving the state-of-the-art neural image compression BD-rate by $3-5\%$.
summary: End-to-end trainable models have reached the performance of traditional handcrafted compression techniques on videos and images. Since the parameters of these models are learned over large training sets, they are not optimal for any given image to be compressed. In this paper, we propose an instance-based fine-tuning of a subset of decoder's bias to improve the reconstruction quality in exchange for extra encoding time and minor additional signaling cost. The proposed method is applicable to any end-to-end compression methods, improving the state-of-the-art neural image compression BD-rate by $3-5\%$.
abstract_zh: 端到端可训练模型已经达到了视频和图像上传统手工压缩技术的性能。由于这些模型的参数是通过大型训练集学习的，因此它们对于要压缩的任何给定图像来说并不是最佳的。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于实例的解码器偏差子集的微调，以提高重建质量，以换取额外的编码时间和少量的额外信令成本。所提出的方法适用于任何端到端压缩方法，将最先进的神经图像压缩 BD 率提高了 $3-5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过实例级微调解码器偏差来提升神经图像压缩的重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端压缩模型在大规模数据集上训练，难以针对特定图像达到最优压缩效果。
AI.method: 对解码器部分偏差参数进行实例级微调，在增加少量编码时间与信令开销的前提下优化重建质量。
AI.result: 在神经图像压缩领域将BD-rate指标提升3-5%，且适用于各类端到端压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过针对性优化解码器参数，在压缩效率与重建质量间取得有效平衡。

authors_text: Tengda Han,Weidi Xie,Andrew Zisserman
title: Turbo Training with Token Dropout
title_zh: 带有 Token Dropout 的 Turbo 训练
abstract: The objective of this paper is an efficient training method for video tasks. We make three contributions: (1) We propose Turbo training, a simple and versatile training paradigm for Transformers on multiple video tasks. (2) We illustrate the advantages of Turbo training on action classification, video-language representation learning, and long-video activity classification, showing that Turbo training can largely maintain competitive performance while achieving almost 4X speed-up and significantly less memory consumption. (3) Turbo training enables long-schedule video-language training and end-to-end long-video training, delivering competitive or superior performance than previous works, which were infeasible to train under limited resources.
summary: The objective of this paper is an efficient training method for video tasks. We make three contributions: (1) We propose Turbo training, a simple and versatile training paradigm for Transformers on multiple video tasks. (2) We illustrate the advantages of Turbo training on action classification, video-language representation learning, and long-video activity classification, showing that Turbo training can largely maintain competitive performance while achieving almost 4X speed-up and significantly less memory consumption. (3) Turbo training enables long-schedule video-language training and end-to-end long-video training, delivering competitive or superior performance than previous works, which were infeasible to train under limited resources.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是一种有效的视频任务训练方法。我们做出了三点贡献：（1）我们提出了 Turbo 训练，这是一种针对 Transformers 在多个视频任务上的简单且多功能的训练范例。 （2）我们阐述了 Turbo 训练在动作分类、视频语言表示学习和长视频活动分类方面的优势，表明 Turbo 训练可以在很大程度上保持竞争性能，同时实现近 4 倍的加速和显着减少的内存消耗。 （3）Turbo训练可以实现长时程视频语言训练和端到端长视频训练，提供比以前在有限资源下无法训练的作品有竞争力或更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的Transformer训练方法Turbo Training，结合Token Dropout技术，用于加速视频任务的模型训练。
AI.motivation: 现有视频任务训练方法在资源受限时难以实现长期训练，需更高效的训练范式以提升速度并降低内存消耗。
AI.method: 通过引入Turbo Training框架与Token Dropout机制，设计适用于多种视频任务的通用训练范式，优化Transformer模型的训练效率。
AI.result: 在动作分类、视频-语言学习等任务中实现4倍加速与显著内存节省，且支持长期视频训练，性能优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: Turbo Training有效解决了视频任务训练的效率与资源瓶颈问题，为复杂视频模型训练提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Fangzhou Hong,Zhaoxi Chen,Yushi Lan,Liang Pan,Ziwei Liu
title: EVA3D: Compositional 3D Human Generation from 2D Image Collections
title_zh: EVA3D：从 2D 图像集合合成 3D 人类生成
abstract: Inverse graphics aims to recover 3D models from 2D observations. Utilizing differentiable rendering, recent 3D-aware generative models have shown impressive results of rigid object generation using 2D images. However, it remains challenging to generate articulated objects, like human bodies, due to their complexity and diversity in poses and appearances. In this work, we propose, EVA3D, an unconditional 3D human generative model learned from 2D image collections only. EVA3D can sample 3D humans with detailed geometry and render high-quality images (up to 512x256) without bells and whistles (e.g. super resolution). At the core of EVA3D is a compositional human NeRF representation, which divides the human body into local parts. Each part is represented by an individual volume. This compositional representation enables 1) inherent human priors, 2) adaptive allocation of network parameters, 3) efficient training and rendering. Moreover, to accommodate for the characteristics of sparse 2D human image collections (e.g. imbalanced pose distribution), we propose a pose-guided sampling strategy for better GAN learning. Extensive experiments validate that EVA3D achieves state-of-the-art 3D human generation performance regarding both geometry and texture quality. Notably, EVA3D demonstrates great potential and scalability to "inverse-graphics" diverse human bodies with a clean framework.
summary: Inverse graphics aims to recover 3D models from 2D observations. Utilizing differentiable rendering, recent 3D-aware generative models have shown impressive results of rigid object generation using 2D images. However, it remains challenging to generate articulated objects, like human bodies, due to their complexity and diversity in poses and appearances. In this work, we propose, EVA3D, an unconditional 3D human generative model learned from 2D image collections only. EVA3D can sample 3D humans with detailed geometry and render high-quality images (up to 512x256) without bells and whistles (e.g. super resolution). At the core of EVA3D is a compositional human NeRF representation, which divides the human body into local parts. Each part is represented by an individual volume. This compositional representation enables 1) inherent human priors, 2) adaptive allocation of network parameters, 3) efficient training and rendering. Moreover, to accommodate for the characteristics of sparse 2D human image collections (e.g. imbalanced pose distribution), we propose a pose-guided sampling strategy for better GAN learning. Extensive experiments validate that EVA3D achieves state-of-the-art 3D human generation performance regarding both geometry and texture quality. Notably, EVA3D demonstrates great potential and scalability to "inverse-graphics" diverse human bodies with a clean framework.
abstract_zh: 逆向图形旨在从 2D 观察中恢复 3D 模型。利用可微分渲染，最近的 3D 感知生成模型已经显示出使用 2D 图像生成刚性对象的令人印象深刻的结果。然而，由于其姿势和外观的复杂性和多样性，生成像人体这样的铰接物体仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 EVA3D，一种仅从 2D 图像集合中学习的无条件 3D 人类生成模型。 EVA3D 可以对具有详细几何形状的 3D 人体进行采样，并渲染高质量图像（高达 512x256），而无需附加功能（例如超分辨率）。 EVA3D 的核心是组合人体 NeRF 表示，它将人体划分为局部部分。每个部分都由一个单独的卷表示。这种组合表示能够实现 1) 固有的人类先验，2) 网络参数的自适应分配，3) 高效的训练和渲染。此外，为了适应稀疏 2D 人类图像集合的特征（例如不平衡的姿势分布），我们提出了一种姿势引导采样策略，以实现更好的 GAN 学习。大量实验验证了 EVA3D 在几何和纹理质量方面均实现了最先进的 3D 人类生成性能。值得注意的是，EVA3D 通过干净的框架展示了“反向图形”不同人体的巨大潜力和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVA3D模型，仅从2D图像集合中生成具有精细几何结构和高质量纹理的3D人体模型。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型难以处理人体等复杂可变形物体，因其姿态和外观的多样性及数据分布不均衡问题。
AI.method: 基于组合式NeRF表示，将人体分解为局部体积模块，并设计姿态引导采样策略以优化GAN训练。
AI.result: 在几何精度和纹理质量指标上达到SOTA水平，支持512x256分辨率渲染且无需超分模块。
AI.conclusion: EVA3D通过模块化架构和姿态感知采样有效解决了人体生成难题，为逆图形任务提供了可扩展框架。

search_text: EVA3D: Compositional 3D Human Generation from 2D Image Collections EVA3D：从 2D 图像集合合成 3D 人类生成 Inverse graphics aims to recover 3D models from 2D observations. Utilizing differentiable rendering, recent 3D-aware generative models have shown impressive results of rigid object generation using 2D images. However, it remains challenging to generate articulated objects, like human bodies, due to their complexity and diversity in poses and appearances. In this work, we propose, EVA3D, an unconditional 3D human generative model learned from 2D image collections only. EVA3D can sample 3D humans with detailed geometry and render high-quality images (up to 512x256) without bells and whistles (e.g. super resolution). At the core of EVA3D is a compositional human NeRF representation, which divides the human body into local parts. Each part is represented by an individual volume. This compositional representation enables 1) inherent human priors, 2) adaptive allocation of network parameters, 3) efficient training and rendering. Moreover, to accommodate for the characteristics of sparse 2D human image collections (e.g. imbalanced pose distribution), we propose a pose-guided sampling strategy for better GAN learning. Extensive experiments validate that EVA3D achieves state-of-the-art 3D human generation performance regarding both geometry and texture quality. Notably, EVA3D demonstrates great potential and scalability to "inverse-graphics" diverse human bodies with a clean framework. 逆向图形旨在从 2D 观察中恢复 3D 模型。利用可微分渲染，最近的 3D 感知生成模型已经显示出使用 2D 图像生成刚性对象的令人印象深刻的结果。然而，由于其姿势和外观的复杂性和多样性，生成像人体这样的铰接物体仍然具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 EVA3D，一种仅从 2D 图像集合中学习的无条件 3D 人类生成模型。 EVA3D 可以对具有详细几何形状的 3D 人体进行采样，并渲染高质量图像（高达 512x256），而无需附加功能（例如超分辨率）。 EVA3D 的核心是组合人体 NeRF 表示，它将人体划分为局部部分。每个部分都由一个单独的卷表示。这种组合表示能够实现 1) 固有的人类先验，2) 网络参数的自适应分配，3) 高效的训练和渲染。此外，为了适应稀疏 2D 人类图像集合的特征（例如不平衡的姿势分布），我们提出了一种姿势引导采样策略，以实现更好的 GAN 学习。大量实验验证了 EVA3D 在几何和纹理质量方面均实现了最先进的 3D 人类生成性能。值得注意的是，EVA3D 通过干净的框架展示了“反向图形”不同人体的巨大潜力和可扩展性。 本文提出EVA3D模型，仅从2D图像集合中生成具有精细几何结构和高质量纹理的3D人体模型。 Fangzhou Hong,Zhaoxi Chen,Yushi Lan,Liang Pan,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Haozhi Qi,Ashish Kumar,Roberto Calandra,Yi Ma,Jitendra Malik
title: In-Hand Object Rotation via Rapid Motor Adaptation
title_zh: 通过快速电机适应实现手持物体旋转
abstract: Generalized in-hand manipulation has long been an unsolved challenge of robotics. As a small step towards this grand goal, we demonstrate how to design and learn a simple adaptive controller to achieve in-hand object rotation using only fingertips. The controller is trained entirely in simulation on only cylindrical objects, which then - without any fine-tuning - can be directly deployed to a real robot hand to rotate dozens of objects with diverse sizes, shapes, and weights over the z-axis. This is achieved via rapid online adaptation of the controller to the object properties using only proprioception history. Furthermore, natural and stable finger gaits automatically emerge from training the control policy via reinforcement learning. Code and more videos are available at https://haozhi.io/hora
summary: Generalized in-hand manipulation has long been an unsolved challenge of robotics. As a small step towards this grand goal, we demonstrate how to design and learn a simple adaptive controller to achieve in-hand object rotation using only fingertips. The controller is trained entirely in simulation on only cylindrical objects, which then - without any fine-tuning - can be directly deployed to a real robot hand to rotate dozens of objects with diverse sizes, shapes, and weights over the z-axis. This is achieved via rapid online adaptation of the controller to the object properties using only proprioception history. Furthermore, natural and stable finger gaits automatically emerge from training the control policy via reinforcement learning. Code and more videos are available at https://haozhi.io/hora
abstract_zh: 广义的手动操作长期以来一直是机器人技术未解决的挑战。作为实现这一宏伟目标的一小步，我们演示了如何设计和学习一个简单的自适应控制器，以仅使用指尖实现手持物体旋转。该控制器仅在圆柱形物体上进行完全模拟训练，然后无需任何微调即可直接部署到真实的机器人手上，以在 z 轴上旋转数十个具有不同尺寸、形状和重量的物体。这是通过仅使用本体感觉历史使控制器快速在线适应对象属性来实现的。此外，通过强化学习训练控制策略，自然而稳定的手指步态会自动出现。代码和更多视频请访问 https://haozhi.io/hora

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过快速运动适应实现手部物体旋转的控制器，利用指尖在模拟环境中训练后直接部署到真实机器人手上。
AI.motivation: 通用的手部物体操作一直是机器人领域的未解难题，现有方法难以适应不同形状和重量的物体。
AI.method: 在模拟环境中仅使用圆柱形物体训练自适应控制器，通过触觉反馈实现在线参数调整，并利用强化学习生成自然手指动作模式。
AI.result: 无需微调即可在真实机械手上旋转多种尺寸、形状和重量的物体，沿Z轴实现稳定旋转。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了基于快速在线适应的控制器在通用手部操作任务中的可行性，为复杂物体操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sylvestre-Alvise Rebuffi,Francesco Croce,Sven Gowal
title: Revisiting adapters with adversarial training
title_zh: 通过对抗性训练重新审视适配器
abstract: While adversarial training is generally used as a defense mechanism, recent works show that it can also act as a regularizer. By co-training a neural network on clean and adversarial inputs, it is possible to improve classification accuracy on the clean, non-adversarial inputs. We demonstrate that, contrary to previous findings, it is not necessary to separate batch statistics when co-training on clean and adversarial inputs, and that it is sufficient to use adapters with few domain-specific parameters for each type of input. We establish that using the classification token of a Vision Transformer (ViT) as an adapter is enough to match the classification performance of dual normalization layers, while using significantly less additional parameters. First, we improve upon the top-1 accuracy of a non-adversarially trained ViT-B16 model by +1.12% on ImageNet (reaching 83.76% top-1 accuracy). Second, and more importantly, we show that training with adapters enables model soups through linear combinations of the clean and adversarial tokens. These model soups, which we call adversarial model soups, allow us to trade-off between clean and robust accuracy without sacrificing efficiency. Finally, we show that we can easily adapt the resulting models in the face of distribution shifts. Our ViT-B16 obtains top-1 accuracies on ImageNet variants that are on average +4.00% better than those obtained with Masked Autoencoders.
summary: While adversarial training is generally used as a defense mechanism, recent works show that it can also act as a regularizer. By co-training a neural network on clean and adversarial inputs, it is possible to improve classification accuracy on the clean, non-adversarial inputs. We demonstrate that, contrary to previous findings, it is not necessary to separate batch statistics when co-training on clean and adversarial inputs, and that it is sufficient to use adapters with few domain-specific parameters for each type of input. We establish that using the classification token of a Vision Transformer (ViT) as an adapter is enough to match the classification performance of dual normalization layers, while using significantly less additional parameters. First, we improve upon the top-1 accuracy of a non-adversarially trained ViT-B16 model by +1.12% on ImageNet (reaching 83.76% top-1 accuracy). Second, and more importantly, we show that training with adapters enables model soups through linear combinations of the clean and adversarial tokens. These model soups, which we call adversarial model soups, allow us to trade-off between clean and robust accuracy without sacrificing efficiency. Finally, we show that we can easily adapt the resulting models in the face of distribution shifts. Our ViT-B16 obtains top-1 accuracies on ImageNet variants that are on average +4.00% better than those obtained with Masked Autoencoders.
abstract_zh: 虽然对抗性训练通常被用作防御机制，但最近的研究表明它也可以充当正则化器。通过在干净和对抗性输入上共同训练神经网络，可以提高干净、非对抗性输入的分类准确性。我们证明，与之前的发现相反，在对干净输入和对抗性输入进行联合训练时，没有必要分离批次统计数据，并且对于每种类型的输入使用具有很少域特定参数的适配器就足够了。我们确定，使用视觉变换器（ViT）的分类标记作为适配器足以匹配双归一化层的分类性能，同时使用显着更少的附加参数。首先，我们在 ImageNet 上将非对抗性训练的 ViT-B16 模型的 top-1 准确率提高了 +1.12%（达到 83.76% top-1 准确率）。其次，更重要的是，我们表明，使用适配器进行训练可以通过干净标记和对抗性标记的线性组合来实现模型汤。这些模型汤，我们称之为对抗性模型汤，使我们能够在不牺牲效率的情况下在干净的准确性和鲁棒的准确性之间进行权衡。最后，我们表明，面对分布变化，我们可以轻松地调整所得模型。我们的 ViT-B16 在 ImageNet 变体上获得了 top-1 的准确率，比使用 Masked Autoencoders 获得的准确率平均高出 4.00%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在对抗训练中使用适配器（adapters）以提升视觉Transformer（ViT）模型在干净数据上的分类性能，并提出通过线性组合清洁和对抗性样本的模型汤（model soups）实现准确率的权衡。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练通常作为防御机制使用，但近期研究表明其可作为正则化手段。传统方法需分离批次统计信息且参数较多，本文旨在探索更高效的适配器设计以简化流程并提升性能。
AI.method: 采用ViT的分类token作为适配器，无需分离批次统计信息，通过联合训练清洁与对抗样本，结合线性组合生成对抗模型汤以平衡准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上，ViT-B16模型的top-1准确率提升至83.76%（+1.12%），对抗模型汤在分布偏移场景下表现优于Masked Autoencoders，平均提升4.00%。
AI.conclusion: 适配器与对抗训练结合可显著提升模型效率与鲁棒性，对抗模型汤为准确率权衡提供了新方法，且适应分布偏移的能力更强。

These model soups, which we call adversarial model soups, allow us to trade-off between clean and robust accuracy without sacrificing efficiency. Finally, we show that we can easily adapt the resulting models in the face of distribution shifts. Our ViT-B16 obtains top-1 accuracies on ImageNet variants that are on average +4.00% better than those obtained with Masked Autoencoders. 虽然对抗性训练通常被用作防御机制，但最近的研究表明它也可以充当正则化器。通过在干净和对抗性输入上共同训练神经网络，可以提高干净、非对抗性输入的分类准确性。我们证明，与之前的发现相反，在对干净输入和对抗性输入进行联合训练时，没有必要分离批次统计数据，并且对于每种类型的输入使用具有很少域特定参数的适配器就足够了。我们确定，使用视觉变换器（ViT）的分类标记作为适配器足以匹配双归一化层的分类性能，同时使用显着更少的附加参数。首先，我们在 ImageNet 上将非对抗性训练的 ViT-B16 模型的 top-1 准确率提高了 +1.12%（达到 83.76% top-1 准确率）。其次，更重要的是，我们表明，使用适配器进行训练可以通过干净标记和对抗性标记的线性组合来实现模型汤。这些模型汤，我们称之为对抗性模型汤，使我们能够在不牺牲效率的情况下在干净的准确性和鲁棒的准确性之间进行权衡。最后，我们表明，面对分布变化，我们可以轻松地调整所得模型。我们的 ViT-B16 在 ImageNet 变体上获得了 top-1 的准确率，比使用 Masked Autoencoders 获得的准确率平均高出 4.00%。 本文研究了在对抗训练中使用适配器（adapters）以提升视觉Transformer（ViT）模型在干净数据上的分类性能，并提出通过线性组合清洁和对抗性样本的模型汤（model soups）实现准确率的权衡。 Sylvestre-Alvise Rebuffi,Francesco Croce,Sven Gowal cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Raphael Tang,Linqing Liu,Akshat Pandey,Zhiying Jiang,Gefei Yang,Karun Kumar,Pontus Stenetorp,Jimmy Lin,Ferhan Ture
title: What the DAAM: Interpreting Stable Diffusion Using Cross Attention
title_zh: 什么是 DAAM：使用交叉注意力解释稳定扩散
comment: First two authors contributed equally. 13 pages, 15 figures
comments: First two authors contributed equally. 13 pages, 15 figures
abstract: Large-scale diffusion neural networks represent a substantial milestone in text-to-image generation, but they remain poorly understood, lacking interpretability analyses. In this paper, we perform a text-image attribution analysis on Stable Diffusion, a recently open-sourced model. To produce pixel-level attribution maps, we upscale and aggregate cross-attention word-pixel scores in the denoising subnetwork, naming our method DAAM. We evaluate its correctness by testing its semantic segmentation ability on nouns, as well as its generalized attribution quality on all parts of speech, rated by humans. We then apply DAAM to study the role of syntax in the pixel space, characterizing head--dependent heat map interaction patterns for ten common dependency relations. Finally, we study several semantic phenomena using DAAM, with a focus on feature entanglement, where we find that cohyponyms worsen generation quality and descriptive adjectives attend too broadly. To our knowledge, we are the first to interpret large diffusion models from a visuolinguistic perspective, which enables future lines of research. Our code is at https://github.com/castorini/daam.
summary: Large-scale diffusion neural networks represent a substantial milestone in text-to-image generation, but they remain poorly understood, lacking interpretability analyses. In this paper, we perform a text-image attribution analysis on Stable Diffusion, a recently open-sourced model. To produce pixel-level attribution maps, we upscale and aggregate cross-attention word-pixel scores in the denoising subnetwork, naming our method DAAM. We evaluate its correctness by testing its semantic segmentation ability on nouns, as well as its generalized attribution quality on all parts of speech, rated by humans. We then apply DAAM to study the role of syntax in the pixel space, characterizing head--dependent heat map interaction patterns for ten common dependency relations. Finally, we study several semantic phenomena using DAAM, with a focus on feature entanglement, where we find that cohyponyms worsen generation quality and descriptive adjectives attend too broadly. To our knowledge, we are the first to interpret large diffusion models from a visuolinguistic perspective, which enables future lines of research. Our code is at https://github.com/castorini/daam.
abstract_zh: 大规模扩散神经网络代表了文本到图像生成的一个重要里程碑，但人们对它们仍然知之甚少，缺乏可解释性分析。在本文中，我们对最近开源的稳定扩散模型进行了文本图像归因分析。为了生成像素级归因图，我们在去噪子网络中升级并聚合交叉注意力词像素分数，将我们的方法命名为 DAAM。我们通过测试其对名词的语义分割能力以及其对所有词类的广义归因质量（由人类评分）来评估其正确性。然后，我们应用 DAAM 来研究语法在像素空间中的作用，表征十种常见依赖关系的头部依赖热图交互模式。最后，我们使用 DAAM 研究了几种语义现象，重点是特征纠缠，我们发现同下义词会降低生成质量，并且描述性形容词的参与范围过于广泛。据我们所知，我们是第一个从视觉语言学角度解释大型扩散模型的人，这使得未来的研究成为可能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/castorini/daam。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DAAM方法，通过交叉注意力机制对Stable Diffusion模型进行像素级文本-图像归因分析，探索其可解释性。
AI.motivation: 大型扩散模型在文本到图像生成中取得突破，但其内部机制缺乏可解释性分析，限制了模型理解和优化。
AI.method: 通过放大并聚合去噪子网络中的交叉注意力词-像素得分生成像素级归因图（DAAM），结合语义分割任务和人类评分评估方法有效性，并分析句法结构与语义现象。
AI.result: DAAM在名词语义分割和全词性归因任务中表现良好，发现同义词共现会降低生成质量，描述性形容词注意力范围过广，揭示了十种依存关系的热图交互模式。
AI.conclusion: 首次从视觉语言角度解释扩散模型，为后续研究提供新方向，代码已开源。

authors_text: Nicolas Dufour,David Picard,Vicky Kalogeiton
title: SCAM! Transferring humans between images with Semantic Cross Attention Modulation
title_zh: 骗局！使用语义交叉注意力调制在图像之间转移人类
abstract: A large body of recent work targets semantically conditioned image generation. Most such methods focus on the narrower task of pose transfer and ignore the more challenging task of subject transfer that consists in not only transferring the pose but also the appearance and background. In this work, we introduce SCAM (Semantic Cross Attention Modulation), a system that encodes rich and diverse information in each semantic region of the image (including foreground and background), thus achieving precise generation with emphasis on fine details. This is enabled by the Semantic Attention Transformer Encoder that extracts multiple latent vectors for each semantic region, and the corresponding generator that exploits these multiple latents by using semantic cross attention modulation. It is trained only using a reconstruction setup, while subject transfer is performed at test time. Our analysis shows that our proposed architecture is successful at encoding the diversity of appearance in each semantic region. Extensive experiments on the iDesigner and CelebAMask-HD datasets show that SCAM outperforms SEAN and SPADE; moreover, it sets the new state of the art on subject transfer.
summary: A large body of recent work targets semantically conditioned image generation. Most such methods focus on the narrower task of pose transfer and ignore the more challenging task of subject transfer that consists in not only transferring the pose but also the appearance and background. In this work, we introduce SCAM (Semantic Cross Attention Modulation), a system that encodes rich and diverse information in each semantic region of the image (including foreground and background), thus achieving precise generation with emphasis on fine details. This is enabled by the Semantic Attention Transformer Encoder that extracts multiple latent vectors for each semantic region, and the corresponding generator that exploits these multiple latents by using semantic cross attention modulation. It is trained only using a reconstruction setup, while subject transfer is performed at test time. Our analysis shows that our proposed architecture is successful at encoding the diversity of appearance in each semantic region. Extensive experiments on the iDesigner and CelebAMask-HD datasets show that SCAM outperforms SEAN and SPADE; moreover, it sets the new state of the art on subject transfer.
abstract_zh: 最近的大量工作都针对语义条件图像生成。大多数此类方法专注于姿势转移的较窄任务，而忽略了更具挑战性的主题转移任务，该任务不仅包括转移姿势，还包括转移外观和背景。在这项工作中，我们引入了SCAM（语义交叉注意调制），这是一种在图像的每个语义区域（包括前景和背景）中编码丰富多样的信息的系统，从而实现强调精细细节的精确生成。这是通过语义注意力变换器编码器实现的，该编码器为每个语义区域提取多个潜在向量，以及通过使用语义交叉注意力调制来利用这些多个潜在向量的相应生成器。它仅使用重建设置进行训练，而受试者转移是在测试时执行的。我们的分析表明，我们提出的架构成功地编码了每个语义区域中外观的多样性。在 iDesigner 和 CelebAMask-HD 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，SCAM 优于 SEAN 和 SPADE；此外，它还设定了主题转移的新技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCAM方法，通过语义交叉注意力调制实现图像间的人体主体迁移，包括姿态、外观和背景的精确转换。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多聚焦于姿态迁移任务，忽视了更复杂的主体迁移需求（需同时处理外观与背景），缺乏对语义区域多样性信息的有效编码。
AI.method: 设计语义注意力Transformer编码器提取每个语义区域的多模态潜在向量，并通过语义交叉注意力调制生成器实现精细细节控制，仅依赖重建训练无需额外标注。
AI.result: 在iDesigner和CelebAMask-HD数据集上超越SEAN和SPADE方法，首次在主体迁移任务中达到新SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: SCAM通过语义区域的多潜在向量编码有效捕捉外观多样性，为复杂场景的主体迁移提供了新范式。

authors_text: Francesco Cazzaro,Davide Locatelli,Ariadna Quattoni,Xavier Carreras
title: Translate First Reorder Later: Leveraging Monotonicity in Semantic Parsing
title_zh: 先翻译后重新排序：利用语义解析中的单调性
comment: Accepted at Findings of ACL: EACL 2023. 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
comments: Accepted at Findings of ACL: EACL 2023. 8 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables
abstract: Prior work in semantic parsing has shown that conventional seq2seq models fail at compositional generalization tasks. This limitation led to a resurgence of methods that model alignments between sentences and their corresponding meaning representations, either implicitly through latent variables or explicitly by taking advantage of alignment annotations. We take the second direction and propose TPOL, a two-step approach that first translates input sentences monotonically and then reorders them to obtain the correct output. This is achieved with a modular framework comprising a Translator and a Reorderer component. We test our approach on two popular semantic parsing datasets. Our experiments show that by means of the monotonic translations, TPOL can learn reliable lexico-logical patterns from aligned data, significantly improving compositional generalization both over conventional seq2seq models, as well as over other approaches that exploit gold alignments.
summary: Prior work in semantic parsing has shown that conventional seq2seq models fail at compositional generalization tasks. This limitation led to a resurgence of methods that model alignments between sentences and their corresponding meaning representations, either implicitly through latent variables or explicitly by taking advantage of alignment annotations. We take the second direction and propose TPOL, a two-step approach that first translates input sentences monotonically and then reorders them to obtain the correct output. This is achieved with a modular framework comprising a Translator and a Reorderer component. We test our approach on two popular semantic parsing datasets. Our experiments show that by means of the monotonic translations, TPOL can learn reliable lexico-logical patterns from aligned data, significantly improving compositional generalization both over conventional seq2seq models, as well as over other approaches that exploit gold alignments.
abstract_zh: 语义解析方面的先前工作表明，传统的 seq2seq 模型在组合泛化任务中失败。这种限制导致了对句子及其相应含义表示之间的对齐进行建模的方法的复兴，这些方法要么通过潜在变量隐式地进行，要么通过利用对齐注释显式地进行。我们采取第二个方向并提出 TPOL，这是一种两步方法，首先单调翻译输入句子，然后对它们重新排序以获得正确的输出。这是通过包含翻译器和重新排序器组件的模块化框架来实现的。我们在两个流行的语义解析数据集上测试我们的方法。我们的实验表明，通过单调翻译，TPOL 可以从对齐数据中学习可靠的词汇逻辑模式，与传统的 seq2seq 模型以及利用黄金对齐的其他方法相比，显着提高了组合泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分两步的语义解析方法TPOL，通过先进行单调翻译再重新排序，以解决传统seq2seq模型在组合泛化任务中的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统序列到序列模型在处理需要组合泛化的语义解析任务时表现不佳，而利用对齐信息的方法能更有效捕捉语义结构，但现有方法尚未充分挖掘单调性规律。
AI.method: 设计TPOL框架，包含Translator组件进行单调性翻译和Reorderer组件进行重新排序，通过显式利用对齐注释学习可靠的词法逻辑模式。
AI.result: 在两个主流语义解析数据集上的实验表明，TPOL相比传统seq2seq模型和其他利用黄金对齐的方法，在组合泛化能力上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过分阶段处理和显式对齐建模，TPOL有效利用了单调性规律，为语义解析中的组合泛化问题提供了新的解决方案。
