search_text: Translate First Reorder Later: Leveraging Monotonicity in Semantic Parsing 先翻译后重新排序：利用语义解析中的单调性 Prior work in semantic parsing has shown that conventional seq2seq models fail at compositional generalization tasks. This limitation led to a resurgence of methods that model alignments between sentences and their corresponding meaning representations, either implicitly through latent variables or explicitly by taking advantage of alignment annotations. We take the second direction and propose TPOL, a two-step approach that first translates input sentences monotonically and then reorders them to obtain the correct output. This is achieved with a modular framework comprising a Translator and a Reorderer component. We test our approach on two popular semantic parsing datasets. Our experiments show that by means of the monotonic translations, TPOL can learn reliable lexico-logical patterns from aligned data, significantly improving compositional generalization both over conventional seq2seq models, as well as over other approaches that exploit gold alignments. 语义解析方面的先前工作表明，传统的 seq2seq 模型在组合泛化任务中失败。这种限制导致了对句子及其相应含义表示之间的对齐进行建模的方法的复兴，这些方法要么通过潜在变量隐式地进行，要么通过利用对齐注释显式地进行。我们采取第二个方向并提出 TPOL，这是一种两步方法，首先单调翻译输入句子，然后对它们重新排序以获得正确的输出。这是通过包含翻译器和重新排序器组件的模块化框架来实现的。我们在两个流行的语义解析数据集上测试我们的方法。我们的实验表明，通过单调翻译，TPOL 可以从对齐数据中学习可靠的词汇逻辑模式，与传统的 seq2seq 模型以及利用黄金对齐的其他方法相比，显着提高了组合泛化能力。 本文提出了一种分两步的语义解析方法TPOL，通过先进行单调翻译再重新排序，以解决传统seq2seq模型在组合泛化任务中的不足。 Francesco Cazzaro,Davide Locatelli,Ariadna Quattoni,Xavier Carreras cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Miao Peng,Ben Liu,Qianqian Xie,Wenjie Xu,Hua Wang,Min Peng
title: SMiLE: Schema-augmented Multi-level Contrastive Learning for Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
title_zh: SMiLE：用于知识图链接预测的模式增强多级对比学习
abstract: Link prediction is the task of inferring missing links between entities in knowledge graphs. Embedding-based methods have shown effectiveness in addressing this problem by modeling relational patterns in triples. However, the link prediction task often requires contextual information in entity neighborhoods, while most existing embedding-based methods fail to capture it. Additionally, little attention is paid to the diversity of entity representations in different contexts, which often leads to false prediction results. In this situation, we consider that the schema of knowledge graph contains the specific contextual information, and it is beneficial for preserving the consistency of entities across contexts. In this paper, we propose a novel Schema-augmented Multi-level contrastive LEarning framework (SMiLE) to conduct knowledge graph link prediction. Specifically, we first exploit network schema as the prior constraint to sample negatives and pre-train our model by employing a multi-level contrastive learning method to yield both prior schema and contextual information. Then we fine-tune our model under the supervision of individual triples to learn subtler representations for link prediction. Extensive experimental results on four knowledge graph datasets with thorough analysis of each component demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework against state-of-the-art baselines. The implementation of SMiLE is available at https://github.com/GKNL/SMiLE.
summary: Link prediction is the task of inferring missing links between entities in knowledge graphs. Embedding-based methods have shown effectiveness in addressing this problem by modeling relational patterns in triples. However, the link prediction task often requires contextual information in entity neighborhoods, while most existing embedding-based methods fail to capture it. Additionally, little attention is paid to the diversity of entity representations in different contexts, which often leads to false prediction results. In this situation, we consider that the schema of knowledge graph contains the specific contextual information, and it is beneficial for preserving the consistency of entities across contexts. In this paper, we propose a novel Schema-augmented Multi-level contrastive LEarning framework (SMiLE) to conduct knowledge graph link prediction. Specifically, we first exploit network schema as the prior constraint to sample negatives and pre-train our model by employing a multi-level contrastive learning method to yield both prior schema and contextual information. Then we fine-tune our model under the supervision of individual triples to learn subtler representations for link prediction. Extensive experimental results on four knowledge graph datasets with thorough analysis of each component demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework against state-of-the-art baselines. The implementation of SMiLE is available at https://github.com/GKNL/SMiLE.
abstract_zh: 链接预测是推断知识图中实体之间缺失链接的任务。基于嵌入的方法通过对三元组中的关系模式进行建模，已显示出解决此问题的有效性。然而，链接预测任务通常需要实体邻域中的上下文信息，而大多数现有的基于嵌入的方法无法捕获它。此外，很少关注不同上下文中实体表示的多样性，这常常导致错误的预测结果。在这种情况下，我们认为知识图谱包含特定的上下文信息，有利于保持跨上下文的实体的一致性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的模式增强多级对比学习框架（SMiLE）来进行知识图链接预测。具体来说，我们首先利用网络模式作为样本负数的先验约束，并通过采用多级对比学习方法来预训练我们的模型，以产生先验模式和上下文信息。然后，我们在各个三元组的监督下微调我们的模型，以学习链接预测的更微妙的表示。对四个知识图数据集的广泛实验结果以及对每个组件的彻底分析证明了我们提出的框架相对于最先进基线的有效性。 SMiLE 的实现可在 https://github.com/GKNL/SMiLE 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SMiLE框架，通过结合知识图谱的模式信息和多级对比学习方法，改进知识图谱的链接预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入方法在链接预测中难以捕捉实体邻域的上下文信息，且忽视了不同上下文中实体表示的多样性，导致预测结果不准确。知识图谱的模式信息可提供上下文一致性约束，但未被充分应用。
AI.method: 提出SMiLE框架，利用知识图谱模式作为先验约束进行负样本采样和预训练，通过多级对比学习融合模式信息与上下文信息，再基于三元组监督微调模型以学习更精细的表示。
AI.result: 在四个知识图谱数据集上的实验表明，SMiLE在链接预测任务中优于现有先进基线方法，组件分析验证了各模块的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SMiLE通过整合模式信息与多级对比学习，有效提升了知识图谱链接预测的准确性，代码已开源。

authors_text: Krish Kabra,Alexander Xiong,Wenbin Li,Minxuan Luo,William Lu,Raul Garcia,Dhananjay Vijay,Jiahui Yu,Maojie Tang,Tianjiao Yu,Hank Arnold,Anna Vallery,Richard Gibbons,Arko Barman
title: Deep object detection for waterbird monitoring using aerial imagery
title_zh: 使用航空图像进行水鸟监测的深度物体检测
comment: Longer version of accepted short paper at 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA'22). 7 pages, 5 figures
comments: Longer version of accepted short paper at 21st IEEE International Conference on Machine Learning and Applications (ICMLA'22). 7 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Monitoring of colonial waterbird nesting islands is essential to tracking waterbird population trends, which are used for evaluating ecosystem health and informing conservation management decisions. Recently, unmanned aerial vehicles, or drones, have emerged as a viable technology to precisely monitor waterbird colonies. However, manually counting waterbirds from hundreds, or potentially thousands, of aerial images is both difficult and time-consuming. In this work, we present a deep learning pipeline that can be used to precisely detect, count, and monitor waterbirds using aerial imagery collected by a commercial drone. By utilizing convolutional neural network-based object detectors, we show that we can detect 16 classes of waterbird species that are commonly found in colonial nesting islands along the Texas coast. Our experiments using Faster R-CNN and RetinaNet object detectors give mean interpolated average precision scores of 67.9% and 63.1% respectively.
summary: Monitoring of colonial waterbird nesting islands is essential to tracking waterbird population trends, which are used for evaluating ecosystem health and informing conservation management decisions. Recently, unmanned aerial vehicles, or drones, have emerged as a viable technology to precisely monitor waterbird colonies. However, manually counting waterbirds from hundreds, or potentially thousands, of aerial images is both difficult and time-consuming. In this work, we present a deep learning pipeline that can be used to precisely detect, count, and monitor waterbirds using aerial imagery collected by a commercial drone. By utilizing convolutional neural network-based object detectors, we show that we can detect 16 classes of waterbird species that are commonly found in colonial nesting islands along the Texas coast. Our experiments using Faster R-CNN and RetinaNet object detectors give mean interpolated average precision scores of 67.9% and 63.1% respectively.
abstract_zh: 监测殖民地水鸟筑巢岛屿对于跟踪水鸟种群趋势至关重要，水鸟种群趋势可用于评估生态系统健康状况并为保护管理决策提供信息。最近，无人机已成为精确监测水鸟群落的可行技术。然而，从数百甚至数千张航空图像中手动计算水鸟既困难又耗时。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个深度学习管道，可用于使用商用无人机收集的航空图像来精确检测、计数和监控水鸟。通过利用基于卷积神经网络的物体检测器，我们证明可以检测德克萨斯州海岸殖民地筑巢岛屿中常见的 16 类水鸟物种。我们使用 Faster R-CNN 和 RetinaNet 目标检测器进行的实验给出的插值平均精度分数分别为 67.9% 和 63.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的水鸟监测方法，利用航拍图像自动检测和统计水鸟数量。
AI.motivation: 手动统计航拍图像中的水鸟耗时且困难，需自动化方法提高效率和准确性以支持生态监测与保护决策。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）目标检测模型Faster R-CNN和RetinaNet，处理无人机采集的航拍图像以识别16类水鸟。
AI.result: Faster R-CNN和RetinaNet在测试中分别达到67.9%和63.1%的平均插值精度。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法可有效检测多种水鸟，为生态健康评估和保护管理提供可靠数据支持。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的水鸟监测方法，利用航拍图像自动检测和统计水鸟数量。
ai_content.motivation: 手动统计航拍图像中的水鸟耗时且困难，需自动化方法提高效率和准确性以支持生态监测与保护决策。
ai_content.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）目标检测模型Faster R-CNN和RetinaNet，处理无人机采集的航拍图像以识别16类水鸟。
ai_content.result: Faster R-CNN和RetinaNet在测试中分别达到67.9%和63.1%的平均插值精度。

search_text: Deep object detection for waterbird monitoring using aerial imagery 使用航空图像进行水鸟监测的深度物体检测 Monitoring of colonial waterbird nesting islands is essential to tracking waterbird population trends, which are used for evaluating ecosystem health and informing conservation management decisions. Recently, unmanned aerial vehicles, or drones, have emerged as a viable technology to precisely monitor waterbird colonies. However, manually counting waterbirds from hundreds, or potentially thousands, of aerial images is both difficult and time-consuming. In this work, we present a deep learning pipeline that can be used to precisely detect, count, and monitor waterbirds using aerial imagery collected by a commercial drone. By utilizing convolutional neural network-based object detectors, we show that we can detect 16 classes of waterbird species that are commonly found in colonial nesting islands along the Texas coast. Our experiments using Faster R-CNN and RetinaNet object detectors give mean interpolated average precision scores of 67.9% and 63.1% respectively. 监测殖民地水鸟筑巢岛屿对于跟踪水鸟种群趋势至关重要，水鸟种群趋势可用于评估生态系统健康状况并为保护管理决策提供信息。最近，无人机已成为精确监测水鸟群落的可行技术。然而，从数百甚至数千张航空图像中手动计算水鸟既困难又耗时。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个深度学习管道，可用于使用商用无人机收集的航空图像来精确检测、计数和监控水鸟。通过利用基于卷积神经网络的物体检测器，我们证明可以检测德克萨斯州海岸殖民地筑巢岛屿中常见的 16 类水鸟物种。我们使用 Faster R-CNN 和 RetinaNet 目标检测器进行的实验给出的插值平均精度分数分别为 67.9% 和 63.1%。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的水鸟监测方法，利用航拍图像自动检测和统计水鸟数量。 Krish Kabra,Alexander Xiong,Wenbin Li,Minxuan Luo,William Lu,Raul Garcia,Dhananjay Vijay,Jiahui Yu,Maojie Tang,Tianjiao Yu,Hank Arnold,Anna Vallery,Richard Gibbons,Arko Barman cs.CV

authors_text: Nicolas Bähler,Majed El Helou,Étienne Objois,Kaan Okumuş,Sabine Süsstrunk
title: PoGaIN: Poisson-Gaussian Image Noise Modeling from Paired Samples
title_zh: PoGaIN：基于配对样本的泊松-高斯图像噪声建模
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, and 3 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/IVRL/PoGaIN
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, and 3 tables. Code is available at https://github.com/IVRL/PoGaIN
abstract: Image noise can often be accurately fitted to a Poisson-Gaussian distribution. However, estimating the distribution parameters from a noisy image only is a challenging task. Here, we study the case when paired noisy and noise-free samples are accessible. No method is currently available to exploit the noise-free information, which may help to achieve more accurate estimations. To fill this gap, we derive a novel, cumulant-based, approach for Poisson-Gaussian noise modeling from paired image samples. We show its improved performance over different baselines, with special emphasis on MSE, effect of outliers, image dependence, and bias. We additionally derive the log-likelihood function for further insights and discuss real-world applicability.
summary: Image noise can often be accurately fitted to a Poisson-Gaussian distribution. However, estimating the distribution parameters from a noisy image only is a challenging task. Here, we study the case when paired noisy and noise-free samples are accessible. No method is currently available to exploit the noise-free information, which may help to achieve more accurate estimations. To fill this gap, we derive a novel, cumulant-based, approach for Poisson-Gaussian noise modeling from paired image samples. We show its improved performance over different baselines, with special emphasis on MSE, effect of outliers, image dependence, and bias. We additionally derive the log-likelihood function for further insights and discuss real-world applicability.
abstract_zh: 图像噪声通常可以精确地拟合到泊松高斯分布。然而，仅从噪声图像估计分布参数是一项具有挑战性的任务。在这里，我们研究了可以访问配对的噪声和无噪声样本的情况。目前还没有方法可以利用无噪声信息，这可能有助于实现更准确的估计。为了填补这一空白，我们推导出一种新颖的、基于累积量的方法，用于从成对图像样本中进行泊松-高斯噪声建模。我们展示了它在不同基线上的改进性能，特别强调 MSE、异常值的影响、图像依赖性和偏差。我们还推导了对数似然函数以获得进一步的见解并讨论现实世界的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于累积量的泊松-高斯图像噪声建模方法，利用配对的噪声与无噪声图像样本提升参数估计准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以仅从噪声图像准确估计泊松-高斯分布参数，而配对样本中的无噪声信息未被有效利用，导致估计偏差较大。
AI.method: 推导基于累积量的新型配对样本建模方法，并建立对数似然函数以分析实际应用效果。
AI.result: 新方法在均方误差、异常值鲁棒性、图像依赖性及偏差指标上优于基线方法，验证了实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效利用配对样本中的无噪声信息，该方法显著提升了泊松-高斯噪声参数估计的准确性与稳定性。

authors_text: Sebastián Basterrech,Michal Woźniak
title: Tracking changes using Kullback-Leibler divergence for the continual learning
title_zh: 使用 Kullback-Leibler 散度跟踪变化以进行持续学习
comment: Accepted manuscript in SMC 2022, it will be published in the IEEE digital library
comments: Accepted manuscript in SMC 2022, it will be published in the IEEE digital library
abstract: Recently, continual learning has received a lot of attention. One of the significant problems is the occurrence of \emph{concept drift}, which consists of changing probabilistic characteristics of the incoming data. In the case of the classification task, this phenomenon destabilizes the model's performance and negatively affects the achieved prediction quality. Most current methods apply statistical learning and similarity analysis over the raw data. However, similarity analysis in streaming data remains a complex problem due to time limitation, non-precise values, fast decision speed, scalability, etc. This article introduces a novel method for monitoring changes in the probabilistic distribution of multi-dimensional data streams. As a measure of the rapidity of changes, we analyze the popular Kullback-Leibler divergence. During the experimental study, we show how to use this metric to predict the concept drift occurrence and understand its nature. The obtained results encourage further work on the proposed methods and its application in the real tasks where the prediction of the future appearance of concept drift plays a crucial role, such as predictive maintenance.
summary: Recently, continual learning has received a lot of attention. One of the significant problems is the occurrence of \emph{concept drift}, which consists of changing probabilistic characteristics of the incoming data. In the case of the classification task, this phenomenon destabilizes the model's performance and negatively affects the achieved prediction quality. Most current methods apply statistical learning and similarity analysis over the raw data. However, similarity analysis in streaming data remains a complex problem due to time limitation, non-precise values, fast decision speed, scalability, etc. This article introduces a novel method for monitoring changes in the probabilistic distribution of multi-dimensional data streams. As a measure of the rapidity of changes, we analyze the popular Kullback-Leibler divergence. During the experimental study, we show how to use this metric to predict the concept drift occurrence and understand its nature. The obtained results encourage further work on the proposed methods and its application in the real tasks where the prediction of the future appearance of concept drift plays a crucial role, such as predictive maintenance.
abstract_zh: 最近，持续学习受到了很多关注。重要的问题之一是\emph{概念漂移}的出现，它包括输入数据的概率特征的变化。在分类任务中，这种现象会破坏模型性能的稳定性并对所实现的预测质量产生负面影响。当前大多数方法对原始数据应用统计学习和相似性分析。然而，由于时间限制、非精确值、决策速度快、可扩展性等原因，流数据中的相似性分析仍然是一个复杂的问题。本文介绍了一种监测多维数据流概率分布变化的新方法。作为变化速度的衡量标准，我们分析了流行的 Kullback-Leibler 背离。在实验研究中，我们展示了如何使用这个指标来预测概念漂移的发生并理解其本质。所获得的结果鼓励进一步研究所提出的方法及其在实际任务中的应用，其中概念漂移的未来出现的预测起着至关重要的作用，例如预测性维护。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Kullback-Leibler散度的方法，用于监测多维数据流中的概率分布变化，以解决持续学习中的概念漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有概念漂移检测方法在处理流数据时面临时间限制、非精确值和可扩展性等挑战，需更有效的分布变化监测手段。
AI.method: 通过分析Kullback-Leibler散度作为变化速度指标，监测数据流概率分布变化，并利用实验验证其预测概念漂移的能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效预测概念漂移的发生及性质，为预测性维护等实际应用提供支持。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在概念漂移预测中表现良好，具有实际应用潜力，需进一步优化和拓展其应用场景。

authors_text: Meera Hahn,James M. Rehg
title: Transformer-based Localization from Embodied Dialog with Large-scale Pre-training
title_zh: 通过大规模预训练实现基于 Transformer 的嵌入式对话本地化
comment: ef:International Joint Conference on Natural Language Processing (2022)
comments: ef:International Joint Conference on Natural Language Processing (2022)
abstract: We address the challenging task of Localization via Embodied Dialog (LED). Given a dialog from two agents, an Observer navigating through an unknown environment and a Locator who is attempting to identify the Observer's location, the goal is to predict the Observer's final location in a map. We develop a novel LED-Bert architecture and present an effective pretraining strategy. We show that a graph-based scene representation is more effective than the top-down 2D maps used in prior works. Our approach outperforms previous baselines.
summary: We address the challenging task of Localization via Embodied Dialog (LED). Given a dialog from two agents, an Observer navigating through an unknown environment and a Locator who is attempting to identify the Observer's location, the goal is to predict the Observer's final location in a map. We develop a novel LED-Bert architecture and present an effective pretraining strategy. We show that a graph-based scene representation is more effective than the top-down 2D maps used in prior works. Our approach outperforms previous baselines.
abstract_zh: 我们通过嵌入对话 (LED) 解决具有挑战性的本地化任务。给定两个代理的对话，一个在未知环境中导航的观察者和一个试图识别观察者位置的定位器，目标是预测观察者在地图中的最终位置。我们开发了一种新颖的 LED-Bert 架构并提出了有效的预训练策略。我们证明基于图的场景表示比先前作品中使用的自上而下的二维地图更有效。我们的方法优于以前的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的LED-Bert架构，通过具身对话预测观察者在未知环境中的最终位置。
AI.motivation: 传统顶向下2D地图在定位任务中表现不足，需探索更有效的场景表示方法以提升对话定位准确性。
AI.method: 设计LED-Bert模型结合图结构场景表示，采用大规模预训练策略优化对话与空间信息的联合建模。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，基于图结构的方法显著优于传统2D地图表示的基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 图结构场景表示能更有效捕捉环境空间关系，LED-Bert框架为对话定位任务提供了新解决方案。

search_text: Transformer-based Localization from Embodied Dialog with Large-scale Pre-training 通过大规模预训练实现基于 Transformer 的嵌入式对话本地化 We address the challenging task of Localization via Embodied Dialog (LED). Given a dialog from two agents, an Observer navigating through an unknown environment and a Locator who is attempting to identify the Observer's location, the goal is to predict the Observer's final location in a map. We develop a novel LED-Bert architecture and present an effective pretraining strategy. We show that a graph-based scene representation is more effective than the top-down 2D maps used in prior works. Our approach outperforms previous baselines. 我们通过嵌入对话 (LED) 解决具有挑战性的本地化任务。给定两个代理的对话，一个在未知环境中导航的观察者和一个试图识别观察者位置的定位器，目标是预测观察者在地图中的最终位置。我们开发了一种新颖的 LED-Bert 架构并提出了有效的预训练策略。我们证明基于图的场景表示比先前作品中使用的自上而下的二维地图更有效。我们的方法优于以前的基线。 本文提出一种基于Transformer的LED-Bert架构，通过具身对话预测观察者在未知环境中的最终位置。 Meera Hahn,James M. Rehg cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Atish Agarwala,Fabian Pedregosa,Jeffrey Pennington
title: Second-order regression models exhibit progressive sharpening to the edge of stability
title_zh: 二阶回归模型表现出逐渐锐化到稳定边缘
abstract: Recent studies of gradient descent with large step sizes have shown that there is often a regime with an initial increase in the largest eigenvalue of the loss Hessian (progressive sharpening), followed by a stabilization of the eigenvalue near the maximum value which allows convergence (edge of stability). These phenomena are intrinsically non-linear and do not happen for models in the constant Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) regime, for which the predictive function is approximately linear in the parameters. As such, we consider the next simplest class of predictive models, namely those that are quadratic in the parameters, which we call second-order regression models. For quadratic objectives in two dimensions, we prove that this second-order regression model exhibits progressive sharpening of the NTK eigenvalue towards a value that differs slightly from the edge of stability, which we explicitly compute. In higher dimensions, the model generically shows similar behavior, even without the specific structure of a neural network, suggesting that progressive sharpening and edge-of-stability behavior aren't unique features of neural networks, and could be a more general property of discrete learning algorithms in high-dimensional non-linear models.
summary: Recent studies of gradient descent with large step sizes have shown that there is often a regime with an initial increase in the largest eigenvalue of the loss Hessian (progressive sharpening), followed by a stabilization of the eigenvalue near the maximum value which allows convergence (edge of stability). These phenomena are intrinsically non-linear and do not happen for models in the constant Neural Tangent Kernel (NTK) regime, for which the predictive function is approximately linear in the parameters. As such, we consider the next simplest class of predictive models, namely those that are quadratic in the parameters, which we call second-order regression models. For quadratic objectives in two dimensions, we prove that this second-order regression model exhibits progressive sharpening of the NTK eigenvalue towards a value that differs slightly from the edge of stability, which we explicitly compute. In higher dimensions, the model generically shows similar behavior, even without the specific structure of a neural network, suggesting that progressive sharpening and edge-of-stability behavior aren't unique features of neural networks, and could be a more general property of discrete learning algorithms in high-dimensional non-linear models.
abstract_zh: 最近对大步长梯度下降的研究表明，通常存在一种情况，损失 Hessian 的最大特征值初始增加（渐进锐化），然后特征值稳定在最大值附近，从而允许收敛（稳定边缘）。这些现象本质上是非线性的，并且对于恒定神经正切核 (NTK) 体系中的模型不会发生，对于该体系，预测函数的参数近似线性。因此，我们考虑下一个最简单的预测模型，即参数为二次的模型，我们称之为二阶回归模型。对于二维二次目标，我们证明这个二阶回归模型表现出 NTK 特征值逐渐锐化到与我们明确计算的稳定性边缘略有不同的值。在更高维度中，即使没有神经网络的特定结构，该模型通常也会表现出类似的行为，这表明渐进锐化和稳定性边缘行为并不是神经网络的独特特征，并且可能是高维非线性模型中离散学习算法的更普遍的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了二阶回归模型在梯度下降过程中的损失函数海森矩阵最大特征值的渐进锐化现象及其向稳定性边缘的演变规律。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现神经网络在梯度下降过程中会出现特征值渐进锐化现象，但该现象在恒定神经切线核（NTK）线性模型中不存在，因此需要研究更一般的非线性模型以揭示其普遍性。
AI.method: 通过构建参数二次型的二阶回归模型，分析二维及高维空间中损失函数的海森矩阵特征值变化规律，并进行理论证明与数值验证。
AI.result: 在二维参数空间中严格证明二阶回归模型存在渐进锐化现象，且特征值趋近于稳定性边缘的明确数值；高维情况下该现象具有通用性，与神经网络结构无关。
AI.conclusion: 渐进锐化与稳定性边缘行为并非神经网络特有，而是高维非线性离散学习算法的普遍特性，为理解机器学习优化动态提供了新视角。

authors_text: Zifan Xu,Anirudh Nair,Xuesu Xiao,Peter Stone
title: Learning Real-world Autonomous Navigation by Self-Supervised Environment Synthesis
title_zh: 通过自监督环境综合学习现实世界自主导航
abstract: Machine learning approaches have recently enabled autonomous navigation for mobile robots in a data-driven manner. Since most existing learning-based navigation systems are trained with data generated in artificially created training environments, during real-world deployment at scale, it is inevitable that robots will encounter unseen scenarios, which are out of the training distribution and therefore lead to poor real-world performance. On the other hand, directly training in the real world is generally unsafe and inefficient. To address this issue, we introduce Self-supervised Environment Synthesis (SES), in which, after real-world deployment with safety and efficiency requirements, autonomous mobile robots can utilize experience from the real-world deployment, reconstruct navigation scenarios, and synthesize representative training environments in simulation. Training in these synthesized environments leads to improved future performance in the real world. The effectiveness of SES at synthesizing representative simulation environments and improving real-world navigation performance is evaluated via a large-scale deployment in a high-fidelity, realistic simulator and a small-scale deployment on a physical robot.
summary: Machine learning approaches have recently enabled autonomous navigation for mobile robots in a data-driven manner. Since most existing learning-based navigation systems are trained with data generated in artificially created training environments, during real-world deployment at scale, it is inevitable that robots will encounter unseen scenarios, which are out of the training distribution and therefore lead to poor real-world performance. On the other hand, directly training in the real world is generally unsafe and inefficient. To address this issue, we introduce Self-supervised Environment Synthesis (SES), in which, after real-world deployment with safety and efficiency requirements, autonomous mobile robots can utilize experience from the real-world deployment, reconstruct navigation scenarios, and synthesize representative training environments in simulation. Training in these synthesized environments leads to improved future performance in the real world. The effectiveness of SES at synthesizing representative simulation environments and improving real-world navigation performance is evaluated via a large-scale deployment in a high-fidelity, realistic simulator and a small-scale deployment on a physical robot.
abstract_zh: 机器学习方法最近以数据驱动的方式实现了移动机器人的自主导航。由于大多数现有的基于学习的导航系统都是使用人工创建的训练环境中生成的数据进行训练的，因此在大规模实际部署过程中，机器人不可避免地会遇到未见过的场景，这些场景超出了训练分布，从而导致实际性能不佳。另一方面，直接在现实世界中进行训练通常是不安全且低效的。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了自监督环境综合（SES），在具有安全性和效率要求的现实世界部署后，自主移动机器人可以利用现实世界部署的经验，重建导航场景，并在模拟中综合代表性的训练环境。在这些综合环境中进行训练可以提高未来在现实世界中的表现。通过在高保真、真实模拟器中的大规模部署和在物理机器人上的小规模部署，评估 SES 在合成代表性仿真环境和提高现实世界导航性能方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出自监督环境合成（SES）方法，解决自主导航在真实世界部署时因训练数据分布不匹配导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的导航系统因依赖人工生成的训练环境，导致在真实世界中遇到未见场景时性能下降，而直接在真实世界训练存在安全和效率问题。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习，利用真实部署中的经验重建导航场景，合成代表性的模拟环境用于训练，从而提升真实世界的导航性能。
AI.result: 在高保真模拟器和物理机器人上的实验表明，SES能有效合成代表性环境并提升真实世界导航性能。
AI.conclusion: SES方法有效解决了训练数据分布不匹配问题，为自主导航在真实世界中的应用提供了新的解决方案。

To address this issue, we introduce Self-supervised Environment Synthesis (SES), in which, after real-world deployment with safety and efficiency requirements, autonomous mobile robots can utilize experience from the real-world deployment, reconstruct navigation scenarios, and synthesize representative training environments in simulation. Training in these synthesized environments leads to improved future performance in the real world. The effectiveness of SES at synthesizing representative simulation environments and improving real-world navigation performance is evaluated via a large-scale deployment in a high-fidelity, realistic simulator and a small-scale deployment on a physical robot. 机器学习方法最近以数据驱动的方式实现了移动机器人的自主导航。由于大多数现有的基于学习的导航系统都是使用人工创建的训练环境中生成的数据进行训练的，因此在大规模实际部署过程中，机器人不可避免地会遇到未见过的场景，这些场景超出了训练分布，从而导致实际性能不佳。另一方面，直接在现实世界中进行训练通常是不安全且低效的。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了自监督环境综合（SES），在具有安全性和效率要求的现实世界部署后，自主移动机器人可以利用现实世界部署的经验，重建导航场景，并在模拟中综合代表性的训练环境。在这些综合环境中进行训练可以提高未来在现实世界中的表现。通过在高保真、真实模拟器中的大规模部署和在物理机器人上的小规模部署，评估 SES 在合成代表性仿真环境和提高现实世界导航性能方面的有效性。 提出自监督环境合成（SES）方法，解决自主导航在真实世界部署时因训练数据分布不匹配导致的性能问题。 Zifan Xu,Anirudh Nair,Xuesu Xiao,Peter Stone cs.RO

authors_text: Ruilong Li,Matthew Tancik,Angjoo Kanazawa
title: NerfAcc: A General NeRF Acceleration Toolbox
title_zh: NerfAcc：通用 NeRF 加速工具箱
abstract: We propose NerfAcc, a toolbox for efficient volumetric rendering of radiance fields. We build on the techniques proposed in Instant-NGP, and extend these techniques to not only support bounded static scenes, but also for dynamic scenes and unbounded scenes. NerfAcc comes with a user-friendly Python API, and is ready for plug-and-play acceleration of most NeRFs. Various examples are provided to show how to use this toolbox. Code can be found here: https://github.com/KAIR-BAIR/nerfacc. Note this write-up matches with NerfAcc v0.3.5. For the latest features in NerfAcc, please check out our more recent write-up at arXiv:2305.04966
summary: We propose NerfAcc, a toolbox for efficient volumetric rendering of radiance fields. We build on the techniques proposed in Instant-NGP, and extend these techniques to not only support bounded static scenes, but also for dynamic scenes and unbounded scenes. NerfAcc comes with a user-friendly Python API, and is ready for plug-and-play acceleration of most NeRFs. Various examples are provided to show how to use this toolbox. Code can be found here: https://github.com/KAIR-BAIR/nerfacc. Note this write-up matches with NerfAcc v0.3.5. For the latest features in NerfAcc, please check out our more recent write-up at arXiv:2305.04966
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 NerfAcc，一个用于辐射场高效体积渲染的工具箱。我们以 Instant-NGP 中提出的技术为基础，并将这些技术扩展为不仅支持有界静态场景，而且还支持动态场景和无界场景。 NerfAcc 附带用户友好的 Python API，可对大多数 NeRF 进行即插即用加速。提供了各种示例来展示如何使用此工具箱。代码可以在这里找到：https://github.com/KAIR-BAIR/nerfacc。请注意，此文章与 NerfAcc v0.3.5 匹配。有关 NerfAcc 的最新功能，请查看我们在 arXiv 上的最新文章：2305.04966

AI.tldr: 提出NerfAcc工具箱，实现对静态、动态及无界场景的NeRF高效体渲染加速。
AI.motivation: 现有NeRF加速方法多局限于静态或有界场景，缺乏对动态场景和无界场景的通用支持，且需更友好的使用接口。
AI.method: 基于Instant-NGP技术，通过优化体积渲染算法并扩展至动态/无界场景，提供Python API实现模块化加速。
AI.result: 验证了工具箱在多种场景下的有效性，提供代码示例及GitHub开源实现（v0.3.5），支持主流NeRF模型加速。
AI.conclusion: NerfAcc作为通用加速框架，显著提升了NeRF在复杂场景下的渲染效率，且具备良好的可扩展性与易用性。

authors_text: Adrian Bulat,Ricardo Guerrero,Brais Martinez,Georgios Tzimiropoulos
title: FS-DETR: Few-Shot DEtection TRansformer with prompting and without re-training
title_zh: FS-DETR：具有提示且无需重新训练的少样本检测变换器
abstract: This paper is on Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD), where given a few templates (examples) depicting a novel class (not seen during training), the goal is to detect all of its occurrences within a set of images. From a practical perspective, an FSOD system must fulfil the following desiderata: (a) it must be used as is, without requiring any fine-tuning at test time, (b) it must be able to process an arbitrary number of novel objects concurrently while supporting an arbitrary number of examples from each class and (c) it must achieve accuracy comparable to a closed system. Towards satisfying (a)-(c), in this work, we make the following contributions: We introduce, for the first time, a simple, yet powerful, few-shot detection transformer (FS-DETR) based on visual prompting that can address both desiderata (a) and (b). Our system builds upon the DETR framework, extending it based on two key ideas: (1) feed the provided visual templates of the novel classes as visual prompts during test time, and (2) ``stamp'' these prompts with pseudo-class embeddings (akin to soft prompting), which are then predicted at the output of the decoder. Importantly, we show that our system is not only more flexible than existing methods, but also, it makes a step towards satisfying desideratum (c). Specifically, it is significantly more accurate than all methods that do not require fine-tuning and even matches and outperforms the current state-of-the-art fine-tuning based methods on the most well-established benchmarks (PASCAL VOC & MSCOCO).
summary: This paper is on Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD), where given a few templates (examples) depicting a novel class (not seen during training), the goal is to detect all of its occurrences within a set of images. From a practical perspective, an FSOD system must fulfil the following desiderata: (a) it must be used as is, without requiring any fine-tuning at test time, (b) it must be able to process an arbitrary number of novel objects concurrently while supporting an arbitrary number of examples from each class and (c) it must achieve accuracy comparable to a closed system. Towards satisfying (a)-(c), in this work, we make the following contributions: We introduce, for the first time, a simple, yet powerful, few-shot detection transformer (FS-DETR) based on visual prompting that can address both desiderata (a) and (b). Our system builds upon the DETR framework, extending it based on two key ideas: (1) feed the provided visual templates of the novel classes as visual prompts during test time, and (2) ``stamp'' these prompts with pseudo-class embeddings (akin to soft prompting), which are then predicted at the output of the decoder. Importantly, we show that our system is not only more flexible than existing methods, but also, it makes a step towards satisfying desideratum (c). Specifically, it is significantly more accurate than all methods that do not require fine-tuning and even matches and outperforms the current state-of-the-art fine-tuning based methods on the most well-established benchmarks (PASCAL VOC & MSCOCO).
abstract_zh: 本文是关于少样本目标检测（FSOD）的，其中给出了一些描述新类别（在训练期间未看到）的模板（示例），目标是检测一组图像中出现的所有情况。从实际角度来看，FSOD 系统必须满足以下要求：（a）它必须按原样使用，不需要在测试时进行任何微调；（b）它必须能够同时处理任意数量的新对象，同时支持每个类中任意数量的示例；（c）它必须达到与封闭系统相当的准确性。为了满足（a）-（c），在这项工作中，我们做出了以下贡献：我们首次引入了一种简单但功能强大的基于视觉提示的小样本检测变压器（FS-DETR），可以解决需求（a）和（b）。我们的系统建立在 DETR 框架的基础上，并基于两个关键思想对其进行扩展：（1）在测试期间将提供的新颖类的视觉模板作为视觉提示，以及（2）用伪类嵌入“标记”这些提示（类似于软提示），然后在解码器的输出中进行预测。重要的是，我们表明我们的系统不仅比现有方法更灵活，而且还朝着满足需求（c）迈出了一步。具体来说，它比所有不需要微调的方法都要准确得多，甚至在最完善的基准（PASCAL VOC 和 MSCOCO）上匹配并优于当前最先进的基于微调的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需微调的少样本目标检测方法FS-DETR，通过视觉提示和伪类嵌入实现对新类别的高效检测。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本检测方法需依赖微调或限制类别数量，难以满足实际应用中对灵活性和准确性的需求。
AI.method: 基于DETR框架，引入视觉模板作为测试时的视觉提示，并通过伪类嵌入（软提示）机制增强模型对新类别的适应能力。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和MSCOCO基准测试中，FS-DETR在无需微调的情况下显著优于现有方法，且性能接近甚至超越基于微调的最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: FS-DETR通过创新的提示机制实现了少样本检测的灵活性与准确性平衡，为实际部署提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Matthew T. Jackson,Shreshth A. Malik,Michael T. Matthews,Yousuf Mohamed-Ahmed
title: Multi-Modal Fusion by Meta-Initialization
title_zh: 通过元初始化进行多模态融合
comment: The first two authors contributed equally
comments: The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: When experience is scarce, models may have insufficient information to adapt to a new task. In this case, auxiliary information - such as a textual description of the task - can enable improved task inference and adaptation. In this work, we propose an extension to the Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning algorithm (MAML), which allows the model to adapt using auxiliary information as well as task experience. Our method, Fusion by Meta-Initialization (FuMI), conditions the model initialization on auxiliary information using a hypernetwork, rather than learning a single, task-agnostic initialization. Furthermore, motivated by the shortcomings of existing multi-modal few-shot learning benchmarks, we constructed iNat-Anim - a large-scale image classification dataset with succinct and visually pertinent textual class descriptions. On iNat-Anim, FuMI significantly outperforms uni-modal baselines such as MAML in the few-shot regime. The code for this project and a dataset exploration tool for iNat-Anim are publicly available at https://github.com/s-a-malik/multi-few .
summary: When experience is scarce, models may have insufficient information to adapt to a new task. In this case, auxiliary information - such as a textual description of the task - can enable improved task inference and adaptation. In this work, we propose an extension to the Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning algorithm (MAML), which allows the model to adapt using auxiliary information as well as task experience. Our method, Fusion by Meta-Initialization (FuMI), conditions the model initialization on auxiliary information using a hypernetwork, rather than learning a single, task-agnostic initialization. Furthermore, motivated by the shortcomings of existing multi-modal few-shot learning benchmarks, we constructed iNat-Anim - a large-scale image classification dataset with succinct and visually pertinent textual class descriptions. On iNat-Anim, FuMI significantly outperforms uni-modal baselines such as MAML in the few-shot regime. The code for this project and a dataset exploration tool for iNat-Anim are publicly available at https://github.com/s-a-malik/multi-few .
abstract_zh: 当经验稀缺时，模型可能没有足够的信息来适应新任务。在这种情况下，辅助信息（例如任务的文本描述）可以改进任务推理和适应。在这项工作中，我们提出了模型无关元学习算法（MAML）的扩展，它允许模型使用辅助信息和任务经验进行调整。我们的方法，元初始化融合（FuMI），使用超网络根据辅助信息来调节模型初始化，而不是学习单个与任务无关的初始化。此外，由于现有多模态少镜头学习基准的缺点，我们构建了 iNat-Anim——一个具有简洁且视觉相关的文本类描述的大规模图像分类数据集。在 iNat-Anim 上，FuMI 在少样本情况下显着优于单模态基线（例如 MAML）。该项目的代码和 iNat-Anim 的数据集探索工具可在 https://github.com/s-a-malik/multi-few 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FuMI的方法，通过结合辅助文本信息和任务经验改进少样本学习中的模型适应能力，并构建了iNat-Anim数据集进行验证。
AI.motivation: 当任务经验不足时，模型难以有效适应新任务。现有少样本学习基准存在多模态信息利用不足的问题，需探索更有效的多模态融合方法。
AI.method: 扩展MAML算法，使用超网络根据辅助文本信息条件化模型初始化，构建iNat-Anim数据集并进行多模态少样本实验。
AI.result: FuMI在iNat-Anim数据集上显著优于单模态基线方法（如MAML），且提供了代码和数据集分析工具。
AI.conclusion: FuMI通过多模态信息融合有效提升少样本学习性能，iNat-Anim为多模态基准研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Multi-Modal Fusion by Meta-Initialization 通过元初始化进行多模态融合 When experience is scarce, models may have insufficient information to adapt to a new task. In this case, auxiliary information - such as a textual description of the task - can enable improved task inference and adaptation. In this work, we propose an extension to the Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning algorithm (MAML), which allows the model to adapt using auxiliary information as well as task experience. Our method, Fusion by Meta-Initialization (FuMI), conditions the model initialization on auxiliary information using a hypernetwork, rather than learning a single, task-agnostic initialization. Furthermore, motivated by the shortcomings of existing multi-modal few-shot learning benchmarks, we constructed iNat-Anim - a large-scale image classification dataset with succinct and visually pertinent textual class descriptions. On iNat-Anim, FuMI significantly outperforms uni-modal baselines such as MAML in the few-shot regime. The code for this project and a dataset exploration tool for iNat-Anim are publicly available at https://github.com/s-a-malik/multi-few . 当经验稀缺时，模型可能没有足够的信息来适应新任务。在这种情况下，辅助信息（例如任务的文本描述）可以改进任务推理和适应。在这项工作中，我们提出了模型无关元学习算法（MAML）的扩展，它允许模型使用辅助信息和任务经验进行调整。我们的方法，元初始化融合（FuMI），使用超网络根据辅助信息来调节模型初始化，而不是学习单个与任务无关的初始化。此外，由于现有多模态少镜头学习基准的缺点，我们构建了 iNat-Anim——一个具有简洁且视觉相关的文本类描述的大规模图像分类数据集。在 iNat-Anim 上，FuMI 在少样本情况下显着优于单模态基线（例如 MAML）。该项目的代码和 iNat-Anim 的数据集探索工具可在 https://github.com/s-a-malik/multi-few 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为FuMI的方法，通过结合辅助文本信息和任务经验改进少样本学习中的模型适应能力，并构建了iNat-Anim数据集进行验证。 Matthew T. Jackson,Shreshth A. Malik,Michael T. Matthews,Yousuf Mohamed-Ahmed cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zifan Xu,Bo Liu,Xuesu Xiao,Anirudh Nair,Peter Stone
title: Benchmarking Reinforcement Learning Techniques for Autonomous Navigation
title_zh: 自主导航强化学习技术的基准测试
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has brought many successes for autonomous robot navigation. However, there still exists important limitations that prevent real-world use of RL-based navigation systems. For example, most learning approaches lack safety guarantees; and learned navigation systems may not generalize well to unseen environments. Despite a variety of recent learning techniques to tackle these challenges in general, a lack of an open-source benchmark and reproducible learning methods specifically for autonomous navigation makes it difficult for roboticists to choose what learning methods to use for their mobile robots and for learning researchers to identify current shortcomings of general learning methods for autonomous navigation. In this paper, we identify four major desiderata of applying deep RL approaches for autonomous navigation: (D1) reasoning under uncertainty, (D2) safety, (D3) learning from limited trial-and-error data, and (D4) generalization to diverse and novel environments. Then, we explore four major classes of learning techniques with the purpose of achieving one or more of the four desiderata: memory-based neural network architectures (D1), safe RL (D2), model-based RL (D2, D3), and domain randomization (D4). By deploying these learning techniques in a new open-source large-scale navigation benchmark and real-world environments, we perform a comprehensive study aimed at establishing to what extent can these techniques achieve these desiderata for RL-based navigation systems.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (RL) has brought many successes for autonomous robot navigation. However, there still exists important limitations that prevent real-world use of RL-based navigation systems. For example, most learning approaches lack safety guarantees; and learned navigation systems may not generalize well to unseen environments. Despite a variety of recent learning techniques to tackle these challenges in general, a lack of an open-source benchmark and reproducible learning methods specifically for autonomous navigation makes it difficult for roboticists to choose what learning methods to use for their mobile robots and for learning researchers to identify current shortcomings of general learning methods for autonomous navigation. In this paper, we identify four major desiderata of applying deep RL approaches for autonomous navigation: (D1) reasoning under uncertainty, (D2) safety, (D3) learning from limited trial-and-error data, and (D4) generalization to diverse and novel environments. Then, we explore four major classes of learning techniques with the purpose of achieving one or more of the four desiderata: memory-based neural network architectures (D1), safe RL (D2), model-based RL (D2, D3), and domain randomization (D4). By deploying these learning techniques in a new open-source large-scale navigation benchmark and real-world environments, we perform a comprehensive study aimed at establishing to what extent can these techniques achieve these desiderata for RL-based navigation systems.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）为自主机器人导航带来了许多成功。然而，仍然存在阻碍基于强化学习的导航系统在现实世界中使用的重要限制。例如，大多数学习方式缺乏安全保障；学习的导航系统可能无法很好地推广到未见过的环境。尽管最近有各种学习技术来应对这些挑战，但缺乏专门针对自主导航的开源基准和可重复的学习方法，使得机器人专家很难选择用于他们的移动机器人的学习方法，也很难让学习研究人员识别当前自主导航通用学习方法的缺点。在本文中，我们确定了将深度强化学习方法应用于自主导航的四个主要需求：（D1）不确定性下的推理，（D2）安全性，（D3）从有限的试错数据中学习，以及（D4）泛化到多样化和新颖的环境。然后，我们探索四类主要的学习技术，目的是实现四种需求中的一个或多个：基于记忆的神经网络架构 (D1)、安全强化学习 (D2)、基于模型的强化学习 (D2、D3) 和域随机化 (D4)。通过在新的开源大规模导航基准和现实环境中部署这些学习技术，我们进行了一项全面的研究，旨在确定这些技术能够在多大程度上实现基于强化学习的导航系统的这些需求。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过构建开源基准测试平台，评估深度强化学习在自主导航中的关键技术，以解决安全、泛化性等现实挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的导航系统缺乏安全保证和环境泛化能力，且缺乏针对自主导航的开源基准，阻碍了技术选择与改进。
AI.method: 提出四个自主导航核心需求（不确定性推理、安全、小样本学习、环境泛化），并采用记忆网络、安全RL、模型基RL和领域随机化四类方法，在开源基准和真实环境中进行系统评估。
AI.result: 实验表明各类方法在特定需求上表现各异，但尚未有单一技术能同时满足所有挑战，凸显了多目标优化的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 需开发兼顾安全、泛化与高效学习的新型RL框架，并建立更全面的导航基准以推动领域发展。

authors_text: Charith Peris,Lizhen Tan,Thomas Gueudre,Turan Gojayev,Pan Wei,Gokmen Oz
title: Knowledge Distillation Transfer Sets and their Impact on Downstream NLU Tasks
title_zh: 知识蒸馏传输集及其对下游 NLU 任务的影响
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables (+ 4 tables in Appendix), Accepted to EMNLP 2022 (industry track)
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables (+ 4 tables in Appendix), Accepted to EMNLP 2022 (industry track)
abstract: Teacher-student knowledge distillation is a popular technique for compressing today's prevailing large language models into manageable sizes that fit low-latency downstream applications. Both the teacher and the choice of transfer set used for distillation are crucial ingredients in creating a high quality student. Yet, the generic corpora used to pretrain the teacher and the corpora associated with the downstream target domain are often significantly different, which raises a natural question: should the student be distilled over the generic corpora, so as to learn from high-quality teacher predictions, or over the downstream task corpora to align with finetuning? Our study investigates this trade-off using Domain Classification (DC) and Intent Classification/Named Entity Recognition (ICNER) as downstream tasks. We distill several multilingual students from a larger multilingual LM with varying proportions of generic and task-specific datasets, and report their performance after finetuning on DC and ICNER. We observe significant improvements across tasks and test sets when only task-specific corpora is used. We also report on how the impact of adding task-specific data to the transfer set correlates with the similarity between generic and task-specific data. Our results clearly indicate that, while distillation from a generic LM benefits downstream tasks, students learn better using target domain data even if it comes at the price of noisier teacher predictions. In other words, target domain data still trumps teacher knowledge.
summary: Teacher-student knowledge distillation is a popular technique for compressing today's prevailing large language models into manageable sizes that fit low-latency downstream applications. Both the teacher and the choice of transfer set used for distillation are crucial ingredients in creating a high quality student. Yet, the generic corpora used to pretrain the teacher and the corpora associated with the downstream target domain are often significantly different, which raises a natural question: should the student be distilled over the generic corpora, so as to learn from high-quality teacher predictions, or over the downstream task corpora to align with finetuning? Our study investigates this trade-off using Domain Classification (DC) and Intent Classification/Named Entity Recognition (ICNER) as downstream tasks. We distill several multilingual students from a larger multilingual LM with varying proportions of generic and task-specific datasets, and report their performance after finetuning on DC and ICNER. We observe significant improvements across tasks and test sets when only task-specific corpora is used. We also report on how the impact of adding task-specific data to the transfer set correlates with the similarity between generic and task-specific data. Our results clearly indicate that, while distillation from a generic LM benefits downstream tasks, students learn better using target domain data even if it comes at the price of noisier teacher predictions. In other words, target domain data still trumps teacher knowledge.
abstract_zh: 师生知识蒸馏是一种流行的技术，用于将当今盛行的大型语言模型压缩为适合低延迟下游应用程序的可管理大小。教师和用于蒸馏的传输装置的选择都是培养高素质学生的关键因素。然而，用于预训练教师的通用语料库和与下游目标领域相关的语料库通常有显着的不同，这就提出了一个自然的问题：学生应该在通用语料库上进行提炼，以便从高质量的教师预测中学习，还是在下游任务语料库上进行提炼以与微调保持一致？我们的研究使用域分类（DC）和意图分类/命名实体识别（ICNER）作为下游任务来调查这种权衡。我们从具有不同比例的通用和特定任务数据集的大型多语言 LM 中提炼出几个多语言学生，并在 DC 和 ICNER 上微调后报告他们的表现。当仅使用特定于任务的语料库时，我们观察到任务和测试集的显着改进。我们还报告了将特定于任务的数据添加到传输集中的影响如何与通用数据和特定于任务的数据之间的相似性相关联。我们的结果清楚地表明，虽然通用 LM 的蒸馏有利于下游任务，但学生使用目标域数据可以更好地学习，即使它是以教师预测的噪音为代价的。换句话说，目标领域数据仍然胜过教师知识。

AI.tldr: 研究知识蒸馏中使用通用语料库与下游任务语料库对自然语言理解任务性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 教师-学生知识蒸馏是压缩大语言模型的关键技术，但教师模型的通用预训练数据与下游任务数据存在差异，需明确应选择哪种数据进行蒸馏以优化学生模型性能。
AI.method: 以领域分类（DC）和意图分类/命名实体识别（ICNER）为下游任务，从多语言大模型中蒸馏出多个学生模型，通过调整通用数据与任务特定数据的比例，评估蒸馏后模型在不同任务上的表现。
AI.result: 仅使用任务特定语料库进行蒸馏的模型在多项任务和测试集上表现显著提升，且任务数据与通用数据的相似性影响添加任务数据的效果。
AI.conclusion: 尽管通用语言模型的知识对下游任务有益，但使用目标领域数据进行蒸馏的模型表现更优，即使教师预测存在噪声，目标领域数据仍优于通用知识。

ai_content.motivation: 教师-学生知识蒸馏是压缩大语言模型的关键技术，但教师模型的通用预训练数据与下游任务数据存在差异，需明确应选择哪种数据进行蒸馏以优化学生模型性能。
ai_content.method: 以领域分类（DC）和意图分类/命名实体识别（ICNER）为下游任务，从多语言大模型中蒸馏出多个学生模型，通过调整通用数据与任务特定数据的比例，评估蒸馏后模型在不同任务上的表现。
ai_content.result: 仅使用任务特定语料库进行蒸馏的模型在多项任务和测试集上表现显著提升，且任务数据与通用数据的相似性影响添加任务数据的效果。
ai_content.conclusion: 尽管通用语言模型的知识对下游任务有益，但使用目标领域数据进行蒸馏的模型表现更优，即使教师预测存在噪声，目标领域数据仍优于通用知识。

search_text: Knowledge Distillation Transfer Sets and their Impact on Downstream NLU Tasks 知识蒸馏传输集及其对下游 NLU 任务的影响 Teacher-student knowledge distillation is a popular technique for compressing today's prevailing large language models into manageable sizes that fit low-latency downstream applications. Both the teacher and the choice of transfer set used for distillation are crucial ingredients in creating a high quality student. Yet, the generic corpora used to pretrain the teacher and the corpora associated with the downstream target domain are often significantly different, which raises a natural question: should the student be distilled over the generic corpora, so as to learn from high-quality teacher predictions, or over the downstream task corpora to align with finetuning? Our study investigates this trade-off using Domain Classification (DC) and Intent Classification/Named Entity Recognition (ICNER) as downstream tasks. We distill several multilingual students from a larger multilingual LM with varying proportions of generic and task-specific datasets, and report their performance after finetuning on DC and ICNER. We observe significant improvements across tasks and test sets when only task-specific corpora is used. We also report on how the impact of adding task-specific data to the transfer set correlates with the similarity between generic and task-specific data. Our results clearly indicate that, while distillation from a generic LM benefits downstream tasks, students learn better using target domain data even if it comes at the price of noisier teacher predictions. In other words, target domain data still trumps teacher knowledge. 师生知识蒸馏是一种流行的技术，用于将当今盛行的大型语言模型压缩为适合低延迟下游应用程序的可管理大小。教师和用于蒸馏的传输装置的选择都是培养高素质学生的关键因素。然而，用于预训练教师的通用语料库和与下游目标领域相关的语料库通常有显着的不同，这就提出了一个自然的问题：学生应该在通用语料库上进行提炼，以便从高质量的教师预测中学习，还是在下游任务语料库上进行提炼以与微调保持一致？我们的研究使用域分类（DC）和意图分类/命名实体识别（ICNER）作为下游任务来调查这种权衡。我们从具有不同比例的通用和特定任务数据集的大型多语言 LM 中提炼出几个多语言学生，并在 DC 和 ICNER 上微调后报告他们的表现。当仅使用特定于任务的语料库时，我们观察到任务和测试集的显着改进。我们还报告了将特定于任务的数据添加到传输集中的影响如何与通用数据和特定于任务的数据之间的相似性相关联。我们的结果清楚地表明，虽然通用 LM 的蒸馏有利于下游任务，但学生使用目标域数据可以更好地学习，即使它是以教师预测的噪音为代价的。换句话说，目标领域数据仍然胜过教师知识。 研究知识蒸馏中使用通用语料库与下游任务语料库对自然语言理解任务性能的影响。 Charith Peris,Lizhen Tan,Thomas Gueudre,Turan Gojayev,Pan Wei,Gokmen Oz cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunhe Gao,Xingjian Shi,Yi Zhu,Hao Wang,Zhiqiang Tang,Xiong Zhou,Mu Li,Dimitris N. Metaxas
title: Visual Prompt Tuning for Test-time Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 测试时域适应的视觉提示调整
abstract: Models should be able to adapt to unseen data during test-time to avoid performance drops caused by inevitable distribution shifts in real-world deployment scenarios. In this work, we tackle the practical yet challenging test-time adaptation (TTA) problem, where a model adapts to the target domain without accessing the source data. We propose a simple recipe called \textit{Data-efficient Prompt Tuning} (DePT) with two key ingredients. First, DePT plugs visual prompts into the vision Transformer and only tunes these source-initialized prompts during adaptation. We find such parameter-efficient finetuning can efficiently adapt the model representation to the target domain without overfitting to the noise in the learning objective. Second, DePT bootstraps the source representation to the target domain by memory bank-based online pseudo-labeling. A hierarchical self-supervised regularization specially designed for prompts is jointly optimized to alleviate error accumulation during self-training. With much fewer tunable parameters, DePT demonstrates not only state-of-the-art performance on major adaptation benchmarks VisDA-C, ImageNet-C, and DomainNet-126, but also superior data efficiency, i.e., adaptation with only 1\% or 10\% data without much performance degradation compared to 100\% data. In addition, DePT is also versatile to be extended to online or multi-source TTA settings.
summary: Models should be able to adapt to unseen data during test-time to avoid performance drops caused by inevitable distribution shifts in real-world deployment scenarios. In this work, we tackle the practical yet challenging test-time adaptation (TTA) problem, where a model adapts to the target domain without accessing the source data. We propose a simple recipe called \textit{Data-efficient Prompt Tuning} (DePT) with two key ingredients. First, DePT plugs visual prompts into the vision Transformer and only tunes these source-initialized prompts during adaptation. We find such parameter-efficient finetuning can efficiently adapt the model representation to the target domain without overfitting to the noise in the learning objective. Second, DePT bootstraps the source representation to the target domain by memory bank-based online pseudo-labeling. A hierarchical self-supervised regularization specially designed for prompts is jointly optimized to alleviate error accumulation during self-training. With much fewer tunable parameters, DePT demonstrates not only state-of-the-art performance on major adaptation benchmarks VisDA-C, ImageNet-C, and DomainNet-126, but also superior data efficiency, i.e., adaptation with only 1\% or 10\% data without much performance degradation compared to 100\% data. In addition, DePT is also versatile to be extended to online or multi-source TTA settings.
abstract_zh: 模型应该能够在测试期间适应看不见的数据，以避免现实部署场景中不可避免的分布变化导致性能下降。在这项工作中，我们解决了实际但具有挑战性的测试时间适应（TTA）问题，其中模型在不访问源数据的情况下适应目标域。我们提出了一个名为 \textit{Data-efficient Prompt Tuning} (DePT) 的简单方法，其中包含两个关键成分。首先，DePT 将视觉提示插入视觉 Transformer，并且仅在适应期间调整这些源初始化的提示。我们发现这种参数高效的微调可以有效地将模型表示适应目标域，而不会过度拟合学习目标中的噪声。其次，DePT 通过基于内存库的在线伪标记将源表示引导到目标域。专门针对提示设计的分层自监督正则化联合优化，以减轻自训练过程中的错误累积。由于可调参数少得多，DePT 不仅在主要自适应基准 VisDA-C、ImageNet-C 和 DomainNet-126 上展示了最先进的性能，而且还具有卓越的数据效率，即仅使用 1% 或 10% 数据进行自适应，与 100% 数据相比，性能没有太大下降。此外，DePT 还具有多功能性，可以扩展到在线或多源 TTA 设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DePT的视觉提示调优方法，用于在无源数据的情况下实现测试时域适应（TTA），通过调整视觉提示和伪标签生成提升模型在目标域的性能。
AI.motivation: 现实部署中模型常面临分布偏移问题，传统测试时域适应方法依赖源数据或参数冗余，难以兼顾数据效率与泛化能力。本文旨在提出一种高效且无需源数据的适应方案。
AI.method: DePT包含两部分：1）在视觉Transformer中插入源初始化的视觉提示，仅微调这些提示以避免过拟合；2）通过记忆库实现在线伪标签生成，并引入分层自监督正则化缓解自训练中的误差累积。
AI.result: DePT在VisDA-C、ImageNet-C和DomainNet-126等基准上达到SOTA性能，仅需1%或10%目标域数据即可接近100%数据效果，且适用于在线和多源适应场景。
AI.conclusion: DePT通过参数高效的提示调优和伪标签机制，有效解决了测试时域适应问题，在保持高性能的同时显著提升了数据效率和方法通用性。

authors_text: Guilherme Espada,Leon Ingelse,Paulo Canelas,Pedro Barbosa,Alcides Fonseca
title: Data types as a more ergonomic frontend for Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming
title_zh: 数据类型作为语法引导遗传编程的更符合人体工程学的前端
abstract: Genetic Programming (GP) is an heuristic method that can be applied to many Machine Learning, Optimization and Engineering problems. In particular, it has been widely used in Software Engineering for Test-case generation, Program Synthesis and Improvement of Software (GI). Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP) approaches allow the user to refine the domain of valid program solutions. Backus Normal Form is the most popular interface for describing Context-Free Grammars (CFG) for GGGP. BNF and its derivatives have the disadvantage of interleaving the grammar language and the target language of the program. We propose to embed the grammar as an internal Domain-Specific Language in the host language of the framework. This approach has the same expressive power as BNF and EBNF while using the host language type-system to take advantage of all the existing tooling: linters, formatters, type-checkers, autocomplete, and legacy code support. These tools have a practical utility in designing software in general, and GP systems in particular. We also present Meta-Handlers, user-defined overrides of the tree-generation system. This technique extends our object-oriented encoding with more practicability and expressive power than existing CFG approaches, achieving the same expressive power of Attribute Grammars, but without the grammar vs target language duality. Furthermore, we evidence that this approach is feasible, showing an example Python implementation as proof. We also compare our approach against textual BNF-representations w.r.t. expressive power and ergonomics. These advantages do not come at the cost of performance, as shown by our empirical evaluation on 5 benchmarks of our example implementation against PonyGE2. We conclude that our approach has better ergonomics with the same expressive power and performance of textual BNF-based grammar encodings.
summary: Genetic Programming (GP) is an heuristic method that can be applied to many Machine Learning, Optimization and Engineering problems. In particular, it has been widely used in Software Engineering for Test-case generation, Program Synthesis and Improvement of Software (GI). Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP) approaches allow the user to refine the domain of valid program solutions. Backus Normal Form is the most popular interface for describing Context-Free Grammars (CFG) for GGGP. BNF and its derivatives have the disadvantage of interleaving the grammar language and the target language of the program. We propose to embed the grammar as an internal Domain-Specific Language in the host language of the framework. This approach has the same expressive power as BNF and EBNF while using the host language type-system to take advantage of all the existing tooling: linters, formatters, type-checkers, autocomplete, and legacy code support. These tools have a practical utility in designing software in general, and GP systems in particular. We also present Meta-Handlers, user-defined overrides of the tree-generation system. This technique extends our object-oriented encoding with more practicability and expressive power than existing CFG approaches, achieving the same expressive power of Attribute Grammars, but without the grammar vs target language duality. Furthermore, we evidence that this approach is feasible, showing an example Python implementation as proof. We also compare our approach against textual BNF-representations w.r.t. expressive power and ergonomics. These advantages do not come at the cost of performance, as shown by our empirical evaluation on 5 benchmarks of our example implementation against PonyGE2. We conclude that our approach has better ergonomics with the same expressive power and performance of textual BNF-based grammar encodings.
abstract_zh: 遗传编程（GP）是一种启发式方法，可应用于许多机器学习、优化和工程问题。特别是，它已广泛应用于软件工程中的测试用例生成、程序综合和软件改进（GI）。语法引导遗传编程 (GGGP) 方法允许用户细化有效程序解决方案的范围。巴科斯范式是描述 GGGP 上下文无关语法 (CFG) 的最流行的接口。 BNF 及其派生物的缺点是程序的语法语言和目标语言交错。我们建议将语法作为内部特定领域语言嵌入到框架的宿主语言中。这种方法具有与 BNF 和 EBNF 相同的表达能力，同时使用宿主语言类型系统来利用所有现有工具：linter、格式化程序、类型检查器、自动完成和遗留代码支持。这些工具在设计一般软件，特别是 GP 系统时具有实际用途。我们还提供元处理程序，用户定义的树生成系统覆盖。该技术扩展了我们的面向对象编码，比现有的 CFG 方法更具实用性和表达能力，实现了与属性语法相同的表达能力，但没有语法与目标语言的二元性。此外，我们证明这种方法是可行的，并展示了一个 Python 实现示例作为证明。我们还将我们的方法与文本 BNF 表示进行比较。表现力和人体工程学。正如我们对 PonyGE2 示例实现的 5 个基准的实证评估所表明的那样，这些优势不会以性能为代价。我们的结论是，我们的方法具有更好的人体工程学原理，具有与基于 BNF 的文本语法编码相同的表达能力和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将语法规则嵌入到宿主语言的类型系统中，作为语法引导遗传编程（GGGP）的更符合人体工学的前端方案。
AI.motivation: 传统BNF语法描述方式导致语法语言与目标语言混杂，无法利用现有开发工具链（如类型检查、自动补全等），影响开发效率与程序可靠性。
AI.method: 通过在宿主语言中构建领域特定语言（DSL）实现语法嵌入，并引入元处理机制（Meta-Handlers）扩展表达能力，同时保持与BNF相同的表达能力。
AI.result: 在Python实现案例中验证了方法的可行性，通过5个基准测试表明其性能与PonyGE2相当，且在表达能力和开发体验上优于文本BNF方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持与BNF相同表达能力与性能的前提下，通过类型系统工具链集成显著提升了GGGP系统的开发效率与实用性。

search_text: Data types as a more ergonomic frontend for Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming 数据类型作为语法引导遗传编程的更符合人体工程学的前端 Genetic Programming (GP) is an heuristic method that can be applied to many Machine Learning, Optimization and Engineering problems. In particular, it has been widely used in Software Engineering for Test-case generation, Program Synthesis and Improvement of Software (GI). Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP) approaches allow the user to refine the domain of valid program solutions. Backus Normal Form is the most popular interface for describing Context-Free Grammars (CFG) for GGGP. BNF and its derivatives have the disadvantage of interleaving the grammar language and the target language of the program. We propose to embed the grammar as an internal Domain-Specific Language in the host language of the framework. This approach has the same expressive power as BNF and EBNF while using the host language type-system to take advantage of all the existing tooling: linters, formatters, type-checkers, autocomplete, and legacy code support. These tools have a practical utility in designing software in general, and GP systems in particular. We also present Meta-Handlers, user-defined overrides of the tree-generation system. This technique extends our object-oriented encoding with more practicability and expressive power than existing CFG approaches, achieving the same expressive power of Attribute Grammars, but without the grammar vs target language duality. Furthermore, we evidence that this approach is feasible, showing an example Python implementation as proof. We also compare our approach against textual BNF-representations w.r.t. expressive power and ergonomics. These advantages do not come at the cost of performance, as shown by our empirical evaluation on 5 benchmarks of our example implementation against PonyGE2. We conclude that our approach has better ergonomics with the same expressive power and performance of textual BNF-based grammar encodings. 遗传编程（GP）是一种启发式方法，可应用于许多机器学习、优化和工程问题。特别是，它已广泛应用于软件工程中的测试用例生成、程序综合和软件改进（GI）。语法引导遗传编程 (GGGP) 方法允许用户细化有效程序解决方案的范围。巴科斯范式是描述 GGGP 上下文无关语法 (CFG) 的最流行的接口。 BNF 及其派生物的缺点是程序的语法语言和目标语言交错。我们建议将语法作为内部特定领域语言嵌入到框架的宿主语言中。这种方法具有与 BNF 和 EBNF 相同的表达能力，同时使用宿主语言类型系统来利用所有现有工具：linter、格式化程序、类型检查器、自动完成和遗留代码支持。这些工具在设计一般软件，特别是 GP 系统时具有实际用途。我们还提供元处理程序，用户定义的树生成系统覆盖。该技术扩展了我们的面向对象编码，比现有的 CFG 方法更具实用性和表达能力，实现了与属性语法相同的表达能力，但没有语法与目标语言的二元性。此外，我们证明这种方法是可行的，并展示了一个 Python 实现示例作为证明。我们还将我们的方法与文本 BNF 表示进行比较。表现力和人体工程学。正如我们对 PonyGE2 示例实现的 5 个基准的实证评估所表明的那样，这些优势不会以性能为代价。我们的结论是，我们的方法具有更好的人体工程学原理，具有与基于 BNF 的文本语法编码相同的表达能力和性能。 本文提出将语法规则嵌入到宿主语言的类型系统中，作为语法引导遗传编程（GGGP）的更符合人体工学的前端方案。 Guilherme Espada,Leon Ingelse,Paulo Canelas,Pedro Barbosa,Alcides Fonseca cs.PL,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Shikha Surana,Bryan Lim,Antoine Cully
title: Efficient Learning of Locomotion Skills through the Discovery of Diverse Environmental Trajectory Generator Priors
title_zh: 通过发现不同的环境轨迹生成器先验来有效学习运动技能
abstract: Data-driven learning based methods have recently been particularly successful at learning robust locomotion controllers for a variety of unstructured terrains. Prior work has shown that incorporating good locomotion priors in the form of trajectory generators (TGs) is effective at efficiently learning complex locomotion skills. However, defining a good, single TG as tasks/environments become increasingly more complex remains a challenging problem as it requires extensive tuning and risks reducing the effectiveness of the prior. In this paper, we present Evolved Environmental Trajectory Generators (EETG), a method that learns a diverse set of specialised locomotion priors using Quality-Diversity algorithms while maintaining a single policy within the Policies Modulating TG (PMTG) architecture. The results demonstrate that EETG enables a quadruped robot to successfully traverse a wide range of environments, such as slopes, stairs, rough terrain, and balance beams. Our experiments show that learning a diverse set of specialized TG priors is significantly (5 times) more efficient than using a single, fixed prior when dealing with a wide range of environments.
summary: Data-driven learning based methods have recently been particularly successful at learning robust locomotion controllers for a variety of unstructured terrains. Prior work has shown that incorporating good locomotion priors in the form of trajectory generators (TGs) is effective at efficiently learning complex locomotion skills. However, defining a good, single TG as tasks/environments become increasingly more complex remains a challenging problem as it requires extensive tuning and risks reducing the effectiveness of the prior. In this paper, we present Evolved Environmental Trajectory Generators (EETG), a method that learns a diverse set of specialised locomotion priors using Quality-Diversity algorithms while maintaining a single policy within the Policies Modulating TG (PMTG) architecture. The results demonstrate that EETG enables a quadruped robot to successfully traverse a wide range of environments, such as slopes, stairs, rough terrain, and balance beams. Our experiments show that learning a diverse set of specialized TG priors is significantly (5 times) more efficient than using a single, fixed prior when dealing with a wide range of environments.
abstract_zh: 基于数据驱动学习的方法最近在学习各种非结构化地形的鲁棒运动控制器方面特别成功。先前的工作表明，以轨迹生成器（TG）的形式结合良好的运动先验可以有效地学习复杂的运动技能。然而，随着任务/环境变得越来越复杂，定义一个好的、单一的 TG 仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它需要大量的调整，并且存在降低先验有效性的风险。在本文中，我们提出了进化环境轨迹生成器（EETG），这是一种使用质量多样性算法学习一组不同的专门运动先验的方法，同时在策略调制 TG（PMTG）架构中保持单一策略。结果表明，EETG 使四足机器人能够成功穿越各种环境，例如斜坡、楼梯、崎岖地形和平衡木。我们的实验表明，在处理各种环境时，学习一组不同的专门 TG 先验比使用单个固定先验的效率要高得多（5 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过发现多样化的环境轨迹生成器先验来高效学习运动技能的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管数据驱动的学习方法在学习复杂地形的运动控制器方面取得了成功，但定义一个有效的单一轨迹生成器（TG）在面对复杂任务和环境时仍面临挑战，需要大量调参且可能降低先验效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Evolved Environmental Trajectory Generators（EETG）的方法，通过质量多样性算法学习一组多样化的专门化运动先验，并在PMTG架构下保持单一策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，EETG使四足机器人能够成功穿越多种环境，如斜坡、楼梯、粗糙地形和平衡木，且相比使用单一固定先验，学习多样化先验的效率提高了5倍。
AI.conclusion: 学习多样化的专门化轨迹生成器先验在处理多种环境时显著提高了运动技能学习的效率。

Prior work has shown that incorporating good locomotion priors in the form of trajectory generators (TGs) is effective at efficiently learning complex locomotion skills. In this paper, we present Evolved Environmental Trajectory Generators (EETG), a method that learns a diverse set of specialised locomotion priors using Quality-Diversity algorithms while maintaining a single policy within the Policies Modulating TG (PMTG) architecture. The results demonstrate that EETG enables a quadruped robot to successfully traverse a wide range of environments, such as slopes, stairs, rough terrain, and balance beams. authors_text: Mohammed R. Al-Sinan,Aseel F. Haneef,Hamzah Luqman
title: Ensemble Learning using Transformers and Convolutional Networks for Masked Face Recognition
title_zh: 使用 Transformers 和卷积网络进行蒙面人脸识别的集成学习
abstract: Wearing a face mask is one of the adjustments we had to follow to reduce the spread of the coronavirus. Having our faces covered by masks constantly has driven the need to understand and investigate how this behavior affects the recognition capability of face recognition systems. Current face recognition systems have extremely high accuracy when dealing with unconstrained general face recognition cases but do not generalize well with occluded masked faces. In this work, we propose a system for masked face recognition. The proposed system comprises two Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models and two Transformer models. The CNN models have been fine-tuned on FaceNet pre-trained model. We ensemble the predictions of the four models using the majority voting technique to identify the person with the mask. The proposed system has been evaluated on a synthetically masked LFW dataset created in this work. The best accuracy is obtained using the ensembled models with an accuracy of 92%. This recognition rate outperformed the accuracy of other models and it shows the correctness and robustness of the proposed model for recognizing masked faces. The code and data are available at https://github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/MFR
summary: Wearing a face mask is one of the adjustments we had to follow to reduce the spread of the coronavirus. Having our faces covered by masks constantly has driven the need to understand and investigate how this behavior affects the recognition capability of face recognition systems. Current face recognition systems have extremely high accuracy when dealing with unconstrained general face recognition cases but do not generalize well with occluded masked faces. In this work, we propose a system for masked face recognition. The proposed system comprises two Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models and two Transformer models. The CNN models have been fine-tuned on FaceNet pre-trained model. We ensemble the predictions of the four models using the majority voting technique to identify the person with the mask. The proposed system has been evaluated on a synthetically masked LFW dataset created in this work. The best accuracy is obtained using the ensembled models with an accuracy of 92%. This recognition rate outperformed the accuracy of other models and it shows the correctness and robustness of the proposed model for recognizing masked faces. The code and data are available at https://github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/MFR
abstract_zh: 戴口罩是我们为减少冠状病毒传播而必须遵循的调整之一。我们的脸经常被口罩遮住，这促使我们需要了解和研究这种行为如何影响人脸识别系统的识别能力。当前的人脸识别系统在处理不受约束的一般人脸识别情况时具有极高的准确度，但不能很好地概括遮挡的蒙面人脸。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种蒙面人脸识别系统。所提出的系统包括两个卷积神经网络（CNN）模型和两个 Transformer 模型。 CNN 模型已在 FaceNet 预训练模型上进行了微调。我们使用多数投票技术整合四个模型的预测来识别戴面具的人。所提出的系统已在本工作中创建的综合屏蔽 LFW 数据集上进行了评估。使用集成模型获得了最佳准确率，准确率为 92%。该识别率优于其他模型的准确性，表明了所提出的模型在识别蒙面人脸方面的正确性和鲁棒性。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/MFR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Transformer和卷积神经网络的集成学习方法，用于解决戴口罩情况下的人脸识别问题。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情下口罩普及导致传统人脸识别系统准确率下降，需探索针对遮挡人脸的新型识别方案。
AI.method: 融合两个微调后的FaceNet CNN模型与两个Transformer模型，通过多数投票机制集成四模型预测结果。
AI.result: 在合成遮挡LFW数据集上达到92%的识别准确率，优于单一模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 集成学习框架有效提升了口罩人脸识别的鲁棒性，验证了多模型协同的可行性。

search_text: Ensemble Learning using Transformers and Convolutional Networks for Masked Face Recognition 使用 Transformers 和卷积网络进行蒙面人脸识别的集成学习 Wearing a face mask is one of the adjustments we had to follow to reduce the spread of the coronavirus. Having our faces covered by masks constantly has driven the need to understand and investigate how this behavior affects the recognition capability of face recognition systems. Current face recognition systems have extremely high accuracy when dealing with unconstrained general face recognition cases but do not generalize well with occluded masked faces. In this work, we propose a system for masked face recognition. The proposed system comprises two Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) models and two Transformer models. The CNN models have been fine-tuned on FaceNet pre-trained model. We ensemble the predictions of the four models using the majority voting technique to identify the person with the mask. The proposed system has been evaluated on a synthetically masked LFW dataset created in this work. The best accuracy is obtained using the ensembled models with an accuracy of 92%. This recognition rate outperformed the accuracy of other models and it shows the correctness and robustness of the proposed model for recognizing masked faces. The code and data are available at https://github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/MFR 戴口罩是我们为减少冠状病毒传播而必须遵循的调整之一。我们的脸经常被口罩遮住，这促使我们需要了解和研究这种行为如何影响人脸识别系统的识别能力。当前的人脸识别系统在处理不受约束的一般人脸识别情况时具有极高的准确度，但不能很好地概括遮挡的蒙面人脸。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种蒙面人脸识别系统。所提出的系统包括两个卷积神经网络（CNN）模型和两个 Transformer 模型。 CNN 模型已在 FaceNet 预训练模型上进行了微调。我们使用多数投票技术整合四个模型的预测来识别戴面具的人。所提出的系统已在本工作中创建的综合屏蔽 LFW 数据集上进行了评估。使用集成模型获得了最佳准确率，准确率为 92%。该识别率优于其他模型的准确性，表明了所提出的模型在识别蒙面人脸方面的正确性和鲁棒性。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/MFR 获取 本文提出一种结合Transformer和卷积神经网络的集成学习方法，用于解决戴口罩情况下的人脸识别问题。 Mohammed R. Al-Sinan,Aseel F. Haneef,Hamzah Luqman cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Roland B. Ilyes,Qi Heng Ho,Morteza Lahijanian
title: Stochastic Robustness Interval for Motion Planning with Signal Temporal Logic
title_zh: 信号时间逻辑运动规划的随机鲁棒性区间
abstract: In this work, we present a novel robustness measure for continuous-time stochastic trajectories with respect to Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We show the soundness of the measure and develop a monitor for reasoning about partial trajectories. Using this monitor, we introduce an STL sampling-based motion planning algorithm for robots under uncertainty. Given a minimum robustness requirement, this algorithm finds satisfying motion plans; alternatively, the algorithm also optimizes for the measure. We prove probabilistic completeness and asymptotic optimality, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on several case studies.
summary: In this work, we present a novel robustness measure for continuous-time stochastic trajectories with respect to Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications. We show the soundness of the measure and develop a monitor for reasoning about partial trajectories. Using this monitor, we introduce an STL sampling-based motion planning algorithm for robots under uncertainty. Given a minimum robustness requirement, this algorithm finds satisfying motion plans; alternatively, the algorithm also optimizes for the measure. We prove probabilistic completeness and asymptotic optimality, and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on several case studies.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们针对信号时态逻辑（STL）规范提出了一种针对连续时间随机轨迹的新颖的鲁棒性度量。我们展示了该措施的合理性，并开发了一个用于推理部分轨迹的监视器。使用该监视器，我们为不确定条件下的机器人引入了基于 STL 采样的运动规划算法。给定最低鲁棒性要求，该算法找到令人满意的运动计划；或者，该算法还针对该度量进行优化。我们证明了概率完整性和渐近最优性，并在几个案例研究中证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对信号时序逻辑(STL)规范的连续时间随机轨迹鲁棒性度量方法，并开发了基于该度量的采样运动规划算法。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划方法难以处理动态不确定环境下的STL规范满足性验证问题，需要更鲁棒的轨迹评估与规划框架。
AI.method: 设计随机鲁棒性区间度量并构建部分轨迹监控器，结合采样技术开发STL约束的运动规划算法，证明其概率完备性与渐近最优性。
AI.result: 算法在多个案例中有效生成满足鲁棒性要求的运动方案，理论分析验证了算法的统计性能保证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为不确定环境下的时序逻辑约束运动规划提供了理论支撑与实用算法框架。

authors_text: Sofia Nikiforova,Tejaswini Deoskar,Denis Paperno,Yoad Winter
title: Generating image captions with external encyclopedic knowledge
title_zh: 使用外部百科全书知识生成图像标题
abstract: Accurately reporting what objects are depicted in an image is largely a solved problem in automatic caption generation. The next big challenge on the way to truly humanlike captioning is being able to incorporate the context of the image and related real world knowledge. We tackle this challenge by creating an end-to-end caption generation system that makes extensive use of image-specific encyclopedic data. Our approach includes a novel way of using image location to identify relevant open-domain facts in an external knowledge base, with their subsequent integration into the captioning pipeline at both the encoding and decoding stages. Our system is trained and tested on a new dataset with naturally produced knowledge-rich captions, and achieves significant improvements over multiple baselines. We empirically demonstrate that our approach is effective for generating contextualized captions with encyclopedic knowledge that is both factually accurate and relevant to the image.
summary: Accurately reporting what objects are depicted in an image is largely a solved problem in automatic caption generation. The next big challenge on the way to truly humanlike captioning is being able to incorporate the context of the image and related real world knowledge. We tackle this challenge by creating an end-to-end caption generation system that makes extensive use of image-specific encyclopedic data. Our approach includes a novel way of using image location to identify relevant open-domain facts in an external knowledge base, with their subsequent integration into the captioning pipeline at both the encoding and decoding stages. Our system is trained and tested on a new dataset with naturally produced knowledge-rich captions, and achieves significant improvements over multiple baselines. We empirically demonstrate that our approach is effective for generating contextualized captions with encyclopedic knowledge that is both factually accurate and relevant to the image.
abstract_zh: 准确报告图像中描绘的对象在很大程度上是自动字幕生成中已解决的问题。实现真正的人性化字幕的下一个重大挑战是能够将图像的上下文和相关的现实世界知识结合起来。我们通过创建端到端字幕生成系统来应对这一挑战，该系统广泛使用图像特定的百科全书数据。我们的方法包括一种使用图像位置来识别外部知识库中相关开放域事实的新颖方法，随后将其集成到编码和解码阶段的字幕管道中。我们的系统在新数据集上进行了训练和测试，该数据集具有自然生成的知识丰富的标题，并在多个基线上实现了显着改进。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法可以有效地生成具有百科全书式知识的上下文字幕，这些字幕既准确又与图像相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合外部百科全书知识的图像标题生成方法，通过整合图像上下文与现实世界知识提升生成标题的准确性与相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像标题生成技术已能准确识别物体，但缺乏对图像上下文及现实知识的整合能力，难以生成真正接近人类水平的描述。
AI.method: 构建端到端系统，利用图像位置信息从外部知识库检索相关事实，并在编码和解码阶段将百科知识融入标题生成流程。
AI.result: 在包含知识密集型标题的新数据集上，该方法显著优于多个基线模型，生成的标题在事实准确性与图像相关性方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合外部知识库信息，本文方法有效提升了图像标题的上下文理解与知识表达能力，为生成更智能的图像描述提供了新思路。
