authors_text: Sean Grullon,Vaughn Spurrier,Jiayi Zhao,Corey Chivers,Yang Jiang,Kiran Motaparthi,Michael Bonham,Julianna Ianni
title: Using Whole Slide Image Representations from Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Melanoma Concordance Regression
title_zh: 使用自监督对比学习的整个幻灯片图像表示进行黑色素瘤一致性回归
comment: Accepted at ECCV 2022 AIMIA Workshop. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.07554
comments: Accepted at ECCV 2022 AIMIA Workshop. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2109.07554
abstract: Although melanoma occurs more rarely than several other skin cancers, patients' long term survival rate is extremely low if the diagnosis is missed. Diagnosis is complicated by a high discordance rate among pathologists when distinguishing between melanoma and benign melanocytic lesions. A tool that provides potential concordance information to healthcare providers could help inform diagnostic, prognostic, and therapeutic decision-making for challenging melanoma cases. We present a melanoma concordance regression deep learning model capable of predicting the concordance rate of invasive melanoma or melanoma in-situ from digitized Whole Slide Images (WSIs). The salient features corresponding to melanoma concordance were learned in a self-supervised manner with the contrastive learning method, SimCLR. We trained a SimCLR feature extractor with 83,356 WSI tiles randomly sampled from 10,895 specimens originating from four distinct pathology labs. We trained a separate melanoma concordance regression model on 990 specimens with available concordance ground truth annotations from three pathology labs and tested the model on 211 specimens. We achieved a Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 0.28 +/- 0.01 on the test set. We also investigated the performance of using the predicted concordance rate as a malignancy classifier, and achieved a precision and recall of 0.85 +/- 0.05 and 0.61 +/- 0.06, respectively, on the test set. These results are an important first step for building an artificial intelligence (AI) system capable of predicting the results of consulting a panel of experts and delivering a score based on the degree to which the experts would agree on a particular diagnosis. Such a system could be used to suggest additional testing or other action such as ordering additional stains or genetic tests.
summary: Although melanoma occurs more rarely than several other skin cancers, patients' long term survival rate is extremely low if the diagnosis is missed. Diagnosis is complicated by a high discordance rate among pathologists when distinguishing between melanoma and benign melanocytic lesions. A tool that provides potential concordance information to healthcare providers could help inform diagnostic, prognostic, and therapeutic decision-making for challenging melanoma cases. We present a melanoma concordance regression deep learning model capable of predicting the concordance rate of invasive melanoma or melanoma in-situ from digitized Whole Slide Images (WSIs). The salient features corresponding to melanoma concordance were learned in a self-supervised manner with the contrastive learning method, SimCLR. We trained a SimCLR feature extractor with 83,356 WSI tiles randomly sampled from 10,895 specimens originating from four distinct pathology labs. We trained a separate melanoma concordance regression model on 990 specimens with available concordance ground truth annotations from three pathology labs and tested the model on 211 specimens. We achieved a Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 0.28 +/- 0.01 on the test set. We also investigated the performance of using the predicted concordance rate as a malignancy classifier, and achieved a precision and recall of 0.85 +/- 0.05 and 0.61 +/- 0.06, respectively, on the test set. These results are an important first step for building an artificial intelligence (AI) system capable of predicting the results of consulting a panel of experts and delivering a score based on the degree to which the experts would agree on a particular diagnosis. Such a system could be used to suggest additional testing or other action such as ordering additional stains or genetic tests.
abstract_zh: 尽管黑色素瘤比其他几种皮肤癌更罕见，但如果漏诊，患者的长期生存率极低。由于病理学家在区分黑色素瘤和良性黑色素细胞病变时存在较高的不一致率，因此诊断变得复杂。向医疗保健提供者提供潜在一致性信息的工具可以帮助为具有挑战性的黑色素瘤病例的诊断、预后和治疗决策提供信息。我们提出了一种黑色素瘤一致性回归深度学习模型，能够根据数字化全幻灯片图像（WSI）预测侵袭性黑色素瘤或原位黑色素瘤的一致性率。使用对比学习方法 SimCLR 以自我监督的方式学习与黑色素瘤一致性相对应的显着特征。我们使用从来自四个不同病理实验室的 10,895 个样本中随机采样的 83,356 个 WSI 图块来训练 SimCLR 特征提取器。我们在 990 个样本上训练了一个单独的黑色素瘤一致性回归模型，并使用来自三个病理实验室的可用一致性地面实况注释，并在 211 个样本上测试了该模型。我们在测试集上实现了 0.28 +/- 0.01 的均方根误差 (RMSE)。我们还研究了使用预测一致性率作为恶性肿瘤分类器的性能，并在测试集上分别实现了 0.85 +/- 0.05 和 0.61 +/- 0.06 的精度和召回率。这些结果是构建人工智能 (AI) 系统的重要第一步，该系统能够预测专家小组的咨询结果，并根据专家对特定诊断的同意程度给出评分。这样的系统可用于建议额外的测试或其他行动，例如订购额外的染色或基因测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督对比学习的深度学习模型，用于预测黑色素瘤诊断的一致率，以辅助医疗决策。
AI.motivation: 黑色素瘤诊断存在病理学家间高不一致率，可能导致误诊。开发预测一致率的工具可帮助医生进行诊断和治疗决策。
AI.method: 使用SimCLR自监督对比学习方法训练特征提取器，基于83,356个WSI切片数据。再通过990个标注样本训练回归模型，测试集211个样本。
AI.result: 测试集RMSE为0.28±0.01，作为恶性分类器时精确率0.85±0.05，召回率0.61±0.06。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为构建预测专家诊断一致性的AI系统提供基础，可建议进一步检查或测试。

authors_text: Hossein Hajipour,Ning Yu,Cristian-Alexandru Staicu,Mario Fritz
title: SimSCOOD: Systematic Analysis of Out-of-Distribution Generalization in Fine-tuned Source Code Models
title_zh: SimSCOOD：微调源代码模型中分布外泛化的系统分析
abstract: Large code datasets have become increasingly accessible for pre-training source code models. However, for the fine-tuning phase, obtaining representative training data that fully covers the code distribution for specific downstream tasks remains challenging due to the task-specific nature and limited labeling resources. Moreover, fine-tuning pretrained models can result in forgetting previously acquired pre-training knowledge. These lead to out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization issues with unexpected model inference behaviors that have not been systematically studied yet. In this paper, we contribute the first systematic approach that simulates various OOD scenarios along different dimensions of source code data properties and study the fine-tuned model behaviors in such scenarios. We investigate the behaviors of models under different fine-tuning methodologies, including full fine-tuning and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) fine-tuning methods. Our comprehensive analysis, conducted on four state-of-the-art pretrained models and applied to two code generation tasks, exposes multiple failure modes attributed to OOD generalization issues. Additionally, our analysis uncovers that LoRA fine-tuning consistently exhibits significantly better OOD generalization performance than full fine-tuning across various scenarios.
summary: Large code datasets have become increasingly accessible for pre-training source code models. However, for the fine-tuning phase, obtaining representative training data that fully covers the code distribution for specific downstream tasks remains challenging due to the task-specific nature and limited labeling resources. Moreover, fine-tuning pretrained models can result in forgetting previously acquired pre-training knowledge. These lead to out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization issues with unexpected model inference behaviors that have not been systematically studied yet. In this paper, we contribute the first systematic approach that simulates various OOD scenarios along different dimensions of source code data properties and study the fine-tuned model behaviors in such scenarios. We investigate the behaviors of models under different fine-tuning methodologies, including full fine-tuning and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) fine-tuning methods. Our comprehensive analysis, conducted on four state-of-the-art pretrained models and applied to two code generation tasks, exposes multiple failure modes attributed to OOD generalization issues. Additionally, our analysis uncovers that LoRA fine-tuning consistently exhibits significantly better OOD generalization performance than full fine-tuning across various scenarios.
abstract_zh: 对于预训练源代码模型来说，大型代码数据集变得越来越容易访问。然而，对于微调阶段，由于任务特定的性质和有限的标签资源，获取完全覆盖特定下游任务的代码分布的代表性训练数据仍然具有挑战性。此外，微调预训练模型可能会导致忘记之前获得的预训练知识。这些会导致分布外 (OOD) 泛化问题以及尚未得到系统研究的意外模型推理行为。在本文中，我们贡献了第一个系统方法，该方法沿着源代码数据属性的不同维度模拟各种 OOD 场景，并研究此类场景中的微调模型行为。我们研究了不同微调方法下模型的行为，包括完全微调和低秩适应（LoRA）微调方法。我们对四个最先进的预训练模型进行了全面分析，并将其应用于两个代码生成任务，揭示了归因于 OOD 泛化问题的多种故障模式。此外，我们的分析发现，LoRA 微调在各种场景中始终表现出比完全微调更好的 OOD 泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimSCOOD方法，系统分析微调代码模型在分布外（OOD）场景下的泛化能力，并比较不同微调策略的效果。
AI.motivation: 微调预训练代码模型时面临任务特定数据不足、知识遗忘等问题，导致OOD泛化性能下降，但相关研究尚未系统展开。
AI.method: 构建多维度OOD场景模拟器，对比全量微调与LoRA微调方法在四个模型和两个代码生成任务中的表现。
AI.result: 发现微调模型存在多种OOD失效模式，且LoRA微调在各类场景下均显著优于全量微调。
AI.conclusion: LoRA微调能有效提升代码模型的OOD泛化能力，研究为实际应用中的模型选择提供了理论依据。

authors_text: Yuqi Wang,Yuntao Chen,Zhaoxiang Zhang
title: 4D Unsupervised Object Discovery
title_zh: 4D 无监督对象发现
abstract: Object discovery is a core task in computer vision. While fast progresses have been made in supervised object detection, its unsupervised counterpart remains largely unexplored. With the growth of data volume, the expensive cost of annotations is the major limitation hindering further study. Therefore, discovering objects without annotations has great significance. However, this task seems impractical on still-image or point cloud alone due to the lack of discriminative information. Previous studies underlook the crucial temporal information and constraints naturally behind multi-modal inputs. In this paper, we propose 4D unsupervised object discovery, jointly discovering objects from 4D data -- 3D point clouds and 2D RGB images with temporal information. We present the first practical approach for this task by proposing a ClusterNet on 3D point clouds, which is jointly iteratively optimized with a 2D localization network. Extensive experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset suggest that the localization network and ClusterNet achieve competitive performance on both class-agnostic 2D object detection and 3D instance segmentation, bridging the gap between unsupervised methods and full supervised ones. Codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/Robertwyq/LSMOL.
summary: Object discovery is a core task in computer vision. While fast progresses have been made in supervised object detection, its unsupervised counterpart remains largely unexplored. With the growth of data volume, the expensive cost of annotations is the major limitation hindering further study. Therefore, discovering objects without annotations has great significance. However, this task seems impractical on still-image or point cloud alone due to the lack of discriminative information. Previous studies underlook the crucial temporal information and constraints naturally behind multi-modal inputs. In this paper, we propose 4D unsupervised object discovery, jointly discovering objects from 4D data -- 3D point clouds and 2D RGB images with temporal information. We present the first practical approach for this task by proposing a ClusterNet on 3D point clouds, which is jointly iteratively optimized with a 2D localization network. Extensive experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset suggest that the localization network and ClusterNet achieve competitive performance on both class-agnostic 2D object detection and 3D instance segmentation, bridging the gap between unsupervised methods and full supervised ones. Codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/Robertwyq/LSMOL.
abstract_zh: 对象发现是计算机视觉的核心任务。虽然监督目标检测领域取得了快速进展，但其无监督目标检测在很大程度上仍未得到探索。随着数据量的增长，昂贵的注释成本是阻碍进一步研究的主要限制。因此，发现没有注释的对象具有重大意义。然而，由于缺乏辨别信息，仅在静态图像或点云上这项任务似乎不切实际。先前的研究探讨了多模式输入背后的关键时间信息和自然约束。在本文中，我们提出了 4D 无监督对象发现，从 4D 数据（3D 点云和具有时间信息的 2D RGB 图像）中联合发现对象。我们提出了针对此任务的第一个实用方法，提出了 3D 点云上的 ClusterNet，它与 2D 定位网络联合迭代优化。在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上进行的大量实验表明，定位网络和 ClusterNet 在与类别无关的 2D 对象检测和 3D 实例分割方面都取得了有竞争力的性能，弥补了无监督方法和全监督方法之间的差距。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/Robertwyq/LSMOL 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于4D数据（3D点云和带时间信息的2D RGB图像）的无监督目标发现方法，解决传统无监督方法在静态数据中判别信息不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 监督目标检测依赖昂贵的标注数据，而现有无监督方法在静态图像或点云中因缺乏判别信息效果有限，未充分利用多模态数据中的时间约束信息。
AI.method: 设计ClusterNet处理3D点云并联合优化2D定位网络，通过迭代优化实现跨模态目标发现，无需人工标注。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset上，方法在2D检测和3D分割任务中达到接近监督方法的性能，验证了无监督学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合时序信息的4D无监督方法能有效弥补传统无监督技术的不足，为减少标注依赖提供新思路。

search_text: 4D Unsupervised Object Discovery 4D 无监督对象发现 Object discovery is a core task in computer vision. While fast progresses have been made in supervised object detection, its unsupervised counterpart remains largely unexplored. With the growth of data volume, the expensive cost of annotations is the major limitation hindering further study. Therefore, discovering objects without annotations has great significance. However, this task seems impractical on still-image or point cloud alone due to the lack of discriminative information. Previous studies underlook the crucial temporal information and constraints naturally behind multi-modal inputs. In this paper, we propose 4D unsupervised object discovery, jointly discovering objects from 4D data -- 3D point clouds and 2D RGB images with temporal information. We present the first practical approach for this task by proposing a ClusterNet on 3D point clouds, which is jointly iteratively optimized with a 2D localization network. Extensive experiments on the large-scale Waymo Open Dataset suggest that the localization network and ClusterNet achieve competitive performance on both class-agnostic 2D object detection and 3D instance segmentation, bridging the gap between unsupervised methods and full supervised ones. Codes and models will be made available at https://github.com/Robertwyq/LSMOL. 对象发现是计算机视觉的核心任务。虽然监督目标检测领域取得了快速进展，但其无监督目标检测在很大程度上仍未得到探索。随着数据量的增长，昂贵的注释成本是阻碍进一步研究的主要限制。因此，发现没有注释的对象具有重大意义。然而，由于缺乏辨别信息，仅在静态图像或点云上这项任务似乎不切实际。先前的研究探讨了多模式输入背后的关键时间信息和自然约束。在本文中，我们提出了 4D 无监督对象发现，从 4D 数据（3D 点云和具有时间信息的 2D RGB 图像）中联合发现对象。我们提出了针对此任务的第一个实用方法，提出了 3D 点云上的 ClusterNet，它与 2D 定位网络联合迭代优化。在大规模 Waymo 开放数据集上进行的大量实验表明，定位网络和 ClusterNet 在与类别无关的 2D 对象检测和 3D 实例分割方面都取得了有竞争力的性能，弥补了无监督方法和全监督方法之间的差距。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/Robertwyq/LSMOL 上提供。 本文提出一种基于4D数据（3D点云和带时间信息的2D RGB图像）的无监督目标发现方法，解决传统无监督方法在静态数据中判别信息不足的问题。 Yuqi Wang,Yuntao Chen,Zhaoxiang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Junhong Lin,Nanfeng Jiang,Zhentao Zhang,Weiling Chen,Tiesong Zhao
title: LMQFormer: A Laplace-Prior-Guided Mask Query Transformer for Lightweight Snow Removal
title_zh: LMQFormer：用于轻量级除雪的拉普拉斯先验引导掩模查询转换器
abstract: Snow removal aims to locate snow areas and recover clean images without repairing traces. Unlike the regularity and semitransparency of rain, snow with various patterns and degradations seriously occludes the background. As a result, the state-of-the-art snow removal methods usually retains a large parameter size. In this paper, we propose a lightweight but high-efficient snow removal network called Laplace Mask Query Transformer (LMQFormer). Firstly, we present a Laplace-VQVAE to generate a coarse mask as prior knowledge of snow. Instead of using the mask in dataset, we aim at reducing both the information entropy of snow and the computational cost of recovery. Secondly, we design a Mask Query Transformer (MQFormer) to remove snow with the coarse mask, where we use two parallel encoders and a hybrid decoder to learn extensive snow features under lightweight requirements. Thirdly, we develop a Duplicated Mask Query Attention (DMQA) that converts the coarse mask into a specific number of queries, which constraint the attention areas of MQFormer with reduced parameters. Experimental results in popular datasets have demonstrated the efficiency of our proposed model, which achieves the state-of-the-art snow removal quality with significantly reduced parameters and the lowest running time.
summary: Snow removal aims to locate snow areas and recover clean images without repairing traces. Unlike the regularity and semitransparency of rain, snow with various patterns and degradations seriously occludes the background. As a result, the state-of-the-art snow removal methods usually retains a large parameter size. In this paper, we propose a lightweight but high-efficient snow removal network called Laplace Mask Query Transformer (LMQFormer). Firstly, we present a Laplace-VQVAE to generate a coarse mask as prior knowledge of snow. Instead of using the mask in dataset, we aim at reducing both the information entropy of snow and the computational cost of recovery. Secondly, we design a Mask Query Transformer (MQFormer) to remove snow with the coarse mask, where we use two parallel encoders and a hybrid decoder to learn extensive snow features under lightweight requirements. Thirdly, we develop a Duplicated Mask Query Attention (DMQA) that converts the coarse mask into a specific number of queries, which constraint the attention areas of MQFormer with reduced parameters. Experimental results in popular datasets have demonstrated the efficiency of our proposed model, which achieves the state-of-the-art snow removal quality with significantly reduced parameters and the lowest running time.
abstract_zh: 除雪的目的是定位积雪区域并在不修复痕迹的情况下恢复干净的图像。与雨的规则性和半透明性不同，具有各种图案和退化的雪严重遮挡了背景。因此，最先进的除雪方法通常保留较大的参数大小。在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级但高效的除雪网络，称为拉普拉斯掩模查询变换器（LMQFormer）。首先，我们提出了 Laplace-VQVAE 来生成粗掩模作为雪的先验知识。我们的目标不是在数据集中使用掩模，而是减少雪的信息熵和恢复的计算成本。其次，我们设计了一个掩模查询转换器（MQFormer）来使用粗掩模去除雪，其中我们使用两个并行编码器和一个混合解码器来学习轻量级要求下的广泛雪特征。第三，我们开发了重复掩码查询注意力（DMQA），它将粗略掩码转换为特定数量的查询，从而用减少的参数限制了 MQFormer 的注意力区域。流行数据集中的实验结果证明了我们提出的模型的效率，该模型以显着减少的参数和最短的运行时间实现了最先进的除雪质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量高效的除雪网络LMQFormer，通过生成粗略雪掩码并结合Transformer架构实现高质量雪去除。
AI.motivation: 现有除雪方法因需处理雪的复杂模式和退化导致参数量大、计算成本高，难以兼顾效率与效果。
AI.method: 1. 设计Laplace-VQVAE生成雪的粗略掩码作为先验；2. 构建双编码器-混合解码器的MQFormer网络；3. 引入DMQA模块将掩码转化为查询以约束注意力区域。
AI.result: 在主流数据集上达到SOTA除雪质量，参数量显著减少且运行时间最低。
AI.conclusion: LMQFormer通过掩码先验与轻量Transformer设计，在保证除雪效果的同时实现了高效计算。

authors_text: Charlotte Loh,Rumen Dangovski,Shivchander Sudalairaj,Seungwook Han,Ligong Han,Leonid Karlinsky,Marin Soljacic,Akash Srivastava
title: On the Importance of Calibration in Semi-supervised Learning
title_zh: 论半监督学习中校准的重要性
abstract: State-of-the-art (SOTA) semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods have been highly successful in leveraging a mix of labeled and unlabeled data by combining techniques of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling. During pseudo-labeling, the model's predictions on unlabeled data are used for training and thus, model calibration is important in mitigating confirmation bias. Yet, many SOTA methods are optimized for model performance, with little focus directed to improve model calibration. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that model calibration is strongly correlated with model performance and propose to improve calibration via approximate Bayesian techniques. We introduce a family of new SSL models that optimizes for calibration and demonstrate their effectiveness across standard vision benchmarks of CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, giving up to 15.9% improvement in test accuracy. Furthermore, we also demonstrate their effectiveness in additional realistic and challenging problems, such as class-imbalanced datasets and in photonics science.
summary: State-of-the-art (SOTA) semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods have been highly successful in leveraging a mix of labeled and unlabeled data by combining techniques of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling. During pseudo-labeling, the model's predictions on unlabeled data are used for training and thus, model calibration is important in mitigating confirmation bias. Yet, many SOTA methods are optimized for model performance, with little focus directed to improve model calibration. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that model calibration is strongly correlated with model performance and propose to improve calibration via approximate Bayesian techniques. We introduce a family of new SSL models that optimizes for calibration and demonstrate their effectiveness across standard vision benchmarks of CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, giving up to 15.9% improvement in test accuracy. Furthermore, we also demonstrate their effectiveness in additional realistic and challenging problems, such as class-imbalanced datasets and in photonics science.
abstract_zh: 最先进的 (SOTA) 半监督学习 (SSL) 方法通过结合一致性正则化和伪标记技术，在利用标记和未标记数据的混合方面取得了巨大成功。在伪标记过程中，模型对未标记数据的预测用于训练，因此模型校准对于减轻确认偏差非常重要。然而，许多 SOTA 方法针对模型性能进行了优化，很少关注改进模型校准。在这项工作中，我们凭经验证明模型校准与模型性能密切相关，并建议通过近似贝叶斯技术改进校准。我们推出了一系列新的 SSL 模型，这些模型针对校准进行了优化，并在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 标准视觉基准中展示了它们的有效性，使测试精度提高了 15.9%。此外，我们还证明了它们在其他现实和具有挑战性的问题中的有效性，例如类不平衡数据集和光子科学。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了半监督学习中模型校准的重要性，并提出通过近似贝叶斯方法优化校准以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督学习方法侧重模型性能优化，但忽视了校准对减少确认偏见的关键作用，而校准与性能存在强相关性。
AI.method: 提出基于近似贝叶斯技术的新型SSL模型家族，通过优化校准来改进模型预测可靠性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet等基准数据集上实现最高15.9%的测试准确率提升，并有效应对类别不平衡和光子学科学等挑战性场景。
AI.conclusion: 模型校准与性能紧密相关，针对性优化可显著提升半监督学习效果，为未来研究提供新方向。

method: 提出基于近似贝叶斯技术的新型SSL模型家族，通过优化校准来改进模型预测可靠性。
result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet等基准数据集上实现最高15.9%的测试准确率提升，并有效应对类别不平衡和光子学科学等挑战性场景。

search_text: On the Importance of Calibration in Semi-supervised Learning 论半监督学习中校准的重要性 State-of-the-art (SOTA) semi-supervised learning (SSL) methods have been highly successful in leveraging a mix of labeled and unlabeled data by combining techniques of consistency regularization and pseudo-labeling. During pseudo-labeling, the model's predictions on unlabeled data are used for training and thus, model calibration is important in mitigating confirmation bias. Yet, many SOTA methods are optimized for model performance, with little focus directed to improve model calibration. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that model calibration is strongly correlated with model performance and propose to improve calibration via approximate Bayesian techniques. We introduce a family of new SSL models that optimizes for calibration and demonstrate their effectiveness across standard vision benchmarks of CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet, giving up to 15.9% improvement in test accuracy. Furthermore, we also demonstrate their effectiveness in additional realistic and challenging problems, such as class-imbalanced datasets and in photonics science. 最先进的 (SOTA) 半监督学习 (SSL) 方法通过结合一致性正则化和伪标记技术，在利用标记和未标记数据的混合方面取得了巨大成功。在伪标记过程中，模型对未标记数据的预测用于训练，因此模型校准对于减轻确认偏差非常重要。然而，许多 SOTA 方法针对模型性能进行了优化，很少关注改进模型校准。在这项工作中，我们凭经验证明模型校准与模型性能密切相关，并建议通过近似贝叶斯技术改进校准。我们推出了一系列新的 SSL 模型，这些模型针对校准进行了优化，并在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 标准视觉基准中展示了它们的有效性，使测试精度提高了 15.9%。此外，我们还证明了它们在其他现实和具有挑战性的问题中的有效性，例如类不平衡数据集和光子科学。 本文探讨了半监督学习中模型校准的重要性，并提出通过近似贝叶斯方法优化校准以提升模型性能。 Charlotte Loh,Rumen Dangovski,Shivchander Sudalairaj,Seungwook Han,Ligong Han,Leonid Karlinsky,Marin Soljacic,Akash Srivastava cs.LG,cs.CV,physics.app-ph

authors_text: Asa Cooper Stickland,Sailik Sengupta,Jason Krone,Saab Mansour,He He
title: Robustification of Multilingual Language Models to Real-world Noise in Crosslingual Zero-shot Settings with Robust Contrastive Pretraining
title_zh: 通过鲁棒对比预训练，在跨语言零样本设置中对多语言语言模型对现实世界噪声的鲁棒性
comment: Accepted and to be presented at the 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL), 2023
comments: Accepted and to be presented at the 17th Conference of the European Chapter of the Association for Computational Linguistics (EACL), 2023
abstract: Advances in neural modeling have achieved state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on public natural language processing (NLP) benchmarks, at times surpassing human performance. However, there is a gap between public benchmarks and real-world applications where noise, such as typographical or grammatical mistakes, is abundant and can result in degraded performance. Unfortunately, works which evaluate the robustness of neural models on noisy data and propose improvements, are limited to the English language. Upon analyzing noise in different languages, we observe that noise types vary greatly across languages. Thus, existing investigations do not generalize trivially to multilingual settings. To benchmark the performance of pretrained multilingual language models, we construct noisy datasets covering five languages and four NLP tasks and observe a clear gap in the performance between clean and noisy data in the zero-shot cross-lingual setting. After investigating several ways to boost the robustness of multilingual models in this setting, we propose Robust Contrastive Pretraining (RCP). RCP combines data augmentation with a contrastive loss term at the pretraining stage and achieves large improvements on noisy (and original test data) across two sentence-level (+3.2%) and two sequence-labeling (+10 F1-score) multilingual classification tasks.

However, there is a gap between public benchmarks and real-world applications where noise, such as typographical or grammatical mistakes, is abundant and can result in degraded performance. Unfortunately, works which evaluate the robustness of neural models on noisy data and propose improvements, are limited to the English language. Upon analyzing noise in different languages, we observe that noise types vary greatly across languages. Thus, existing investigations do not generalize trivially to multilingual settings. To benchmark the performance of pretrained multilingual language models, we construct noisy datasets covering five languages and four NLP tasks and observe a clear gap in the performance between clean and noisy data in the zero-shot cross-lingual setting. After investigating several ways to boost the robustness of multilingual models in this setting, we propose Robust Contrastive Pretraining (RCP). RCP combines data augmentation with a contrastive loss term at the pretraining stage and achieves large improvements on noisy (and original test data) across two sentence-level (+3.2%) and two sequence-labeling (+10 F1-score) multilingual classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 神经建模的进步在公共自然语言处理 (NLP) 基准上取得了最先进 (SOTA) 的结果，有时甚至超越了人类的表现。然而，公共基准测试与实际应用程序之间存在差距，其中印刷或语法错误等噪声大量存在，可能导致性能下降。不幸的是，评估神经模型对噪声数据的鲁棒性并提出改进建议的工作仅限于英语。通过分析不同语言的噪声，我们发现不同语言的噪声类型差异很大。因此，现有的调查并不能简单地推广到多语言环境。为了对预训练的多语言语言模型的性能进行基准测试，我们构建了涵盖五种语言和四种 NLP 任务的噪声数据集，并观察到零样本跨语言设置中干净数据和噪声数据之间的性能明显差距。在研究了几种在这种情况下提高多语言模型鲁棒性的方法之后，我们提出了鲁棒对比预训练（RCP）。 RCP 在预训练阶段将数据增强与对比损失项相结合，并在两个句子级 (+3.2%) 和两个序列标记 (+10 F1 分数) 多语言分类任务中实现了对噪声（和原始测试数据）的巨大改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为RCP的鲁棒对比预训练方法，以提升多语言语言模型在跨语言零样本设置下的对现实世界噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络模型在公开基准测试中表现优异，但它们在存在大量噪声（如拼写或语法错误）的现实世界应用中性能会下降。现有研究主要集中在英语上，而不同语言的噪声类型差异较大，因此难以直接推广到多语言场景。
AI.method: 作者构建了涵盖五种语言和四种NLP任务的噪声数据集，并提出了一种结合数据增强与对比损失项的鲁棒对比预训练（RCP）方法。
AI.result: RCP方法在两个句子级任务和两个序列标注任务上分别实现了+3.2%和+10 F1分数的显著提升。
AI.conclusion: RCP方法有效提升了多语言模型在跨语言零样本设置下对噪声的鲁棒性，为多语言模型的鲁棒性研究提供了新的思路。

authors_text: Kewen Li,Wenlong Liu,Yimin Dou,Zhifeng Xu,Hongjie Duan,Ruilin Jing
title: CONSS: Contrastive Learning Approach for Semi-Supervised Seismic Facies Classification
title_zh: CONSS：半监督地震相分类的对比学习方法
abstract: Recently, seismic facies classification based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) has garnered significant research interest. However, existing CNN-based supervised learning approaches necessitate massive labeled data. Labeling is laborious and time-consuming, particularly for 3D seismic data volumes. To overcome this challenge, we propose a semi-supervised method based on pixel-level contrastive learning, termed CONSS, which can efficiently identify seismic facies using only 1% of the original annotations. Furthermore, the absence of a unified data division and standardized metrics hinders the fair comparison of various facies classification approaches. To this end, we develop an objective benchmark for the evaluation of semi-supervised methods, including self-training, consistency regularization, and the proposed CONSS. Our benchmark is publicly available to enable researchers to objectively compare different approaches. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the F3 survey.
summary: Recently, seismic facies classification based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) has garnered significant research interest. However, existing CNN-based supervised learning approaches necessitate massive labeled data. Labeling is laborious and time-consuming, particularly for 3D seismic data volumes. To overcome this challenge, we propose a semi-supervised method based on pixel-level contrastive learning, termed CONSS, which can efficiently identify seismic facies using only 1% of the original annotations. Furthermore, the absence of a unified data division and standardized metrics hinders the fair comparison of various facies classification approaches. To this end, we develop an objective benchmark for the evaluation of semi-supervised methods, including self-training, consistency regularization, and the proposed CONSS. Our benchmark is publicly available to enable researchers to objectively compare different approaches. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the F3 survey.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的地震相分类引起了广泛的研究兴趣。然而，现有的基于 CNN 的监督学习方法需要大量标记数据。标记既费力又耗时，尤其是对于 3D 地震数据量。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于像素级对比学习的半监督方法，称为 CONSS，该方法仅使用 1% 的原始注释即可有效识别地震相。此外，缺乏统一的数据划分和标准化指标阻碍了各种相分类方法的公平比较。为此，我们制定了评估半监督方法的客观基准，包括自我训练、一致性正则化和所提出的 CONSS。我们的基准是公开的，使研究人员能够客观地比较不同的方法。实验结果表明，我们的方法在 F3 调查中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的半监督方法CONSS，用于提高地震相分类的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的监督学习方法需要大量标注数据，而标注3D地震数据耗时费力，且缺乏统一的评估基准。
AI.method: 设计像素级对比学习框架CONSS，仅需1%的标注数据，并构建包含自训练和一致性正则化的客观基准测试集。
AI.result: 在F3测线数据集上达到最先进的分类性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: CONSS通过对比学习显著降低标注依赖，公开基准推动了半监督地震相分类研究的公平比较。

authors_text: Massimo Carraturo,Andrea Mazzullo
title: An Ontology for Defect Detection in Metal Additive Manufacturing
title_zh: 金属增材制造中缺陷检测的本体
abstract: A key challenge for Industry 4.0 applications is to develop control systems for automated manufacturing services that are capable of addressing both data integration and semantic interoperability issues, as well as monitoring and decision making tasks. To address such an issue in advanced manufacturing systems, principled knowledge representation approaches based on formal ontologies have been proposed as a foundation to information management and maintenance in presence of heterogeneous data sources. In addition, ontologies provide reasoning and querying capabilities to aid domain experts and end users in the context of constraint validation and decision making. Finally, ontology-based approaches to advanced manufacturing services can support the explainability and interpretability of the behaviour of monitoring, control, and simulation systems that are based on black-box machine learning algorithms. In this work, we provide a novel ontology for the classification of process-induced defects known from the metal additive manufacturing literature. Together with a formal representation of the characterising features and sources of defects, we integrate our knowledge base with state-of-the-art ontologies in the field. Our knowledge base aims at enhancing the modelling capabilities of additive manufacturing ontologies by adding further defect analysis terminology and diagnostic inference features.

To address such an issue in advanced manufacturing systems, principled knowledge representation approaches based on formal ontologies have been proposed as a foundation to information management and maintenance in presence of heterogeneous data sources. In addition, ontologies provide reasoning and querying capabilities to aid domain experts and end users in the context of constraint validation and decision making. Finally, ontology-based approaches to advanced manufacturing services can support the explainability and interpretability of the behaviour of monitoring, control, and simulation systems that are based on black-box machine learning algorithms. In this work, we provide a novel ontology for the classification of process-induced defects known from the metal additive manufacturing literature. Our knowledge base aims at enhancing the modelling capabilities of additive manufacturing ontologies by adding further defect analysis terminology and diagnostic inference features.
abstract_zh: 工业 4.0 应用的一个关键挑战是开发用于自动化制造服务的控制系统，该系统能够解决数据集成和语义互操作性问题以及监控和决策任务。为了解决先进制造系统中的此类问题，提出了基于形式本体的原则性知识表示方法，作为异构数据源存在下信息管理和维护的基础。此外，本体还提供推理和查询功能，以帮助领域专家和最终用户进行约束验证和决策。最后，基于本体的先进制造服务方法可以支持基于黑盒机器学习算法的监视、控制和仿真系统行为的可解释性和可解释性。在这项工作中，我们提供了一种新颖的本体论，用于对金属增材制造文献中已知的工艺引起的缺陷进行分类。连同特征特征和缺陷来源的正式表示，我们将我们的知识库与该领域最先进的本体论相结合。我们的知识库旨在通过添加更多缺陷分析术语和诊断推理功能来增强增材制造本体的建模能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于金属增材制造中工艺缺陷分类的本体，以增强数据集成和语义互操作性。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0需要解决异构数据源下的数据集成、语义互操作性及自动化监控决策问题，传统方法难以满足复杂制造系统的解释性需求。
AI.method: 构建包含缺陷特征、来源及分类的正式本体，整合现有先进本体并扩展缺陷分析术语与诊断推理功能。
AI.result: 开发出支持缺陷分类与诊断的本体知识库，提升增材制造系统建模能力与决策可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该本体为金属增材制造缺陷分析提供统一知识框架，促进制造过程的智能化监控与语义化决策支持。

authors_text: Henok Ghebrechristos,Stence Nicholas,David Mirsky,Gita Alaghband,Manh Huynh,Zackary Kromer,Ligia Batista,Brent ONeill,Steven Moulton,Daniel M. Lindberg
title: Deep Learning Mixture-of-Experts Approach for Cytotoxic Edema Assessment in Infants and Children
title_zh: 用于婴儿和儿童细胞毒性水肿评估的深度学习混合专家方法
abstract: This paper presents a deep learning framework for image classification aimed at increasing predictive performance for Cytotoxic Edema (CE) diagnosis in infants and children. The proposed framework includes two 3D network architectures optimized to learn from two types of clinical MRI data , a trace Diffusion Weighted Image (DWI) and the calculated Apparent Diffusion Coefficient map (ADC). This work proposes a robust and novel solution based on volumetric analysis of 3D images (using pixels from time slices) and 3D convolutional neural network (CNN) models. While simple in architecture, the proposed framework shows significant quantitative results on the domain problem. We use a dataset curated from a Childrens Hospital Colorado (CHCO) patient registry to report a predictive performance F1 score of 0.91 at distinguishing CE patients from children with severe neurologic injury without CE. In addition, we perform analysis of our systems output to determine the association of CE with Abusive Head Trauma (AHT) , a type of traumatic brain injury (TBI) associated with abuse , and overall functional outcome and in hospital mortality of infants and young children. We used two clinical variables, AHT diagnosis and Functional Status Scale (FSS) score, to arrive at the conclusion that CE is highly correlated with overall outcome and that further study is needed to determine whether CE is a biomarker of AHT. With that, this paper introduces a simple yet powerful deep learning based solution for automated CE classification. This solution also enables an indepth analysis of progression of CE and its correlation to AHT and overall neurologic outcome, which in turn has the potential to empower experts to diagnose and mitigate AHT during early stages of a childs life.
summary: This paper presents a deep learning framework for image classification aimed at increasing predictive performance for Cytotoxic Edema (CE) diagnosis in infants and children. The proposed framework includes two 3D network architectures optimized to learn from two types of clinical MRI data , a trace Diffusion Weighted Image (DWI) and the calculated Apparent Diffusion Coefficient map (ADC). This work proposes a robust and novel solution based on volumetric analysis of 3D images (using pixels from time slices) and 3D convolutional neural network (CNN) models. While simple in architecture, the proposed framework shows significant quantitative results on the domain problem. We use a dataset curated from a Childrens Hospital Colorado (CHCO) patient registry to report a predictive performance F1 score of 0.91 at distinguishing CE patients from children with severe neurologic injury without CE. In addition, we perform analysis of our systems output to determine the association of CE with Abusive Head Trauma (AHT) , a type of traumatic brain injury (TBI) associated with abuse , and overall functional outcome and in hospital mortality of infants and young children. We used two clinical variables, AHT diagnosis and Functional Status Scale (FSS) score, to arrive at the conclusion that CE is highly correlated with overall outcome and that further study is needed to determine whether CE is a biomarker of AHT. With that, this paper introduces a simple yet powerful deep learning based solution for automated CE classification. This solution also enables an indepth analysis of progression of CE and its correlation to AHT and overall neurologic outcome, which in turn has the potential to empower experts to diagnose and mitigate AHT during early stages of a childs life.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于图像分类的深度学习框架，旨在提高婴儿和儿童细胞毒性水肿 (CE) 诊断的预测性能。所提出的框架包括两个经过优化的 3D 网络架构，可从两种类型的临床 MRI 数据中进行学习：迹线扩散加权图像 (DWI) 和计算的表观扩散系数图 (ADC)。这项工作提出了一种基于 3D 图像体积分析（使用时间切片中的像素）和 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 模型的稳健而新颖的解决方案。虽然架构简单，但所提出的框架在领域问题上显示了显着的定量结果。我们使用科罗拉多州儿童医院 (CHCO) 患者登记处整理的数据集报告预测性能 F1 得分为 0.91，用于区分 CE 患者和未患 CE 的严重神经损伤儿童。此外，我们对系统输出进行分析，以确定 CE 与虐待性头部创伤 (AHT)（一种与虐待相关的创伤性脑损伤 (TBI)）以及婴儿和幼儿的整体功能结果和医院死亡率之间的关联。我们使用两个临床变量，AHT 诊断和功能状态量表 (FSS) 评分，得出这样的结论：CE 与总体结果高度相关，需要进一步研究以确定 CE 是否是 AHT 的生物标志物。本文介绍了一种简单但功能强大的基于深度学习的自动 CE 分类解决方案。该解决方案还能够深入分析 CE 的进展及其与 AHT 和整体神经系统结果的相关性，从而有可能使专家能够在儿童生命的早期阶段诊断和减轻 AHT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的混合专家方法，用于婴儿和儿童细胞毒性脑水肿（CE）的自动分类与评估。
AI.motivation: 细胞毒性脑水肿（CE）的准确诊断对婴儿和儿童的神经预后至关重要，但传统方法存在挑战。需开发高效算法以提高诊断准确性，并探索CE与虐待性头部创伤（AHT）的关联性。
AI.method: 设计两种3D网络架构，分别处理扩散加权成像（DWI）和表观扩散系数图（ADC）数据，结合3D卷积神经网络（CNN）与像素时间切片的体积分析，利用科罗拉多儿童医院的临床数据集进行训练与验证。
AI.result: 在区分CE患者与无CE的严重神经损伤儿童中，模型达到F1分数0.91。分析表明CE与AHT诊断及神经功能预后显著相关，但需进一步研究确认CE作为AHT生物标志物的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的深度学习框架有效实现了CE的自动化分类，同时揭示了CE与AHT及神经预后的关联，为早期诊断和干预提供了技术支撑。

authors_text: Wei Xiao,Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Ramin Hasani,Mathias Lechner,Yutong Ban,Chuang Gan,Daniela Rus
title: On the Forward Invariance of Neural ODEs
title_zh: 关于神经常微分方程的前向不变性
comment: 25 pages, accepted in ICML2023, website: https://weixy21.github.io/invariance/
comments: 25 pages, accepted in ICML2023, website: https://weixy21.github.io/invariance/
abstract: We propose a new method to ensure neural ordinary differential equations (ODEs) satisfy output specifications by using invariance set propagation. Our approach uses a class of control barrier functions to transform output specifications into constraints on the parameters and inputs of the learning system. This setup allows us to achieve output specification guarantees simply by changing the constrained parameters/inputs both during training and inference. Moreover, we demonstrate that our invariance set propagation through data-controlled neural ODEs not only maintains generalization performance but also creates an additional degree of robustness by enabling causal manipulation of the system's parameters/inputs. We test our method on a series of representation learning tasks, including modeling physical dynamics and convexity portraits, as well as safe collision avoidance for autonomous vehicles.
summary: We propose a new method to ensure neural ordinary differential equations (ODEs) satisfy output specifications by using invariance set propagation. Our approach uses a class of control barrier functions to transform output specifications into constraints on the parameters and inputs of the learning system. This setup allows us to achieve output specification guarantees simply by changing the constrained parameters/inputs both during training and inference. Moreover, we demonstrate that our invariance set propagation through data-controlled neural ODEs not only maintains generalization performance but also creates an additional degree of robustness by enabling causal manipulation of the system's parameters/inputs. We test our method on a series of representation learning tasks, including modeling physical dynamics and convexity portraits, as well as safe collision avoidance for autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，通过使用不变性集传播来确保神经常微分方程（ODE）满足输出规范。我们的方法使用一类控制障碍函数将输出规范转换为对学习系统的参数和输入的约束。这种设置使我们能够通过在训练和推理期间更改约束参数/输入来实现输出规范保证。此外，我们证明了通过数据控制的神经常微分方程的不变性集传播不仅保持了泛化性能，而且还通过对系统参数/输入进行因果操作来创建额外的鲁棒性。我们在一系列表示学习任务上测试我们的方法，包括物理动力学建模和凸性肖像，以及自动驾驶车辆的安全防撞。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过不变集传播确保神经常微分方程（Neural ODEs）满足输出规范的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有神经ODE在满足输出规范和安全性约束方面存在不足，需提升系统在训练与推理中的鲁棒性与可控性。
AI.method: 利用控制屏障函数将输出规范转化为参数和输入约束，通过数据控制的神经ODE实现不变集传播。
AI.result: 方法在物理动力学建模、凸性分析及自动驾驶避障任务中保持泛化性能并增强系统鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效保障神经ODE的输出规范，为安全关键应用提供可解释的参数/输入控制框架。

search_text: On the Forward Invariance of Neural ODEs 关于神经常微分方程的前向不变性 We propose a new method to ensure neural ordinary differential equations (ODEs) satisfy output specifications by using invariance set propagation. Our approach uses a class of control barrier functions to transform output specifications into constraints on the parameters and inputs of the learning system. This setup allows us to achieve output specification guarantees simply by changing the constrained parameters/inputs both during training and inference. Moreover, we demonstrate that our invariance set propagation through data-controlled neural ODEs not only maintains generalization performance but also creates an additional degree of robustness by enabling causal manipulation of the system's parameters/inputs. We test our method on a series of representation learning tasks, including modeling physical dynamics and convexity portraits, as well as safe collision avoidance for autonomous vehicles. 我们提出了一种新方法，通过使用不变性集传播来确保神经常微分方程（ODE）满足输出规范。我们的方法使用一类控制障碍函数将输出规范转换为对学习系统的参数和输入的约束。这种设置使我们能够通过在训练和推理期间更改约束参数/输入来实现输出规范保证。此外，我们证明了通过数据控制的神经常微分方程的不变性集传播不仅保持了泛化性能，而且还通过对系统参数/输入进行因果操作来创建额外的鲁棒性。我们在一系列表示学习任务上测试我们的方法，包括物理动力学建模和凸性肖像，以及自动驾驶车辆的安全防撞。 本文提出一种通过不变集传播确保神经常微分方程（Neural ODEs）满足输出规范的新方法。 Wei Xiao,Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Ramin Hasani,Mathias Lechner,Yutong Ban,Chuang Gan,Daniela Rus cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yan Gong,Georgina Cosma
title: Improving Visual-Semantic Embeddings by Learning Semantically-Enhanced Hard Negatives for Cross-modal Information Retrieval
title_zh: 通过学习跨模态信息检索的语义增强硬否定来改进视觉语义嵌入
abstract: Visual Semantic Embedding (VSE) aims to extract the semantics of images and their descriptions, and embed them into the same latent space for cross-modal information retrieval. Most existing VSE networks are trained by adopting a hard negatives loss function which learns an objective margin between the similarity of relevant and irrelevant image-description embedding pairs. However, the objective margin in the hard negatives loss function is set as a fixed hyperparameter that ignores the semantic differences of the irrelevant image-description pairs. To address the challenge of measuring the optimal similarities between image-description pairs before obtaining the trained VSE networks, this paper presents a novel approach that comprises two main parts: (1) finds the underlying semantics of image descriptions; and (2) proposes a novel semantically enhanced hard negatives loss function, where the learning objective is dynamically determined based on the optimal similarity scores between irrelevant image-description pairs. Extensive experiments were carried out by integrating the proposed methods into five state-of-the-art VSE networks that were applied to three benchmark datasets for cross-modal information retrieval tasks. The results revealed that the proposed methods achieved the best performance and can also be adopted by existing and future VSE networks.
summary: Visual Semantic Embedding (VSE) aims to extract the semantics of images and their descriptions, and embed them into the same latent space for cross-modal information retrieval. Most existing VSE networks are trained by adopting a hard negatives loss function which learns an objective margin between the similarity of relevant and irrelevant image-description embedding pairs. However, the objective margin in the hard negatives loss function is set as a fixed hyperparameter that ignores the semantic differences of the irrelevant image-description pairs. To address the challenge of measuring the optimal similarities between image-description pairs before obtaining the trained VSE networks, this paper presents a novel approach that comprises two main parts: (1) finds the underlying semantics of image descriptions; and (2) proposes a novel semantically enhanced hard negatives loss function, where the learning objective is dynamically determined based on the optimal similarity scores between irrelevant image-description pairs. Extensive experiments were carried out by integrating the proposed methods into five state-of-the-art VSE networks that were applied to three benchmark datasets for cross-modal information retrieval tasks. The results revealed that the proposed methods achieved the best performance and can also be adopted by existing and future VSE networks.
abstract_zh: 视觉语义嵌入（VSE）旨在提取图像及其描述的语义，并将它们嵌入到同一潜在空间中以进行跨模态信息检索。大多数现有的 VSE 网络都是通过采用硬负片损失函数来训练的，该函数学习相关和不相关图像描述嵌入对的相似性之间的客观余量。然而，硬负片损失函数中的客观余量被设置为固定的超参数，忽略了不相关图像描述对的语义差异。为了解决在获得经过训练的 VSE 网络之前测量图像描述对之间的最佳相似性的挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的方法，该方法包括两个主要部分：（1）找到图像描述的底层语义； (2)提出了一种新颖的语义增强的硬负片损失函数，其中学习目标是根据不相关图像描述对之间的最佳相似度分数动态确定的。通过将所提出的方法集成到五个最先进的 VSE 网络中进行了广泛的实验，这些网络应用于跨模式信息检索任务的三个基准数据集。结果表明，所提出的方法取得了最佳性能，并且也可以被现有和未来的 VSE 网络采用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进视觉语义嵌入的方法，通过学习语义增强的难负样本以提升跨模态信息检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语义嵌入网络使用固定超参数的难负样本损失函数，无法反映无关图像-描述对之间的语义差异，导致相似度度量不够精确。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：(1) 提取图像描述的潜在语义；(2) 设计动态语义增强的难负样本损失函数，根据无关对的最优相似度动态调整学习目标。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上集成到五种先进VSE网络中，实验结果表明该方法在跨模态检索任务中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过动态适应语义差异提升了嵌入质量，可有效应用于现有及未来的视觉语义嵌入网络。

authors_text: Yuzhi Yang,Zhaoyang Zhang,Yuqing Tian,Zhaohui Yang,Chongwen Huang,Caijun Zhong,Kai-Kit Wong
title: Over-the-Air Split Machine Learning in Wireless MIMO Networks
title_zh: 无线 MIMO 网络中的无线分割机器学习
comment: to be pubilshed in IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications, 15 pages, 13 figures, journal paper
comments: to be pubilshed in IEEE Journal on Selected Areas in Communications, 15 pages, 13 figures, journal paper
abstract: In split machine learning (ML), different partitions of a neural network (NN) are executed by different computing nodes, requiring a large amount of communication cost. To ease communication burden, over-the-air computation (OAC) can efficiently implement all or part of the computation at the same time of communication. Based on the proposed system, the system implementation over wireless network is introduced and we provide the problem formulation. In particular, we show that the inter-layer connection in a NN of any size can be mathematically decomposed into a set of linear precoding and combining transformations over MIMO channels. Therefore, the precoding matrix at the transmitter and the combining matrix at the receiver of each MIMO link, as well as the channel matrix itself, can jointly serve as a fully connected layer of the NN. The generalization of the proposed scheme to the conventional NNs is also introduced. Finally, we extend the proposed scheme to the widely used convolutional neural networks and demonstrate its effectiveness under both the static and quasi-static memory channel conditions with comprehensive simulations. In such a split ML system, the precoding and combining matrices are regarded as trainable parameters, while MIMO channel matrix is regarded as unknown (implicit) parameters.
summary: In split machine learning (ML), different partitions of a neural network (NN) are executed by different computing nodes, requiring a large amount of communication cost. To ease communication burden, over-the-air computation (OAC) can efficiently implement all or part of the computation at the same time of communication. Based on the proposed system, the system implementation over wireless network is introduced and we provide the problem formulation. In particular, we show that the inter-layer connection in a NN of any size can be mathematically decomposed into a set of linear precoding and combining transformations over MIMO channels. Therefore, the precoding matrix at the transmitter and the combining matrix at the receiver of each MIMO link, as well as the channel matrix itself, can jointly serve as a fully connected layer of the NN. The generalization of the proposed scheme to the conventional NNs is also introduced. Finally, we extend the proposed scheme to the widely used convolutional neural networks and demonstrate its effectiveness under both the static and quasi-static memory channel conditions with comprehensive simulations. In such a split ML system, the precoding and combining matrices are regarded as trainable parameters, while MIMO channel matrix is regarded as unknown (implicit) parameters.
abstract_zh: 在分割机器学习（ML）中，神经网络（NN）的不同分区由不同的计算节点执行，需要大量的通信成本。为了减轻通信负担，空中计算（OAC）可以在通信的同时高效地实现全部或部分计算。基于所提出的系统，介绍了无线网络上的系统实现，并提供了问题的表述。特别是，我们证明了任何大小的神经网络中的层间连接都可以在数学上分解为一组线性预编码和 MIMO 信道上的组合变换。因此，每个MIMO链路的发射机处的预编码矩阵和接收机处的组合矩阵以及信道矩阵本身可以共同充当神经网络的全连接层。还介绍了所提出的方案对传统神经网络的推广。最后，我们将所提出的方案扩展到广泛使用的卷积神经网络，并通过全面的仿真证明了其在静态和准静态内存通道条件下的有效性。在这种分离式机器学习系统中，预编码和组合矩阵被视为可训练参数，而MIMO信道矩阵被视为未知（隐式）参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无线MIMO网络的空中计算（OAC）技术，用于实现分割式机器学习（ML）中的高效通信与计算协同。
AI.motivation: 分割式机器学习需要在不同节点间传输大量数据，导致通信开销过大，而空中计算可通过通信与计算的联合设计降低这一负担。
AI.method: 将神经网络的层间连接数学分解为MIMO信道上的线性预编码与合并变换，利用预编码矩阵、合并矩阵及信道矩阵共同构成全连接层，并扩展至卷积神经网络。
AI.result: 在静态和准静态信道条件下，通过仿真验证了该方案在分割式ML系统中的有效性，且MIMO信道矩阵作为隐含参数无需显式训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为传统神经网络和卷积神经网络提供了通用框架，实现了无线MIMO网络中分割式机器学习的高效部署。

search_text: Over-the-Air Split Machine Learning in Wireless MIMO Networks 无线 MIMO 网络中的无线分割机器学习 In split machine learning (ML), different partitions of a neural network (NN) are executed by different computing nodes, requiring a large amount of communication cost. To ease communication burden, over-the-air computation (OAC) can efficiently implement all or part of the computation at the same time of communication. Based on the proposed system, the system implementation over wireless network is introduced and we provide the problem formulation. In particular, we show that the inter-layer connection in a NN of any size can be mathematically decomposed into a set of linear precoding and combining transformations over MIMO channels. Therefore, the precoding matrix at the transmitter and the combining matrix at the receiver of each MIMO link, as well as the channel matrix itself, can jointly serve as a fully connected layer of the NN. The generalization of the proposed scheme to the conventional NNs is also introduced. Finally, we extend the proposed scheme to the widely used convolutional neural networks and demonstrate its effectiveness under both the static and quasi-static memory channel conditions with comprehensive simulations. In such a split ML system, the precoding and combining matrices are regarded as trainable parameters, while MIMO channel matrix is regarded as unknown (implicit) parameters. 在分割机器学习（ML）中，神经网络（NN）的不同分区由不同的计算节点执行，需要大量的通信成本。为了减轻通信负担，空中计算（OAC）可以在通信的同时高效地实现全部或部分计算。基于所提出的系统，介绍了无线网络上的系统实现，并提供了问题的表述。特别是，我们证明了任何大小的神经网络中的层间连接都可以在数学上分解为一组线性预编码和 MIMO 信道上的组合变换。因此，每个MIMO链路的发射机处的预编码矩阵和接收机处的组合矩阵以及信道矩阵本身可以共同充当神经网络的全连接层。还介绍了所提出的方案对传统神经网络的推广。最后，我们将所提出的方案扩展到广泛使用的卷积神经网络，并通过全面的仿真证明了其在静态和准静态内存通道条件下的有效性。在这种分离式机器学习系统中，预编码和组合矩阵被视为可训练参数，而MIMO信道矩阵被视为未知（隐式）参数。 本文提出了一种基于无线MIMO网络的空中计算（OAC）技术，用于实现分割式机器学习（ML）中的高效通信与计算协同。 Yuzhi Yang,Zhaoyang Zhang,Yuqing Tian,Zhaohui Yang,Chongwen Huang,Caijun Zhong,Kai-Kit Wong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Shokhrukh Miraliev,Shakhboz Abdigapporov,Jumabek Alikhanov,Vijay Kakani,Hakil Kim
title: Edge Device Deployment of Multi-Tasking Network for Self-Driving Operations
title_zh: 多任务网络边缘设备部署实现自动驾驶操作
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1908.08926 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1908.08926 by other authors
abstract: A safe and robust autonomous driving system relies on accurate perception of the environment for application-oriented scenarios. This paper proposes deployment of the three most crucial tasks (i.e., object detection, drivable area segmentation and lane detection tasks) on embedded system for self-driving operations. To achieve this research objective, multi-tasking network is utilized with a simple encoder-decoder architecture. Comprehensive and extensive comparisons for two models based on different backbone networks are performed. All training experiments are performed on server while Nvidia Jetson Xavier NX is chosen as deployment device.
summary: A safe and robust autonomous driving system relies on accurate perception of the environment for application-oriented scenarios. This paper proposes deployment of the three most crucial tasks (i.e., object detection, drivable area segmentation and lane detection tasks) on embedded system for self-driving operations. To achieve this research objective, multi-tasking network is utilized with a simple encoder-decoder architecture. Comprehensive and extensive comparisons for two models based on different backbone networks are performed. All training experiments are performed on server while Nvidia Jetson Xavier NX is chosen as deployment device.
abstract_zh: 安全稳健的自动驾驶系统依赖于面向应用场景的环境准确感知。本文提出在自动驾驶操作的嵌入式系统上部署三个最关键的任务（即对象检测、可驾驶区域分割和车道检测任务）。为了实现这一研究目标，多任务网络采用了简单的编码器-解码器架构。对基于不同骨干网络的两种模型进行了全面、广泛的比较。所有训练实验均在服务器上进行，并选择 Nvidia Jetson Xavier NX 作为部署设备。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将多任务网络部署到边缘设备，以实现自动驾驶中的环境感知任务。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要实时、准确的环境感知能力，而传统方法在边缘设备上难以高效处理多任务。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构的多任务网络，比较两种主干网络模型，并在服务器训练后部署至Nvidia Jetson Xavier NX。
AI.result: 实现了三个关键任务（物体检测、可行驶区域分割、车道检测）在边缘设备上的有效部署与性能验证。
AI.conclusion: 多任务网络在边缘设备上的部署可满足自动驾驶对实时性和准确性的需求，为嵌入式系统应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Cicero Nogueira dos Santos,Zhe Dong,Daniel Cer,John Nham,Siamak Shakeri,Jianmo Ni,Yun-hsuan Sung
title: Knowledge Prompts: Injecting World Knowledge into Language Models through Soft Prompts
title_zh: 知识提示：通过软提示将世界知识注入语言模型
abstract: Soft prompts have been recently proposed as a tool for adapting large frozen language models (LMs) to new tasks. In this work, we repurpose soft prompts to the task of injecting world knowledge into LMs. We introduce a method to train soft prompts via self-supervised learning on data from knowledge bases. The resulting soft knowledge prompts (KPs) are task independent and work as an external memory of the LMs. We perform qualitative and quantitative experiments and demonstrate that: (1) KPs can effectively model the structure of the training data; (2) KPs can be used to improve the performance of LMs in different knowledge intensive tasks.
summary: Soft prompts have been recently proposed as a tool for adapting large frozen language models (LMs) to new tasks. In this work, we repurpose soft prompts to the task of injecting world knowledge into LMs. We introduce a method to train soft prompts via self-supervised learning on data from knowledge bases. The resulting soft knowledge prompts (KPs) are task independent and work as an external memory of the LMs. We perform qualitative and quantitative experiments and demonstrate that: (1) KPs can effectively model the structure of the training data; (2) KPs can be used to improve the performance of LMs in different knowledge intensive tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近有人提出软提示作为一种使大型冻结语言模型（LM）适应新任务的工具。在这项工作中，我们重新利用软提示来完成将世界知识注入 LM 的任务。我们引入了一种通过对知识库中的数据进行自我监督学习来训练软提示的方法。生成的软知识提示 (KP) 与任务无关，并且可作为 LM 的外部存储器。我们进行了定性和定量实验，并证明：（1）KP 可以有效地对训练数据的结构进行建模； (2) KP可用于提高LM在不同知识密集型任务中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过软提示（Soft Prompts）将世界知识注入到大型语言模型中，以提升其在知识密集型任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 传统软提示主要用于任务适配，但缺乏对语言模型外部知识的有效注入方法，而知识密集型任务需要更通用的知识增强手段。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习在知识库数据上训练软提示（称为知识提示KPs），使其作为语言模型的外部记忆，无需任务特定调整。
AI.result: 实验表明，KPs能有效建模训练数据结构，并在多个知识密集型任务中提升语言模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 知识提示提供了一种通用、任务无关的方法，通过外部知识增强语言模型，为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Amal Alabdulkarim,Madhuri Singh,Gennie Mansi,Kaely Hall,Upol Ehsan,Mark O. Riedl
title: Experiential Explanations for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的经验解释
comment: (50 pages, 28 figures) Published in the Journal of Neural Computing & Applications (2025) Code is available in: https://github.com/amal994/Experiential-Explanations-RL
comments: (50 pages, 28 figures) Published in the Journal of Neural Computing & Applications (2025) Code is available in: https://github.com/amal994/Experiential-Explanations-RL
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) systems can be complex and non-interpretable, making it challenging for non-AI experts to understand or intervene in their decisions. This is due in part to the sequential nature of RL in which actions are chosen because of their likelihood of obtaining future rewards. However, RL agents discard the qualitative features of their training, making it difficult to recover user-understandable information for "why" an action is chosen. We propose a technique Experiential Explanations to generate counterfactual explanations by training influence predictors along with the RL policy. Influence predictors are models that learn how different sources of reward affect the agent in different states, thus restoring information about how the policy reflects the environment. Two human evaluation studies revealed that participants presented with Experiential Explanations were better able to correctly guess what an agent would do than those presented with other standard types of explanation. Participants also found that Experiential Explanations are more understandable, satisfying, complete, useful, and accurate. Qualitative analysis provides information on the factors of Experiential Explanations that are most useful and the desired characteristics that participants seek from the explanations.
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) systems can be complex and non-interpretable, making it challenging for non-AI experts to understand or intervene in their decisions. This is due in part to the sequential nature of RL in which actions are chosen because of their likelihood of obtaining future rewards. However, RL agents discard the qualitative features of their training, making it difficult to recover user-understandable information for "why" an action is chosen. We propose a technique Experiential Explanations to generate counterfactual explanations by training influence predictors along with the RL policy. Influence predictors are models that learn how different sources of reward affect the agent in different states, thus restoring information about how the policy reflects the environment. Two human evaluation studies revealed that participants presented with Experiential Explanations were better able to correctly guess what an agent would do than those presented with other standard types of explanation. Participants also found that Experiential Explanations are more understandable, satisfying, complete, useful, and accurate. Qualitative analysis provides information on the factors of Experiential Explanations that are most useful and the desired characteristics that participants seek from the explanations.
abstract_zh: 强化学习 (RL) 系统可能很复杂且不可解释，这使得非人工智能专家很难理解或干预他们的决策。这部分是由于强化学习的顺序性质，其中选择动作是因为它们获得未来奖励的可能性。然而，强化学习代理放弃了训练的定性特征，使得很难恢复用户可理解的信息来了解“为什么”选择一个动作。我们提出了一种经验解释技术，通过训练影响预测变量和强化学习策略来生成反事实解释。影响预测器是学习不同奖励来源如何影响不同状态下的代理的模型，从而恢复有关策略如何反映环境的信息。两项人类评估研究表明，接受体验式解释的参与者比接受其他标准类型解释的参与者能够更好地正确猜测代理人会做什么。参与者还发现体验式解释更容易理解、更令人满意、更完整、更有用、更准确。定性分析提供了有关最有用的体验解释因素以及参与者从解释中寻求的所需特征的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'经验解释'的方法，通过训练影响预测器来增强强化学习系统的可解释性，使非专家用户能理解代理的决策过程。
AI.motivation: 强化学习系统因决策过程复杂且缺乏可解释性，导致非AI专家难以理解或干预其行为，现有解释方法无法有效恢复用户可理解的决策依据。
AI.method: 在训练RL策略的同时训练影响预测器，通过学习不同奖励源对代理在不同状态下的影响，生成反事实解释以恢复策略与环境的关联信息。
AI.result: 用户实验表明，使用经验解释的参与者更准确预测代理行为，且认为该方法在可理解性、完整性、实用性等方面优于传统解释方式。
AI.conclusion: 经验解释有效提升了RL系统的可解释性，未来需进一步探索其在不同场景下的应用及优化方向。

search_text: Experiential Explanations for Reinforcement Learning 强化学习的经验解释 Reinforcement learning (RL) systems can be complex and non-interpretable, making it challenging for non-AI experts to understand or intervene in their decisions. This is due in part to the sequential nature of RL in which actions are chosen because of their likelihood of obtaining future rewards. However, RL agents discard the qualitative features of their training, making it difficult to recover user-understandable information for "why" an action is chosen. We propose a technique Experiential Explanations to generate counterfactual explanations by training influence predictors along with the RL policy. Influence predictors are models that learn how different sources of reward affect the agent in different states, thus restoring information about how the policy reflects the environment. Two human evaluation studies revealed that participants presented with Experiential Explanations were better able to correctly guess what an agent would do than those presented with other standard types of explanation. Participants also found that Experiential Explanations are more understandable, satisfying, complete, useful, and accurate. Qualitative analysis provides information on the factors of Experiential Explanations that are most useful and the desired characteristics that participants seek from the explanations. 强化学习 (RL) 系统可能很复杂且不可解释，这使得非人工智能专家很难理解或干预他们的决策。这部分是由于强化学习的顺序性质，其中选择动作是因为它们获得未来奖励的可能性。然而，强化学习代理放弃了训练的定性特征，使得很难恢复用户可理解的信息来了解“为什么”选择一个动作。我们提出了一种经验解释技术，通过训练影响预测变量和强化学习策略来生成反事实解释。影响预测器是学习不同奖励来源如何影响不同状态下的代理的模型，从而恢复有关策略如何反映环境的信息。两项人类评估研究表明，接受体验式解释的参与者比接受其他标准类型解释的参与者能够更好地正确猜测代理人会做什么。参与者还发现体验式解释更容易理解、更令人满意、更完整、更有用、更准确。定性分析提供了有关最有用的体验解释因素以及参与者从解释中寻求的所需特征的信息。 本文提出一种名为'经验解释'的方法，通过训练影响预测器来增强强化学习系统的可解释性，使非专家用户能理解代理的决策过程。 Amal Alabdulkarim,Madhuri Singh,Gennie Mansi,Kaely Hall,Upol Ehsan,Mark O. Riedl cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Jielin Qiu,Jiacheng Zhu,Mengdi Xu,Franck Dernoncourt,Trung Bui,Zhaowen Wang,Bo Li,Ding Zhao,Hailin Jin
title: Semantics-Consistent Cross-domain Summarization via Optimal Transport Alignment
title_zh: 通过最佳传输对齐实现语义一致的跨域摘要
abstract: Multimedia summarization with multimodal output (MSMO) is a recently explored application in language grounding. It plays an essential role in real-world applications, i.e., automatically generating cover images and titles for news articles or providing introductions to online videos. However, existing methods extract features from the whole video and article and use fusion methods to select the representative one, thus usually ignoring the critical structure and varying semantics. In this work, we propose a Semantics-Consistent Cross-domain Summarization (SCCS) model based on optimal transport alignment with visual and textual segmentation. In specific, our method first decomposes both video and article into segments in order to capture the structural semantics, respectively. Then SCCS follows a cross-domain alignment objective with optimal transport distance, which leverages multimodal interaction to match and select the visual and textual summary. We evaluated our method on three recent multimodal datasets and demonstrated the effectiveness of our method in producing high-quality multimodal summaries.
summary: Multimedia summarization with multimodal output (MSMO) is a recently explored application in language grounding. It plays an essential role in real-world applications, i.e., automatically generating cover images and titles for news articles or providing introductions to online videos. However, existing methods extract features from the whole video and article and use fusion methods to select the representative one, thus usually ignoring the critical structure and varying semantics. In this work, we propose a Semantics-Consistent Cross-domain Summarization (SCCS) model based on optimal transport alignment with visual and textual segmentation. In specific, our method first decomposes both video and article into segments in order to capture the structural semantics, respectively. Then SCCS follows a cross-domain alignment objective with optimal transport distance, which leverages multimodal interaction to match and select the visual and textual summary. We evaluated our method on three recent multimodal datasets and demonstrated the effectiveness of our method in producing high-quality multimodal summaries.
abstract_zh: 具有多模态输出的多媒体摘要（MSMO）是最近在语言基础中探索的应用。它在现实应用中发挥着重要作用，即自动生成新闻文章的封面图像和标题或提供在线视频的介绍。然而，现有的方法从整个视频和文章中提取特征，并使用融合方法来选择有代表性的特征，因此通常忽略关键结构和变化的语义。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于视觉和文本分割的最佳传输对齐的语义一致跨域摘要（SCCS）模型。具体来说，我们的方法首先将视频和文章分解为片段，以便分别捕获结构语义。然后，SCCS 遵循具有最佳传输距离的跨域对齐目标，利用多模式交互来匹配和选择视觉和文本摘要。我们在三个最近的多模态数据集上评估了我们的方法，并证明了我们的方法在生成高质量多模态摘要方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最优传输对齐的语义一致跨域摘要模型（SCCS），用于生成高质量的多模态摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取视频和文章特征时忽略结构语义和跨域对齐问题，导致摘要质量不足。
AI.method: 通过视觉与文本分割捕捉结构语义，利用最优传输距离实现跨域对齐，匹配并选择多模态摘要内容。
AI.result: 在三个多模态数据集上验证，证明该方法能生成高质量的多模态摘要。
AI.conclusion: SCCS模型通过结构语义分割与最优传输对齐，有效解决了跨域摘要中的语义一致性问题，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Fan Zhang,Shaodi You,Yu Li,Ying Fu
title: GTAV-NightRain: Photometric Realistic Large-scale Dataset for Night-time Rain Streak Removal
title_zh: GTAV-NightRain：用于去除夜间雨条纹的光度逼真大型数据集
abstract: Rain is transparent, which reflects and refracts light in the scene to the camera. In outdoor vision, rain, especially rain streaks degrade visibility and therefore need to be removed. In existing rain streak removal datasets, although density, scale, direction and intensity have been considered, transparency is not fully taken into account. This problem is particularly serious in night scenes, where the appearance of rain largely depends on the interaction with scene illuminations and changes drastically on different positions within the image. This is problematic, because unrealistic dataset causes serious domain bias. In this paper, we propose GTAV-NightRain dataset, which is a large-scale synthetic night-time rain streak removal dataset. Unlike existing datasets, by using 3D computer graphic platform (namely GTA V), we are allowed to infer the three dimensional interaction between rain and illuminations, which insures the photometric realness. Current release of the dataset contains 12,860 HD rainy images and 1,286 corresponding HD ground truth images in diversified night scenes. A systematic benchmark and analysis are provided along with the dataset to inspire further research.
summary: Rain is transparent, which reflects and refracts light in the scene to the camera. In outdoor vision, rain, especially rain streaks degrade visibility and therefore need to be removed. In existing rain streak removal datasets, although density, scale, direction and intensity have been considered, transparency is not fully taken into account. This problem is particularly serious in night scenes, where the appearance of rain largely depends on the interaction with scene illuminations and changes drastically on different positions within the image. This is problematic, because unrealistic dataset causes serious domain bias. In this paper, we propose GTAV-NightRain dataset, which is a large-scale synthetic night-time rain streak removal dataset. Unlike existing datasets, by using 3D computer graphic platform (namely GTA V), we are allowed to infer the three dimensional interaction between rain and illuminations, which insures the photometric realness. Current release of the dataset contains 12,860 HD rainy images and 1,286 corresponding HD ground truth images in diversified night scenes. A systematic benchmark and analysis are provided along with the dataset to inspire further research.
abstract_zh: 雨是透明的，它将场景中的光线反射并折射到相机上。在室外视野中，雨水，尤其是雨纹会降低能见度，因此需要将其去除。在现有的雨痕去除数据集中，虽然考虑了密度、尺度、方向和强度，但没有充分考虑透明度。这个问题在夜景中尤为严重，雨的出现很大程度上取决于与场景照明的相互作用，并且在图像中的不同位置发生巨大变化。这是有问题的，因为不切实际的数据集会导致严重的领域偏差。在本文中，我们提出了 GTAV-NightRain 数据集，这是一个大规模合成夜间雨条纹去除数据集。与现有数据集不同，通过使用3D计算机图形平台（即GTA V），我们可以推断雨和照明之间的三维相互作用，这确保了光度的真实性。当前发布的数据集包含 12,860 张高清雨天图像和 1,286 张对应的多样化夜景高清地面实况图像。数据集提供了系统的基准和分析，以激发进一步的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GTAV-NightRain数据集，用于夜间雨痕去除任务，通过三维图形平台生成具有光度真实性的大规模合成数据。
AI.motivation: 现有雨痕去除数据集未充分考虑雨的透明性及夜间场景中光照交互导致的雨外观变化，导致领域偏差问题。
AI.method: 利用3D游戏引擎GTA V模拟雨与光照的三维交互，生成包含12,860张高清雨夜图像及对应真实图像的数据集，并提供系统性基准测试。
AI.result: 发布包含多样化夜间场景的高清数据集，附带系统性评估基准，验证了数据集在雨痕去除任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: GTAV-NightRain通过物理真实模拟解决了夜间雨场景的领域偏差问题，为雨痕去除研究提供更可靠的基准数据。

In outdoor vision, rain, especially rain streaks degrade visibility and therefore need to be removed. In existing rain streak removal datasets, although density, scale, direction and intensity have been considered, transparency is not fully taken into account. This problem is particularly serious in night scenes, where the appearance of rain largely depends on the interaction with scene illuminations and changes drastically on different positions within the image. This is problematic, because unrealistic dataset causes serious domain bias. In this paper, we propose GTAV-NightRain dataset, which is a large-scale synthetic night-time rain streak removal dataset. Unlike existing datasets, by using 3D computer graphic platform (namely GTA V), we are allowed to infer the three dimensional interaction between rain and illuminations, which insures the photometric realness. Current release of the dataset contains 12,860 HD rainy images and 1,286 corresponding HD ground truth images in diversified night scenes. A systematic benchmark and analysis are provided along with the dataset to inspire further research. 雨是透明的，它将场景中的光线反射并折射到相机上。在室外视野中，雨水，尤其是雨纹会降低能见度，因此需要将其去除。在现有的雨痕去除数据集中，虽然考虑了密度、尺度、方向和强度，但没有充分考虑透明度。这个问题在夜景中尤为严重，雨的出现很大程度上取决于与场景照明的相互作用，并且在图像中的不同位置发生巨大变化。这是有问题的，因为不切实际的数据集会导致严重的领域偏差。在本文中，我们提出了 GTAV-NightRain 数据集，这是一个大规模合成夜间雨条纹去除数据集。与现有数据集不同，通过使用3D计算机图形平台（即GTA V），我们可以推断雨和照明之间的三维相互作用，这确保了光度的真实性。当前发布的数据集包含 12,860 张高清雨天图像和 1,286 张对应的多样化夜景高清地面实况图像。数据集提供了系统的基准和分析，以激发进一步的研究。 本文提出GTAV-NightRain数据集，用于夜间雨痕去除任务，通过三维图形平台生成具有光度真实性的大规模合成数据。 Fan Zhang,Shaodi You,Yu Li,Ying Fu cs.CV

authors_text: Qingyi Si,Fandong Meng,Mingyu Zheng,Zheng Lin,Yuanxin Liu,Peng Fu,Yanan Cao,Weiping Wang,Jie Zhou
title: Language Prior Is Not the Only Shortcut: A Benchmark for Shortcut Learning in VQA
title_zh: 语言先验并不是唯一的捷径：VQA 捷径学习的基准
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) models are prone to learn the shortcut solution formed by dataset biases rather than the intended solution. To evaluate the VQA models' reasoning ability beyond shortcut learning, the VQA-CP v2 dataset introduces a distribution shift between the training and test set given a question type. In this way, the model cannot use the training set shortcut (from question type to answer) to perform well on the test set. However, VQA-CP v2 only considers one type of shortcut and thus still cannot guarantee that the model relies on the intended solution rather than a solution specific to this shortcut. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new dataset that considers varying types of shortcuts by constructing different distribution shifts in multiple OOD test sets. In addition, we overcome the three troubling practices in the use of VQA-CP v2, e.g., selecting models using OOD test sets, and further standardize OOD evaluation procedure. Our benchmark provides a more rigorous and comprehensive testbed for shortcut learning in VQA. We benchmark recent methods and find that methods specifically designed for particular shortcuts fail to simultaneously generalize to our varying OOD test sets. We also systematically study the varying shortcuts and provide several valuable findings, which may promote the exploration of shortcut learning in VQA.
summary: Visual Question Answering (VQA) models are prone to learn the shortcut solution formed by dataset biases rather than the intended solution. To evaluate the VQA models' reasoning ability beyond shortcut learning, the VQA-CP v2 dataset introduces a distribution shift between the training and test set given a question type. In this way, the model cannot use the training set shortcut (from question type to answer) to perform well on the test set. However, VQA-CP v2 only considers one type of shortcut and thus still cannot guarantee that the model relies on the intended solution rather than a solution specific to this shortcut. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new dataset that considers varying types of shortcuts by constructing different distribution shifts in multiple OOD test sets. In addition, we overcome the three troubling practices in the use of VQA-CP v2, e.g., selecting models using OOD test sets, and further standardize OOD evaluation procedure. Our benchmark provides a more rigorous and comprehensive testbed for shortcut learning in VQA. We benchmark recent methods and find that methods specifically designed for particular shortcuts fail to simultaneously generalize to our varying OOD test sets. We also systematically study the varying shortcuts and provide several valuable findings, which may promote the exploration of shortcut learning in VQA.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）模型很容易学习由数据集偏差形成的捷径解决方案，而不是预期的解决方案。为了评估 VQA 模型超越快捷学习的推理能力，VQA-CP v2 数据集在给定问题类型的情况下引入了训练集和测试集之间的分布变化。这样，模型就无法使用训练集捷径（从问题类型到答案）在测试集上表现良好。然而，VQA-CP v2 仅考虑一种类型的快捷方式，因此仍然无法保证模型依赖于预期的解决方案，而不是特定于该快捷方式的解决方案。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一个新的数据集，通过在多个 OOD 测试集中构建不同的分布变化来考虑不同类型的捷径。此外，我们克服了VQA-CP v2使用中的三个麻烦做法，例如使用OOD测试集选择模型，并进一步规范了OOD评估程序。我们的基准测试为 VQA 的快捷学习提供了更严格、更全面的测试平台。我们对最新的方法进行了基准测试，发现专门为特定快捷方式设计的方法无法同时推广到我们不同的 OOD 测试集。我们还系统地研究了不同的快捷方式，并提供了一些有价值的发现，这可能会促进 VQA 中快捷方式学习的探索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个更全面的基准测试，用于评估视觉问答（VQA）模型在多种分布偏移下的捷径学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VQA-CP v2数据集仅考虑单一类型捷径，无法确保模型依赖的是目标解决方案而非特定捷径，需改进评估方法。
AI.method: 构建包含多种分布偏移的测试集，标准化分布外（OOD）评估流程，并克服VQA-CP v2的三个局限性。
AI.result: 专门针对特定捷径的方法无法泛化到多种OOD测试集，系统研究揭示了捷径学习的规律。
AI.conclusion: 该基准测试为VQA领域提供了更严格的捷径学习评估框架，推动相关研究进展。

authors_text: Chang Liu,Terence Jie Chua,Jun Zhao
title: Time Minimization in Hierarchical Federated Learning
title_zh: 分层联邦学习中的时间最小化
comment: This paper appears in the Proceedings of 2022 ACM/IEEE Symposium on Edge Computing (SEC). Please feel free to contact us for questions or remarks
comments: This paper appears in the Proceedings of 2022 ACM/IEEE Symposium on Edge Computing (SEC). Please feel free to contact us for questions or remarks
abstract: Federated Learning is a modern decentralized machine learning technique where user equipments perform machine learning tasks locally and then upload the model parameters to a central server. In this paper, we consider a 3-layer hierarchical federated learning system which involves model parameter exchanges between the cloud and edge servers, and the edge servers and user equipment. In a hierarchical federated learning model, delay in communication and computation of model parameters has a great impact on achieving a predefined global model accuracy. Therefore, we formulate a joint learning and communication optimization problem to minimize total model parameter communication and computation delay, by optimizing local iteration counts and edge iteration counts. To solve the problem, an iterative algorithm is proposed. After that, a time-minimized UE-to-edge association algorithm is presented where the maximum latency of the system is reduced. Simulation results show that the global model converges faster under optimal edge server and local iteration counts. The hierarchical federated learning latency is minimized with the proposed UE-to-edge association strategy.
summary: Federated Learning is a modern decentralized machine learning technique where user equipments perform machine learning tasks locally and then upload the model parameters to a central server. In this paper, we consider a 3-layer hierarchical federated learning system which involves model parameter exchanges between the cloud and edge servers, and the edge servers and user equipment. In a hierarchical federated learning model, delay in communication and computation of model parameters has a great impact on achieving a predefined global model accuracy. Therefore, we formulate a joint learning and communication optimization problem to minimize total model parameter communication and computation delay, by optimizing local iteration counts and edge iteration counts. To solve the problem, an iterative algorithm is proposed. After that, a time-minimized UE-to-edge association algorithm is presented where the maximum latency of the system is reduced. Simulation results show that the global model converges faster under optimal edge server and local iteration counts. The hierarchical federated learning latency is minimized with the proposed UE-to-edge association strategy.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种现代去中心化机器学习技术，用户设备在本地执行机器学习任务，然后将模型参数上传到中央服务器。在本文中，我们考虑一个 3 层分层联邦学习系统，其中涉及云和边缘服务器以及边缘服务器和用户设备之间的模型参数交换。在分层联邦学习模型中，模型参数的通信和计算延迟对实现预定义的全局模型精度有很大影响。因此，我们制定了联合学习和通信优化问题，通过优化局部迭代计数和边缘迭代计数来最小化总模型参数通信和计算延迟。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种迭代算法。之后，提出了时间最小化的UE到边缘的关联算法，其中系统的最大延迟被减少。仿真结果表明，在最佳边缘服务器和局部迭代次数下，全局模型收敛得更快。通过所提出的 UE 到边缘关联策略，分层联合学习延迟被最小化。

AI.tldr: 本文研究分层联邦学习中的时间最小化问题，通过优化本地和边缘服务器迭代次数及用户设备与边缘服务器的关联策略，以降低通信和计算延迟。
AI.motivation: 分层联邦学习中，通信和计算延迟显著影响全局模型的收敛速度与准确性，需通过优化策略减少系统总延迟。
AI.method: 提出联合优化问题，设计迭代算法优化本地与边缘迭代次数，并引入时间最小化用户设备-边缘服务器关联算法以降低系统最大延迟。
AI.result: 仿真表明，优化后的迭代次数和关联策略使全局模型收敛速度提升，分层联邦学习系统延迟显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效减少分层联邦学习中的通信与计算延迟，提升模型收敛效率。
