authors_text: Songsong Xiong,Georgios Tziafas,Hamidreza Kasaei
title: Enhancing Fine-Grained 3D Object Recognition using Hybrid Multi-Modal Vision Transformer-CNN Models
title_zh: 使用混合多模态视觉 Transformer-CNN 模型增强细粒度 3D 对象识别
abstract: Robots operating in human-centered environments, such as retail stores, restaurants, and households, are often required to distinguish between similar objects in different contexts with a high degree of accuracy. However, fine-grained object recognition remains a challenge in robotics due to the high intra-category and low inter-category dissimilarities. In addition, the limited number of fine-grained 3D datasets poses a significant problem in addressing this issue effectively. In this paper, we propose a hybrid multi-modal Vision Transformer (ViT) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) approach to improve the performance of fine-grained visual classification (FGVC). To address the shortage of FGVC 3D datasets, we generated two synthetic datasets. The first dataset consists of 20 categories related to restaurants with a total of 100 instances, while the second dataset contains 120 shoe instances. Our approach was evaluated on both datasets, and the results indicate that it outperforms both CNN-only and ViT-only baselines, achieving a recognition accuracy of 94.50 % and 93.51 % on the restaurant and shoe datasets, respectively. Additionally, we have made our FGVC RGB-D datasets available to the research community to enable further experimentation and advancement. Furthermore, we successfully integrated our proposed method with a robot framework and demonstrated its potential as a fine-grained perception tool in both simulated and real-world robotic scenarios.
summary: Robots operating in human-centered environments, such as retail stores, restaurants, and households, are often required to distinguish between similar objects in different contexts with a high degree of accuracy. However, fine-grained object recognition remains a challenge in robotics due to the high intra-category and low inter-category dissimilarities. In addition, the limited number of fine-grained 3D datasets poses a significant problem in addressing this issue effectively. In this paper, we propose a hybrid multi-modal Vision Transformer (ViT) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) approach to improve the performance of fine-grained visual classification (FGVC). To address the shortage of FGVC 3D datasets, we generated two synthetic datasets. The first dataset consists of 20 categories related to restaurants with a total of 100 instances, while the second dataset contains 120 shoe instances. Our approach was evaluated on both datasets, and the results indicate that it outperforms both CNN-only and ViT-only baselines, achieving a recognition accuracy of 94.50 % and 93.51 % on the restaurant and shoe datasets, respectively. Additionally, we have made our FGVC RGB-D datasets available to the research community to enable further experimentation and advancement. Furthermore, we successfully integrated our proposed method with a robot framework and demonstrated its potential as a fine-grained perception tool in both simulated and real-world robotic scenarios.
abstract_zh: 在零售店、餐馆和家庭等以人为中心的环境中运行的机器人通常需要以高精度区分不同环境中的相似物体。然而，由于类别内的高差异性和类别间的差异性低，细粒度的对象识别仍然是机器人技术中的一个挑战。此外，细粒度 3D 数据集的数量有限给有效解决这一问题带来了重大问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合多模态视觉变换器（ViT）和卷积神经网络（CNN）方法来提高细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）的性能。为了解决 FGVC 3D 数据集的短缺问题，我们生成了两个合成数据集。第一个数据集包含与餐馆相关的 20 个类别，总共 100 个实例，而第二个数据集包含 120 个鞋子实例。我们的方法在两个数据集上进行了评估，结果表明它优于仅 CNN 和仅 ViT 基线，在餐厅和鞋子数据集上分别实现了 94.50 % 和 93.51 % 的识别准确率。此外，我们还向研究社区提供了 FGVC RGB-D 数据集，以便进行进一步的实验和进步。此外，我们成功地将我们提出的方法与机器人框架集成，并在模拟和现实世界的机器人场景中展示了其作为细粒度感知工具的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多模态视觉Transformer和卷积神经网络的混合模型，以提高细粒度3D物体识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 在人类中心环境中操作的机器人需要准确区分不同上下文中的相似物体，但细粒度物体识别由于类内相似性和类间差异性小以及缺乏足够的3D数据集而面临挑战。
AI.method: 提出了一种混合多模态视觉Transformer（ViT）和卷积神经网络（CNN）的方法，并生成了两个合成数据集用于评估。
AI.result: 该方法在餐厅和鞋类数据集上的识别准确率分别达到94.50%和93.51%，优于仅使用CNN或ViT的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在模拟和真实机器人场景中展示了其作为细粒度感知工具的潜力，并将数据集公开以促进进一步研究。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多模态视觉Transformer和卷积神经网络的混合模型，以提高细粒度3D物体识别的性能。

search_text: Enhancing Fine-Grained 3D Object Recognition using Hybrid Multi-Modal Vision Transformer-CNN Models 使用混合多模态视觉 Transformer-CNN 模型增强细粒度 3D 对象识别 Robots operating in human-centered environments, such as retail stores, restaurants, and households, are often required to distinguish between similar objects in different contexts with a high degree of accuracy. However, fine-grained object recognition remains a challenge in robotics due to the high intra-category and low inter-category dissimilarities. In addition, the limited number of fine-grained 3D datasets poses a significant problem in addressing this issue effectively. In this paper, we propose a hybrid multi-modal Vision Transformer (ViT) and Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) approach to improve the performance of fine-grained visual classification (FGVC). To address the shortage of FGVC 3D datasets, we generated two synthetic datasets. The first dataset consists of 20 categories related to restaurants with a total of 100 instances, while the second dataset contains 120 shoe instances. Our approach was evaluated on both datasets, and the results indicate that it outperforms both CNN-only and ViT-only baselines, achieving a recognition accuracy of 94.50 % and 93.51 % on the restaurant and shoe datasets, respectively. Additionally, we have made our FGVC RGB-D datasets available to the research community to enable further experimentation and advancement. Furthermore, we successfully integrated our proposed method with a robot framework and demonstrated its potential as a fine-grained perception tool in both simulated and real-world robotic scenarios. 在零售店、餐馆和家庭等以人为中心的环境中运行的机器人通常需要以高精度区分不同环境中的相似物体。然而，由于类别内的高差异性和类别间的差异性低，细粒度的对象识别仍然是机器人技术中的一个挑战。此外，细粒度 3D 数据集的数量有限给有效解决这一问题带来了重大问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合多模态视觉变换器（ViT）和卷积神经网络（CNN）方法来提高细粒度视觉分类（FGVC）的性能。为了解决 FGVC 3D 数据集的短缺问题，我们生成了两个合成数据集。第一个数据集包含与餐馆相关的 20 个类别，总共 100 个实例，而第二个数据集包含 120 个鞋子实例。我们的方法在两个数据集上进行了评估，结果表明它优于仅 CNN 和仅 ViT 基线，在餐厅和鞋子数据集上分别实现了 94.50 % 和 93.51 % 的识别准确率。此外，我们还向研究社区提供了 FGVC RGB-D 数据集，以便进行进一步的实验和进步。此外，我们成功地将我们提出的方法与机器人框架集成，并在模拟和现实世界的机器人场景中展示了其作为细粒度感知工具的潜力。 本文提出了一种结合多模态视觉Transformer和卷积神经网络的混合模型，以提高细粒度3D物体识别的性能。 Songsong Xiong,Georgios Tziafas,Hamidreza Kasaei cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chaimae Asaad,Imane Khaouja,Mounir Ghogho,Karim Baïna
title: When Infodemic Meets Epidemic: a Systematic Literature Review
title_zh: 当信息流行病遇上流行病：系统文献综述
abstract: Epidemics and outbreaks present arduous challenges requiring both individual and communal efforts. Social media offer significant amounts of data that can be leveraged for bio-surveillance. They also provide a platform to quickly and efficiently reach a sizeable percentage of the population, hence their potential impact on various aspects of epidemic mitigation. The general objective of this systematic literature review is to provide a methodical overview of the integration of social media in different epidemic-related contexts. Three research questions were conceptualized for this review, resulting in over 10000 publications collected in the first PRISMA stage, 129 of which were selected for inclusion. A thematic method-oriented synthesis was undertaken and identified 5 main themes related to social media enabled epidemic surveillance, misinformation management, and mental health. Findings uncover a need for more robust applications of the lessons learned from epidemic post-mortem documentation. A vast gap exists between retrospective analysis of epidemic management and result integration in prospective studies. Harnessing the full potential of social media in epidemic related tasks requires streamlining the results of epidemic forecasting, public opinion understanding and misinformation propagation, all while keeping abreast of potential mental health implications. Pro-active prevention has thus become vital for epidemic curtailment and containment.
summary: Epidemics and outbreaks present arduous challenges requiring both individual and communal efforts. Social media offer significant amounts of data that can be leveraged for bio-surveillance. They also provide a platform to quickly and efficiently reach a sizeable percentage of the population, hence their potential impact on various aspects of epidemic mitigation. The general objective of this systematic literature review is to provide a methodical overview of the integration of social media in different epidemic-related contexts. Three research questions were conceptualized for this review, resulting in over 10000 publications collected in the first PRISMA stage, 129 of which were selected for inclusion. A thematic method-oriented synthesis was undertaken and identified 5 main themes related to social media enabled epidemic surveillance, misinformation management, and mental health. Findings uncover a need for more robust applications of the lessons learned from epidemic post-mortem documentation. A vast gap exists between retrospective analysis of epidemic management and result integration in prospective studies. Harnessing the full potential of social media in epidemic related tasks requires streamlining the results of epidemic forecasting, public opinion understanding and misinformation propagation, all while keeping abreast of potential mental health implications. Pro-active prevention has thus become vital for epidemic curtailment and containment.
abstract_zh: 流行病和疫情爆发提出了艰巨的挑战，需要个人和社区的共同努力。社交媒体提供了大量可用于生物监测的数据。它们还提供了一个快速有效地覆盖相当大比例人口的平台，因此它们对缓解流行病的各个方面都有潜在影响。本系统文献综述的总体目标是系统地概述社交媒体在不同流行病相关背景下的整合。本次审查构思了三个研究问题，在第一个 PRISMA 阶段收集了 10000 多份出版物，其中 129 份被选中纳入。我们进行了以主题方法为导向的综合，并确定了与社交媒体流行病监测、错误信息管理和心理健康相关的 5 个主题。研究结果表明，需要更强有力地应用从流行病尸检文件中吸取的经验教训。流行病管理的回顾性分析与前瞻性研究结果整合之间存在巨大差距。在流行病相关任务中充分利用社交媒体的潜力需要简化流行病预测、舆论理解和错误信息传播的结果，同时及时了解潜在的心理健康影响。因此，积极预防成为控制疫情的关键。

AI.tldr: 系统综述社交媒体在疫情监测、错误信息管理及心理健康等方面的应用与挑战
AI.motivation: 疫情应对需结合社交媒体数据与传播能力，但现有研究缺乏整合性分析，亟需系统梳理以指导实践
AI.method: 采用PRISMA框架筛选10000+文献，最终纳入129篇进行主题分析，提炼5大核心主题
AI.result: 发现疫情后分析与前瞻性研究存在脱节，需整合预测模型、舆情分析与错误信息治理，同步关注心理健康影响
AI.conclusion: 应强化经验转化机制，打通回顾性研究与前瞻性应用的壁垒，通过社交媒体实现疫情全周期主动防控

authors_text: Javier Rando,Daniel Paleka,David Lindner,Lennart Heim,Florian Tramèr
title: Red-Teaming the Stable Diffusion Safety Filter
title_zh: 红队稳定扩散安全过滤器
abstract: Stable Diffusion is a recent open-source image generation model comparable to proprietary models such as DALLE, Imagen, or Parti. Stable Diffusion comes with a safety filter that aims to prevent generating explicit images. Unfortunately, the filter is obfuscated and poorly documented. This makes it hard for users to prevent misuse in their applications, and to understand the filter's limitations and improve it. We first show that it is easy to generate disturbing content that bypasses the safety filter. We then reverse-engineer the filter and find that while it aims to prevent sexual content, it ignores violence, gore, and other similarly disturbing content. Based on our analysis, we argue safety measures in future model releases should strive to be fully open and properly documented to stimulate security contributions from the community.
summary: Stable Diffusion is a recent open-source image generation model comparable to proprietary models such as DALLE, Imagen, or Parti. Stable Diffusion comes with a safety filter that aims to prevent generating explicit images. Unfortunately, the filter is obfuscated and poorly documented. This makes it hard for users to prevent misuse in their applications, and to understand the filter's limitations and improve it. We first show that it is easy to generate disturbing content that bypasses the safety filter. We then reverse-engineer the filter and find that while it aims to prevent sexual content, it ignores violence, gore, and other similarly disturbing content. Based on our analysis, we argue safety measures in future model releases should strive to be fully open and properly documented to stimulate security contributions from the community.
abstract_zh: Stable Diffusion 是一种最新的开源图像生成模型，可与 DALLE、Imagen 或 Parti 等专有模型相媲美。稳定扩散带有一个安全过滤器，旨在防止生成露骨图像。不幸的是，该过滤器很混乱并且记录很少。这使得用户很难防止其应用程序中的误用，也很难理解过滤器的局限性并对其进行改进。我们首先证明，很容易生成绕过安全过滤器的令人不安的内容。然后，我们对过滤器进行逆向工程，发现虽然它旨在阻止色情内容，但它忽略了暴力、血腥和其他类似的令人不安的内容。根据我们的分析，我们认为未来模型版本中的安全措施应努力完全开放并正确记录，以刺激社区的安全贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文对Stable Diffusion模型的安全过滤器进行逆向工程分析，揭示其局限性并提出改进建议。
AI.motivation: Stable Diffusion的安全过滤器存在文档不全和功能缺陷，可能导致生成有害内容，需通过研究提升其安全性。
AI.method: 通过生成测试内容绕过过滤器，结合逆向工程分析过滤器的工作机制与检测范围。
AI.result: 发现过滤器主要针对性内容，但对暴力、血腥等同样有害的内容缺乏检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 未来模型的安全措施应更透明、文档完善，以促进社区共同提升模型安全性。

authors_text: Gergely Dániel Németh,Miguel Ángel Lozano,Novi Quadrianto,Nuria Oliver
title: A Snapshot of the Frontiers of Client Selection in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中客户端选择前沿概述
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures, 1 appendix, accepted to TMLR
comments: 17 pages, 3 figures, 1 appendix, accepted to TMLR
abstract: Federated learning (FL) has been proposed as a privacy-preserving approach in distributed machine learning. A federated learning architecture consists of a central server and a number of clients that have access to private, potentially sensitive data. Clients are able to keep their data in their local machines and only share their locally trained model's parameters with a central server that manages the collaborative learning process. FL has delivered promising results in real-life scenarios, such as healthcare, energy, and finance. However, when the number of participating clients is large, the overhead of managing the clients slows down the learning. Thus, client selection has been introduced as a strategy to limit the number of communicating parties at every step of the process. Since the early naïve random selection of clients, several client selection methods have been proposed in the literature. Unfortunately, given that this is an emergent field, there is a lack of a taxonomy of client selection methods, making it hard to compare approaches. In this paper, we propose a taxonomy of client selection in Federated Learning that enables us to shed light on current progress in the field and identify potential areas of future research in this promising area of machine learning.
summary: Federated learning (FL) has been proposed as a privacy-preserving approach in distributed machine learning. A federated learning architecture consists of a central server and a number of clients that have access to private, potentially sensitive data. Clients are able to keep their data in their local machines and only share their locally trained model's parameters with a central server that manages the collaborative learning process. FL has delivered promising results in real-life scenarios, such as healthcare, energy, and finance. However, when the number of participating clients is large, the overhead of managing the clients slows down the learning. Thus, client selection has been introduced as a strategy to limit the number of communicating parties at every step of the process. Since the early naïve random selection of clients, several client selection methods have been proposed in the literature. Unfortunately, given that this is an emergent field, there is a lack of a taxonomy of client selection methods, making it hard to compare approaches. In this paper, we propose a taxonomy of client selection in Federated Learning that enables us to shed light on current progress in the field and identify potential areas of future research in this promising area of machine learning.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）被提出作为分布式机器学习中的隐私保护方法。联邦学习架构由一个中央服务器和多个可以访问私有、潜在敏感数据的客户端组成。客户能够将数据保存在本地机器中，并且仅与管理协作学习过程的中央服务器共享本地训练的模型参数。 FL 在医疗保健、能源和金融等现实生活场景中取得了可喜的成果。然而，当参与的客户端数量很大时，管理客户端的开销会减慢学习速度。因此，引入了客户端选择作为一种策略，以限制流程每个步骤中通信方的数量。自从早期简单地随机选择客户以来，文献中已经提出了几种客户选择方法。不幸的是，鉴于这是一个新兴领域，缺乏客户选择方法的分类，因此很难比较方法。在本文中，我们提出了联邦学习中客户选择的分类法，使我们能够阐明该领域当前的进展，并确定这个有前景的机器学习领域未来研究的潜在领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联邦学习中客户端选择方法的分类体系，以梳理当前研究进展并识别未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中客户端数量庞大时管理效率下降，虽已有多种客户端选择策略，但缺乏统一分类体系导致方法比较困难。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和系统分析，建立客户端选择方法的分类框架，从选择目标、技术手段和应用场景等维度进行归纳。
AI.result: 构建了首个系统化的联邦学习客户端选择方法分类体系，明确了现有方法的异同及研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 该分类体系为联邦学习客户端选择研究提供了理论框架，有助于推动更高效算法设计与跨领域应用探索。

authors_text: Moayad Aloqaily,Ouns Bouachir,Fakhri Karray,Ismaeel Al Ridhawi,Abdulmotaleb El Saddik
title: Integrating Digital Twin and Advanced Intelligent Technologies to Realize the Metaverse
title_zh: 融合数字孪生与先进智能技术，实现元宇宙
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for publication, IEEE Consumer Electronics Magazine
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, Accepted for publication, IEEE Consumer Electronics Magazine
abstract: The advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) have led to technological advancements in a plethora of domains. Healthcare, education, and smart city services are now enriched with AI capabilities. These technological advancements would not have been realized without the assistance of fast, secure, and fault-tolerant communication media. Traditional processing, communication and storage technologies cannot maintain high levels of scalability and user experience for immersive services. The metaverse is an immersive three-dimensional (3D) virtual world that integrates fantasy and reality into a virtual environment using advanced virtual reality (VR) and augmented reality (AR) devices. Such an environment is still being developed and requires extensive research in order for it to be realized to its highest attainable levels. In this article, we discuss some of the key issues required in order to attain realization of metaverse services. We propose a framework that integrates digital twin (DT) with other advanced technologies such as the sixth generation (6G) communication network, blockchain, and AI, to maintain continuous end-to-end metaverse services. This article also outlines requirements for an integrated, DT-enabled metaverse framework and provides a look ahead into the evolving topic.

abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的进步带来了众多领域的技术进步。医疗保健、教育和智慧城市服务现在都通过人工智能功能得到丰富。如果没有快速、安全和容错的通信媒体的帮助，这些技术进步就不会实现。传统的处理、通信和存储技术无法维持沉浸式服务的高水平可扩展性和用户体验。元宇宙是一个沉浸式三维 (3D) 虚拟世界，它使用先进的虚拟现实 (VR) 和增强现实 (AR) 设备将幻想和现实集成到虚拟环境中。这样的环境仍在开发中，需要进行广泛的研究才能实现可达到的最高水平。在本文中，我们讨论实现元宇宙服务所需的一些关键问题。我们提出了一个将数字孪生（DT）与第六代（6G）通信网络、区块链和人工智能等其他先进技术相结合的框架，以维持持续的端到端元宇宙服务。本文还概述了支持 DT 的集成元节框架的要求，并对不断发展的主题进行了展望。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合数字孪生（DT）与6G通信网络、区块链和人工智能等先进技术的框架，以实现可持续的元宇宙服务。
AI.motivation: 传统处理、通信和存储技术无法满足元宇宙等沉浸式服务对可扩展性和用户体验的高要求，需探索新技术整合方案。
AI.method: 通过整合数字孪生技术与6G、区块链及人工智能，构建支持端到端元宇宙服务的框架，并阐述其技术需求与未来发展方向。
AI.result: 明确了DT驱动的元宇宙框架的技术要求，为元宇宙的实现提供了技术整合路径和前瞻性研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生与前沿技术的融合是推动元宇宙发展的关键，需持续探索跨领域技术协同创新以实现其潜力。

authors_text: Mohammadreza Kouchaki,Vuk Marojevic
title: Actor-Critic Network for O-RAN Resource Allocation: xApp Design, Deployment, and Analysis
title_zh: 用于 O-RAN 资源分配的 Actor-Critic 网络：xApp 设计、部署和分析
comment: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE GLOBECOM 2022
comments: This article has been accepted for publication in IEEE GLOBECOM 2022
abstract: Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) has introduced an emerging RAN architecture that enables openness, intelligence, and automated control. The RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC) provides the platform to design and deploy RAN controllers. xApps are the applications which will take this responsibility by leveraging machine learning (ML) algorithms and acting in near-real time. Despite the opportunities provided by this new architecture, the progress of practical artificial intelligence (AI)-based solutions for network control and automation has been slow. This is mostly because of the lack of an endto-end solution for designing, deploying, and testing AI-based xApps fully executable in real O-RAN network. In this paper we introduce an end-to-end O-RAN design and evaluation procedure and provide a detailed discussion of developing a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based xApp by using two different RL approaches and considering the latest released O-RAN architecture and interfaces.
summary: Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) has introduced an emerging RAN architecture that enables openness, intelligence, and automated control. The RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC) provides the platform to design and deploy RAN controllers. xApps are the applications which will take this responsibility by leveraging machine learning (ML) algorithms and acting in near-real time. Despite the opportunities provided by this new architecture, the progress of practical artificial intelligence (AI)-based solutions for network control and automation has been slow. This is mostly because of the lack of an endto-end solution for designing, deploying, and testing AI-based xApps fully executable in real O-RAN network. In this paper we introduce an end-to-end O-RAN design and evaluation procedure and provide a detailed discussion of developing a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based xApp by using two different RL approaches and considering the latest released O-RAN architecture and interfaces.
abstract_zh: 开放无线接入网络（O-RAN）引入了新兴的RAN架构，实现开放、智能和自动化控制。 RAN 智能控制器 (RIC) 提供了设计和部署 RAN 控制器的平台。 xApp 是通过利用机器学习 (ML) 算法并近乎实时地执行操作来承担此责任的应用程序。尽管这种新架构提供了机遇，但基于人工智能 (AI) 的实用网络控制和自动化解决方案进展缓慢。这主要是因为缺乏用于设计、部署和测试在真实 O-RAN 网络中完全可执行的基于 AI 的 xApp 的端到端解决方案。在本文中，我们介绍了端到端 O-RAN 设计和评估过程，并详细讨论了如何使用两种不同的 RL 方法并考虑最新发布的 O-RAN 架构和接口来开发基于强化学习 (RL) 的 xApp。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的xApp设计与评估流程，用于O-RAN架构中的资源分配，采用两种不同的RL方法并遵循最新O-RAN接口标准。
AI.motivation: 尽管O-RAN架构为网络智能化提供了开放平台，但缺乏端到端的AI解决方案设计与验证流程，阻碍了实际部署进程。
AI.method: 基于Actor-Critic强化学习框架，结合最新O-RAN架构规范，设计并实现两种不同的RL算法方案，完成xApp的全流程开发与测试验证。
AI.result: 构建了完整的O-RAN AI xApp开发框架，通过对比实验验证了两种RL方法在资源分配任务中的可行性与性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的端到端设计流程为O-RAN智能控制提供了可复用的方法论，有助于加速AI算法在实际网络中的落地应用。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的xApp设计与评估流程，用于O-RAN架构中的资源分配，采用两种不同的RL方法并遵循最新O-RAN接口标准。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管O-RAN架构为网络智能化提供了开放平台，但缺乏端到端的AI解决方案设计与验证流程，阻碍了实际部署进程。
ai_content.method: 基于Actor-Critic强化学习框架，结合最新O-RAN架构规范，设计并实现两种不同的RL算法方案，完成xApp的全流程开发与测试验证。
ai_content.result: 构建了完整的O-RAN AI xApp开发框架，通过对比实验验证了两种RL方法在资源分配任务中的可行性与性能差异。
ai_content.conclusion: 所提出的端到端设计流程为O-RAN智能控制提供了可复用的方法论，有助于加速AI算法在实际网络中的落地应用。

search_text: Actor-Critic Network for O-RAN Resource Allocation: xApp Design, Deployment, and Analysis 用于 O-RAN 资源分配的 Actor-Critic 网络：xApp 设计、部署和分析 Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) has introduced an emerging RAN architecture that enables openness, intelligence, and automated control. The RAN Intelligent Controller (RIC) provides the platform to design and deploy RAN controllers. xApps are the applications which will take this responsibility by leveraging machine learning (ML) algorithms and acting in near-real time. Despite the opportunities provided by this new architecture, the progress of practical artificial intelligence (AI)-based solutions for network control and automation has been slow. This is mostly because of the lack of an endto-end solution for designing, deploying, and testing AI-based xApps fully executable in real O-RAN network. In this paper we introduce an end-to-end O-RAN design and evaluation procedure and provide a detailed discussion of developing a Reinforcement Learning (RL) based xApp by using two different RL approaches and considering the latest released O-RAN architecture and interfaces. 开放无线接入网络（O-RAN）引入了新兴的RAN架构，实现开放、智能和自动化控制。 RAN 智能控制器 (RIC) 提供了设计和部署 RAN 控制器的平台。 xApp 是通过利用机器学习 (ML) 算法并近乎实时地执行操作来承担此责任的应用程序。尽管这种新架构提供了机遇，但基于人工智能 (AI) 的实用网络控制和自动化解决方案进展缓慢。这主要是因为缺乏用于设计、部署和测试在真实 O-RAN 网络中完全可执行的基于 AI 的 xApp 的端到端解决方案。在本文中，我们介绍了端到端 O-RAN 设计和评估过程，并详细讨论了如何使用两种不同的 RL 方法并考虑最新发布的 O-RAN 架构和接口来开发基于强化学习 (RL) 的 xApp。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的xApp设计与评估流程，用于O-RAN架构中的资源分配，采用两种不同的RL方法并遵循最新O-RAN接口标准。 Mohammadreza Kouchaki,Vuk Marojevic cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.DC

authors_text: Kayode Olaleye,Dan Oneata,Herman Kamper
title: YFACC: A Yorùbá speech-image dataset for cross-lingual keyword localisation through visual grounding
title_zh: YFACC：通过视觉基础进行跨语言关键字本地化的约鲁巴语语音图像数据集
abstract: Visually grounded speech (VGS) models are trained on images paired with unlabelled spoken captions. Such models could be used to build speech systems in settings where it is impossible to get labelled data, e.g. for documenting unwritten languages. However, most VGS studies are in English or other high-resource languages. This paper attempts to address this shortcoming. We collect and release a new single-speaker dataset of audio captions for 6k Flickr images in Yorùbá -- a real low-resource language spoken in Nigeria. We train an attention-based VGS model where images are automatically tagged with English visual labels and paired with Yorùbá utterances. This enables cross-lingual keyword localisation: a written English query is detected and located in Yorùbá speech. To quantify the effect of the smaller dataset, we compare to English systems trained on similar and more data. We hope that this new dataset will stimulate research in the use of VGS models for real low-resource languages.
summary: Visually grounded speech (VGS) models are trained on images paired with unlabelled spoken captions. Such models could be used to build speech systems in settings where it is impossible to get labelled data, e.g. for documenting unwritten languages. However, most VGS studies are in English or other high-resource languages. This paper attempts to address this shortcoming. We collect and release a new single-speaker dataset of audio captions for 6k Flickr images in Yorùbá -- a real low-resource language spoken in Nigeria. We train an attention-based VGS model where images are automatically tagged with English visual labels and paired with Yorùbá utterances. This enables cross-lingual keyword localisation: a written English query is detected and located in Yorùbá speech. To quantify the effect of the smaller dataset, we compare to English systems trained on similar and more data. We hope that this new dataset will stimulate research in the use of VGS models for real low-resource languages.
abstract_zh: 视觉基础语音 (VGS) 模型是在与未标记的语音字幕配对的图像上进行训练的。此类模型可用于在无法获得标记数据的环境中构建语音系统，例如用于记录不成文的语言。然而，大多数 VGS 研究都是使用英语或其他高资源语言进行的。本文试图解决这一缺陷。我们收集并发布了约鲁巴语（尼日利亚使用的一种真正的资源匮乏语言）的 6k Flickr 图像的新单人音频字幕数据集。我们训练基于注意力的 VGS 模型，其中图像会自动标记英语视觉标签并与约鲁巴语话语配对。这可以实现跨语言关键字本地化：检测并定位约鲁巴语语音中的书面英语查询。为了量化较小数据集的影响，我们与使用类似和更多数据训练的英语系统进行了比较。我们希望这个新数据集能够刺激将 VGS 模型用于真正的低资源语言的研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出YFACC数据集，用于通过视觉 grounding 实现跨语言关键词定位，专注于低资源语言约鲁巴语。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉 grounding 研究多集中于高资源语言，缺乏对低资源语言（如约鲁巴语）的支持，限制了相关技术在无文字语言场景的应用。
AI.method: 收集包含6000张Flickr图像的约鲁巴语语音数据集，构建基于注意力机制的视觉 grounding 模型，通过英语视觉标签与约鲁巴语语音配对实现跨语言关键词定位。
AI.result: 实验对比显示，尽管数据集规模较小，模型仍能实现英语查询在约鲁巴语语音中的定位，验证了方法在低资源语言场景的可行性。
AI.conclusion: YFACC数据集为低资源语言的视觉 grounding 研究提供了基础，有望推动跨语言语音-视觉对齐技术的发展。
